combined_text: Product: Sophia 4-Piece Feather Modular Sofa - Cream Loveseat Pit. Category: Sofas. Description: 5-PIECE CORNER MODULAR SOFA WITH LARGER SEATS - CHITA modular couches feature clean and classic design with comfortable and wider seats to offer you a never ending relax after a long day. Each seat has a 34'' seat width - 30 larger than most counterparts. Individual seat dimension 34''W x 20.5''D x 20''H. Only three seats are needed to achieve a 107'' overall width. REARRANGEABLE FOR ANY OCCASION - Available in multiple configurations, the modular pieces can be easily rearranged to fit both small and spacious living rooms, family rooms, basement playrooms, etc. To accommodate different occasions and gatherings, the modular combination allows you to pull the armless chair out as a standalone piece. A DIVE INTO COMFORT - Comfort is intimate and personal. With CHITA modular sofas, comfort is a feeling that there is nowhere else you want to be. The sofa frame is luxuriously padded with high density foam, which is CertiPur-US certified, and topped by loose cushions. Soft, reversible cushions and arm pillows are padded with a soft blend of fiber and sterilized feather. Cushions can be easily fluffed to maintain a clean look. Seat firmness medium plush. On a scale from 1 to 5 5 being firmest , it's a 2. IDEAL FOR BUSY HOMES - Engineered for homes with lots of activities, these durable fabrics take a good beating from over use and continue to look like new. The luxurious look fabric that creates a casual vibe in your room and gives you everyday comfort.. Fabrics are OEKO-TEX certified, containing no formaldehyde or harmful phthalates. Every component of these fabrics has been tested for harmful substances and the fabrics are harmless for human health. 100 FSC CERTIFIED WOOD FRAME- Each CHITA modular piece is made by the skilled hands of artisans who have melted functionality and design. Sturdy corner blocked wooden frame is expertly crafted from solid engineered wood and hard wood. All wood is kiln-dried for added durability. High-gauge sinuous springs and synthetic webbing suspension provide additional support for seat and back cushions. Weight capacity for each seat 350 lbs. FEATHER FILLED REVERSIBLE CUSHIONS - Pillowy-soft cushions are padded with a soft blend of fiber and sterilized feathers with down proof ticking. All cushions are loose and reversible, featuring zip-off, dry-cleanable covers. Cushions can be easily fluffed to maintain a clean look. CARE INSTRUCTIONS - For non-removable areas, blot and spot clean immediately with a clean, absorbent cloth and a water-free stain remover Cleaning Code S . Cushion covers are dry clean only. MINIMUM TOOL FREE ASSEMBLY REQUIRED - No extra tools are needed for assembly. Each assembly step is simple and intuitive.Note Do not start the assembly process until all boxes are present. Do not open all boxes at once. Start with Arms Box and follow detailed instructions. FIVE PACKAGES - The 4-piece modular sofa comes with 5 boxes and may arrive on different dates. Each box is designed and packaged to maximize shipping efficiency and fits narrow staircase and elevator. Minimum door width 20''Box 1 ArmsBox 2 Left seat backrest Box 3 Right seat backrestBox 4 Armless chair Box 5 Ottoman SPACIOUS VERSATILE STORAGE OTTOMAN - Lift up the ottoman top with a built-in smooth gas-lift mechanism to reveal plenty of out-of-sight storage. Storage space 28.5''W x 2756''D x 8.5''H. In addition, it is a perfect footrest or table when topped with a tray.. Price Category: premium

Description: 6-Piece Oversized Modular Sofa with Chaise - CHITA oversized modular sectional offers maximum comfort with its modular pieces that make dreams come true. A perfect blend of retro and mid-century modern vibes, this sofa is a welcome addition to any sophisticated home decor. Additionally, the solid wooden high-leg design allows a robot vacuum to easily pass through, keeping the home clean and tidy. Overstuffed Feather-Blend Cushions - Seat cushions are filled with 2.0 high-density foam and sterilized feathers. Foam is environmentally friendly with the seal of approval certified by CertiPUR-US. Back cushions are filled with soft fiber and sterilized feathers. Cushions are loose with zip-off covers. Cushions can be easily fluffed to maintain a clean look. Seat firmness medium. On a scale from 1 to 5 5 being firmest , it's a 3. Ideal for Busy Homes - Engineered for homes with lots of activities, these durable fabrics take a good beating from over use and continue to look like new. The linen-like fabric is soft to the touch and has variegated chenille yarns that create a heathered appearance. Fabrics are OEKO-TEX certified, containing no formaldehyde or harmful phthalates. Every component of these fabrics has been tested for harmful substances and the fabrics are harmless for human health. Premium Quality - Each CHITA modular piece is made by the skilled hands of artisans who have melted functionality and design. Sturdy corner blocked wooden frame is expertly crafted from solid engineered wood and hard wood. All wood is kiln-dried for added durability. High-gauge sinuous springs and synthetic webbing suspension provide additional support for seat and back cushions. Weight capacity for each seat 350 lbs. Seats That Do Not Slide Apart - Strong metal connectors come with each seat to keep different seats together from the bottom, creating a connected couch that doesn't slip or slide apart. CARE INSTRUCTIONS - For non-removable areas, blot and spot clean immediately with a clean, absorbent cloth and a water-free stain remover Cleaning Code S . Cushion covers are dry clean only. combined_text: Product: Liam Overstuffed Feather Modular Armless Seat - Camel. Category: Ottoman. Description: Oversized Armless Chair - Clean and classic design with extra deep seat to offer you a never ending relax after a long day. Individual seat dimension 35''W x 23.6''D x 19.7''H. Overall dimension 35''W x 38''D x 33''H. Solid Wood Plinth Base - The exposed wood frame is made of solid, kiln-dried wood for extra durability. A perfect blend of retro and mid-century modern vibes, this sofa is a welcome addition to any sophisticated home decor. Additionally, the solid wooden high-leg design allows a robot vacuum to easily pass through, keeping the home clean and tidy. Overstuffed Feather-Blend Cushions - Seat cushions are filled with 2.0 high-density foam and sterilized feathers. Foam is environmentally friendly with the seal of approval certified by CertiPUR-US. Back cushions are filled with soft fiber and sterilized feathers. Cushions are loose with zip-off covers. Cushions can be easily fluffed to maintain a clean look. Seat firmness medium. On a scale from 1 to 5 5 being firmest , it's a 3. Ideal for Busy Homes - Engineered for homes with lots of activities, these durable fabrics take a good beating from over use and continue to look like new. The linen-like fabric is soft to the touch and has variegated chenille yarns that create a heathered appearance. Fabrics are OEKO-TEX certified, containing no formaldehyde or harmful phthalates. Every component of these fabrics has been tested for harmful substances and the fabrics are harmless for human health. Premium Quality - Each CHITA modular piece is made by the skilled hands of artisans who have melted functionality and design. Sturdy corner blocked wooden frame is expertly crafted from solid engineered wood and hard wood. All wood is kiln-dried for added durability. High-gauge sinuous springs and synthetic webbing suspension provide additional support for seat and back cushions. Weight capacity for each seat 350 lbs. CARE INSTRUCTIONS - For non-removable areas, blot and spot clean immediately with a clean, absorbent cloth and a water-free stain remover Cleaning Code S . Cushion covers are dry clean only. MINIMUM TOOL FREE ASSEMBLY REQUIRED - No extra tools are needed for assembly. Each assembly step is simple and intuitive. One Package - The armless chair comes with 1 box and is packaged to maximize shipping efficiency and fits narrow staircase and elevator. Minimum door width 14''Box 1 Armless chair. Price Category: mid-range

combined_text: Product: Leif Super Zero Gravity Power Leather Recliner - Top Grain Leather Navy. Category: Recliners. Description: Modern Stylish This recliner showcases a modern aesthetic defined by fluid, elegant curves that create a sculpted silhouette. The double-layered armrests, meanwhile, blend aesthetic appeal with enhanced comfort and support for your arms marrying visual charm with practical functionality. With its sleek, sophisticated lines, this piece integrates seamlessly into contemporary living spaces, making it an ideal choice for those who appreciate elevated home aesthetics. Dual Motors, Customize Your Comfort Our premium power recliner chair is equipped with a dual-motor system, wrapping you in exceptional comfort and personalized support no matter the position. When upright, its backrest stays perfectly straight perfect for losing yourself in a book or simply unwinding. Better yet, you can lift the fully padded footrest without reclining the backrest, easing pressure on your legs and keeping you cozy for hours of TV watching. When fully reclined, the chair extends to a generous 140-degree angle and offers a Super Zero-Gravity mode that alleviates spinal pressure, promotes circulation, and immerses you in deep relaxation. The independently adjustable power headrest provides tailored support for your head and neck, ensuring pure comfort whether you re reading or watching TV. Super Zero-Gravity Experience Super Zero-Gravity Mode is designed with innovation and ergonomics at its core, making it a natural fit to integrate this advanced concept into a comfortable recliner. Unlike standard zero-gravity recliners, this mode elevates the footrest an extra 7cm with the footrest reaching approximately 72cm in height when activated. This higher elevation lets users recline with their feet positioned above the heart, wrapping you in deeper, more immersive comfort and relaxation. With just a touch of a button, you can sink into this incredible super zero-gravity position and enjoy convenient, premium comfort right in the comfort of your home. Sturdy Construction Certified Materials Each piece is handcrafted by master artisans using corner-blocked wooden frames. All contact surfaces feature high-quality wear-resistant materials, with coordinated upholstery on the sides and back. The back cushions incorporate bagged and channeled polyester fiber filling to maintain their shape, while a no-sag spring platform ensures optimal support and comfort. The high-quality metal reclining mechanism combined with a UL-certified actuator delivers not only comfort and stability but also quiet, smooth reclining at the touch of a button. Weight Capacity 350 lbs Premium Top-Grain Leather Premium top-grain leather covers everywhere you touch and is easy to clean. The padded seat, backrest, and inside of the armrests are covered in top-grain leather, which feels good to the touch and is highly durable, while the outside and backside feature matching faux leather. Leather is a natural product, both texture and color will vary slightly from hide to hide. Stretch marks, scars, and insect bites may be visible, proving the high quality and natural characteristics of the leather. Convenient Charging Built-in USB and Type-C charging ports are integrated into the recliner's activator button, allowing you to effortlessly stay connected and keep devices powered throughout the day. This modern convenience enhances your lounging experience without the clutter of extra cords. Overall Dimension 37.8''D x 37''W x 41.3''H. Seat Dimension 20.5''D x 22''W x 19.9''H. Weight Capacity 350 lbs. Recommended Seater Height 5'1"-6'1". Seat firmness medium. On a scale from 1 to 5 5 being firmest , it's a 3.Simple Assembly Tool free assembly. Comes in 1 box which fits through doorways 29.7'' or wider. Removable back also allows for easy lifting and maneuvering through doorways. Warranty You are buckled up with our one-year warranty on mechanism and wood frame. If you have any questions, please contact our professional customer support team. We will give you a satisfactory solution.. Price Category: premium

combined_text: Product: Owen Genuine Leather Reclining Sofa with Power Headrest - Light Grey. Category: Sofas. Description: European High-Leg Elegance This premium power sofa blends classic European elegance with modern comfort, highlighted by a refined high-leg silhouette that conveys timeless sophistication. Double-layered arms with exquisite side tufting add depth and luxury, while clean, tailored lines create a structured yet welcoming appeal. Its elevated stance not only enhances the sense of space but also lends a graceful, airy charm to your living room. Designed for those who value fine craftsmanship and distinctive style, this sofa transitions seamlessly between traditional and contemporary interiors erving as a true statement piece in any home. Dual Motors for Personalized Comfort Our premium power recliner sofa features a dual-motor system paired with an extra-wide, deep seat, delivering exceptional comfort and customized support in any position. In the upright setting, the backrest remains perfectly straight deal for reading or relaxed sitting hile the spacious design provides plenty of room to stretch out. The fully padded footrest can be raised independently of the backrest to relieve leg pressure, creating the perfect posture for TV viewing. When fully reclined, the chair extends to a generous 135-degree angle with an extended footrest that offers additional leg support, combining ample dimensions and extended comfort for truly restful naps. Power Headrest Our motion sofa features a power headrest that can be effortlessly adjusted with the multi-function button, allowing you to find the perfect angle for personalized comfort. Whether watching TV, reading, or using electronic devices, the adjustable headrest optimizes your line of sight and enhances the overall viewing experience eeping you comfortably supported in any reclined position. Wall Hugger Wall hugger sofas are ideal for small spaces, perfect for limited rooms where you still want the comfort of reclining e.g., in an RV . This chair only needs 1.6 inches of space from the wall. When you recline, the seat moves forward without leaving a gap between the back and the seat. Premium Top-Grain Leather Premium top-grain leather covers everywhere you touch and is easy to clean. The padded seat, backrest, and inside of the armrests are covered in top-grain leather, which feels good to the touch and is highly durable, while the outside and backside feature matching faux leather. Leather is a natural product, both texture and color will vary slightly from hide to hide. Stretch marks, scars, and insect bites may be visible, proving the high quality and natural characteristics of the leather. Convenient Design Built-in USB charging ports are integrated into the recliner's activator button, allowing you to effortlessly stay connected and keep devices powered throughout the day. This modern convenience enhances your lounging experience without the clutter of extra cords. And for added ease, the recliner ships in a single box, with only the metal legs needing self-assembly by the user. Sturdy Construction Certified Materials Each piece is handcrafted by master artisans using a corner-blocked wooden frame. The back cushions are filled with bagged and channeled polyester fiber to retain their shape, while a no-sag spring platform ensures lasting support and comfort. The high-quality metal reclining mechanism combined with a UL-certified actuator delivers not only comfort and stability but also quiet, smooth reclining at the touch of a button. Weight Capacity 350 lbs. Overall Dimension 42.9''D x 88.6''W x 31.5''H. Seat Dimension 22.4''D x 66.5''W x 19.3''H. Weight Capacity 350 lbs. Recommended Seater Height 5'1"-6.1'. Seat firmness medium. On a scale from 1 to 5 5 being firmest , it's a 3. Simple Assembly Tool free assembly. Simply slide the backrest into the seat, connect the wires, plug in and voila. Comes in 1 box which fits through doorways 31'' or wider. Removable back also allows for easy lifting and maneuvering through doorways. Warranty You are buckled up with our one-year warranty on mechanism and wood frame. If you have any questions, please contact our professional customer support team. combined_text: Product: Leif Super Zero Gravity Power Leather Recliner - Faux Leather Camel. Category: Recliners. Description: Modern Stylish This recliner showcases a modern aesthetic defined by fluid, elegant curves that create a sculpted silhouette. The double-layered armrests, meanwhile, blend aesthetic appeal with enhanced comfort and support for your arms marrying visual charm with practical functionality. With its sleek, sophisticated lines, this piece integrates seamlessly into contemporary living spaces, making it an ideal choice for those who appreciate elevated home aesthetics. Dual Motors, Customize Your Comfort Our premium power recliner chair is equipped with a dual-motor system, wrapping you in exceptional comfort and personalized support no matter the position. When upright, its backrest stays perfectly straight perfect for losing yourself in a book or simply unwinding. Better yet, you can lift the fully padded footrest without reclining the backrest, easing pressure on your legs and keeping you cozy for hours of TV watching. When fully reclined, the chair extends to a generous 140-degree angle and offers a Super Zero-Gravity mode that alleviates spinal pressure, promotes circulation, and immerses you in deep relaxation. The independently adjustable power headrest provides tailored support for your head and neck, ensuring pure comfort whether you re reading or watching TV. Super Zero-Gravity Experience Super Zero-Gravity Mode is designed with innovation and ergonomics at its core, making it a natural fit to integrate this advanced concept into a comfortable recliner. Unlike standard zero-gravity recliners, this mode elevates the footrest an extra 7cm with the footrest reaching approximately 72cm in height when activated. This higher elevation lets users recline with their feet positioned above the heart, wrapping you in deeper, more immersive comfort and relaxation. With just a touch of a button, you can sink into this incredible super zero-gravity position and enjoy convenient, premium comfort right in the comfort of your home. Sturdy Construction Certified Materials Each piece is handcrafted by master artisans using corner-blocked wooden frames. All contact surfaces feature high-quality wear-resistant materials, with coordinated upholstery on the sides and back. The back cushions incorporate bagged and channeled polyester fiber filling to maintain their shape, while a no-sag spring platform ensures optimal support and comfort. The high-quality metal reclining mechanism combined with a UL-certified actuator delivers not only comfort and stability but also quiet, smooth reclining at the touch of a button. Weight Capacity 350 lbs Premium Top-Grain Leather Premium top-grain leather covers everywhere you touch and is easy to clean. The padded seat, backrest, and inside of the armrests are covered in top-grain leather, which feels good to the touch and is highly durable, while the outside and backside feature matching faux leather. Leather is a natural product, both texture and color will vary slightly from hide to hide. Stretch marks, scars, and insect bites may be visible, proving the high quality and natural characteristics of the leather. Convenient Charging Built-in USB and Type-C charging ports are integrated into the recliner's activator button, allowing you to effortlessly stay connected and keep devices powered throughout the day. This modern convenience enhances your lounging experience without the clutter of extra cords. Overall Dimension 37.8''D x 37''W x 41.3''H. Seat Dimension 20.5''D x 22''W x 19.9''H. Weight Capacity 350 lbs. Recommended Seater Height 5'1"-6'1". Seat firmness medium. On a scale from 1 to 5 5 being firmest , it's a 3.Simple Assembly Tool free assembly. Comes in 1 box which fits through doorways 29.7'' or wider. Removable back also allows for easy lifting and maneuvering through doorways. Description: Modern Stylish This recliner showcases a modern aesthetic defined by fluid, elegant curves that create a sculpted silhouette. The double-layered armrests, meanwhile, blend aesthetic appeal with enhanced comfort and support for your arms marrying visual charm with practical functionality. With its sleek, sophisticated lines, this piece integrates seamlessly into contemporary living spaces, making it an ideal choice for those who appreciate elevated home aesthetics. Dual Motors, Customize Your Comfort Our premium power recliner chair is equipped with a dual-motor system, wrapping you in exceptional comfort and personalized support no matter the position. When upright, its backrest stays perfectly straight perfect for losing yourself in a book or simply unwinding. Better yet, you can lift the fully padded footrest without reclining the backrest, easing pressure on your legs and keeping you cozy for hours of TV watching. When fully reclined, the chair extends to a generous 140-degree angle and offers a Super Zero-Gravity mode that alleviates spinal pressure, promotes circulation, and immerses you in deep relaxation. The independently adjustable power headrest provides tailored support for your head and neck, ensuring pure comfort whether you re reading or watching TV. Super Zero-Gravity Experience Super Zero-Gravity Mode is designed with innovation and ergonomics at its core, making it a natural fit to integrate this advanced concept into a comfortable recliner. Unlike standard zero-gravity recliners, this mode elevates the footrest an extra 7cm with the footrest reaching approximately 72cm in height when activated. This higher elevation lets users recline with their feet positioned above the heart, wrapping you in deeper, more immersive comfort and relaxation. With just a touch of a button, you can sink into this incredible super zero-gravity position and enjoy convenient, premium comfort right in the comfort of your home. Sturdy Construction Certified Materials Each piece is handcrafted by master artisans using corner-blocked wooden frames. All contact surfaces feature high-quality wear-resistant materials, with coordinated upholstery on the sides and back. The back cushions incorporate bagged and channeled polyester fiber filling to maintain their shape, while a no-sag spring platform ensures optimal support and comfort. The high-quality metal reclining mechanism combined with a UL-certified actuator delivers not only comfort and stability but also quiet, smooth reclining at the touch of a button. Weight Capacity 350 lbs Premium Top-Grain Leather Premium top-grain leather covers everywhere you touch and is easy to clean. The padded seat, backrest, and inside of the armrests are covered in top-grain leather, which feels good to the touch and is highly durable, while the outside and backside feature matching faux leather. Leather is a natural product, both texture and color will vary slightly from hide to hide. Stretch marks, scars, and insect bites may be visible, proving the high quality and natural characteristics of the leather. Convenient Charging Built-in USB and Type-C charging ports are integrated into the recliner's activator button, allowing you to effortlessly stay connected and keep devices powered throughout the day. This modern convenience enhances your lounging experience without the clutter of extra cords. Overall Dimension 37.8''D x 37''W x 41.3''H. Seat Dimension 20.5''D x 22''W x 19.9''H. Weight Capacity 350 lbs. Recommended Seater Height 5'1"-6'1". Seat firmness medium. On a scale from 1 to 5 5 being firmest , it's a 3.Simple Assembly Tool free assembly. Comes in 1 box which fits through doorways 29.7'' or wider. Removable back also allows for easy lifting and maneuvering through doorways. Warranty You are buckled up with our one-year warranty on mechanism and wood frame. If you have any questions, please contact our professional customer support team. We will give you a satisfactory solution.. Price Category: premium

combined_text: Product: Oliver Power Recliner Sofa Chair - Creamy Gray. Category: Recliners. Description: Modern Stylish This recliner sofa is designed with a low-slung, boxy silhouette that offers maximum comfort while instantly infusing any space with a sleek, modern vibe. It boasts extra-large seat depth and width, paired with easy-to-move modular components that can be configured flexibly this not only makes it perfect for snuggling up with loved ones for reading, movie-watching, or casual relaxation, but also ensures it fits seamlessly in both small and spacious living rooms. Complementing its modern look, the recliner sofa s back and seat cushions are padded with a soft blend of fiber and sterilized feathers, which balances supportive structure with enhanced comfort and creates an enveloping feel to help you unwind completely.Dual Motors, Customize Your Comfort Our premium power recliner sofa features a dual-motor system paired with a spacious seat width and generous seat depth, delivering exceptional comfort and personalized support in its fixed upright position. The backrest maintains a perfectly straight angle ideal for reading or relaxed sitting, with ample room to stretch freely. You can also lift the fully padded footrest without tilting the backrest to reduce leg pressure, while the deep seat ensures lasting coziness during TV viewing. The adjustable headrest provides tailored support for your head and neck, allowing you to read or watch television in comfort, with the wide seat accommodating various sitting postures.Zero Wall Recliner sofa Better than a wall hugger and ideal for spaces with limited square footage e.g., RVs , this recliner can be placed directly against the wall and optimizes the available space. When you ease into the reclining position, the backrest doesn t move, and there s no gap between the backrest and seat. The back of the recliner doesn't bump against the wall or whatever is placed behind it.Backrest with feather Blend Filling, Cloud-Like Comfort This recliner sofa boosts comfort with a backrest that includes premium feather, paired with supportive materials to blend plush softness and reliable support. The feather delivers a light, fluffy touch that gently conforms to your back s curves, wrapping you in a cozy layer that eases tension during sitting. The accompanying supportive materials help the backrest maintain its shape, ensuring stable support even with long-term use so you get the coziness of feather without compromising on lasting comfort. Convenient Design Built-in USB and Type-C charging ports are integrated into the recliner's activator button, allowing you to effortlessly stay connected and keep devices powered throughout the day. This modern convenience enhances your lounging experience without the clutter of extra cords. And for added ease, the recliner ships in a single box, with only the metal legs needing self-assembly by the user.Sturdy Construction Certified Materials Each piece is handcrafted by master artisans using a corner-blocked wooden frame. The back cushions are filled with bagged and channeled polyester fiber to retain their shape, while a no-sag spring platform ensures lasting support and comfort. The high-quality metal reclining mechanism combined with a UL-certified actuator delivers not only comfort and stability but also quiet, smooth reclining at the touch of a button. Weight Capacity 350 lbs.Overall Dimension 43.3''D x 45.5''W x 38.2''H. Seat Dimension 23.6'D x29.5''W x 19.3''H. Weight Capacity 350 lbs. Recommended Seater Height 5'1"-5.9'. Seat firmness medium. On a scale from 1 to 5 5 being firmest , it's a 3.Simple Assembly Tool free assembly. Simply slide the backrest into the seat, connect the wires, plug in and voila. Comes in 1 box which fits through doorways 29.7'' or wider. Removable back also allows for easy lifting and maneuvering through doorways.Warranty You are buckled up with our one-year warranty on mechanism and wood frame. If you have any questions, please contact our professional customer support team. We will give you a satisfactory solution.. Price Category: premium

Category: Sofas.
Description: Ultimate Comfort Relaxation Sink into a personal oasis designed for gathering and unwinding.

Designed with a spacious high backrest, generously deep and wide seat, and exceptionally plush cushions, this sofa offers an incredibly cozy seating experience ideal for relaxing, reading, or enjoying movie nights with loved ones.
Adaptable Modular Design Customize your layout with ease.

This sofa is made up of modular pieces that are simple to move and reconfigure, allowing you to effortlessly rearrange your space to suit any occasion ideal for both cozy apartments and spacious living rooms.
Plush, Reversible Cushions Filled with a soft blend of fibers and sterilized feathers, the cushions provide cloud-like comfort while supporting your posture.
Back cushions and lumbar pillows are reversible and come with zip-off covers for easy maintenance and lasting freshness.
Water-resistant chenille fabric Stylish, durable, and easy to clean.
Perfect for modern living.
Extra Bonus Enhance your comfort with the added bonus of supportive lumbar pillows.
These cushions are designed to provide extra support to your lower back, promoting better posture and reducing the risk of discomfort during prolonged sitting.
Ideal for use in both home and office settings, they ensure you can relax or work comfortably for extended periods.
Premium Quality Standard The frame, made from FSC certified engineered pine and plywood, features a sturdy corner-blocked wooden construction.
All wood is kiln-dried for added durability.
The frame support system includes no-sag springs, sustained by flexible elastic webbing.
The foam is environmentally friendly with the seal of approval certified by CertiPUR-US.
Minimum Tool Free Assembly Required No extra tools are needed for assemblyConfigureationconfsdsavvCCcorsdcciryvNov.
Each assembly step is simple and intuitive.
Seat firmness Soft.
On a scale from to being firmest , it's a .
Fits through doorways '' or wider.
Weight capacity for each seat .
Free swatches available.
Packages.
Left Arm Chair Armless Chair Right Arm Chair OttomanNote "Left-arm" and "right-arm" describe the position of the arm when you face the piece.
Price Category: luxury

combined_text: Product: Liam 4-Piece Overstuffed Feather Wood Base Sectional Sofa - With Ottomans Camel. Category: Sofas. Description: 4-Piece Oversized Modular Sofa with Chaise - CHITA oversized modular couch offers maximum comfort with its modular pieces that make dreams come true. These pieces feature extra deep seats, are easy to move around, and can be effortlessly rearranged to fit both small and spacious living rooms. Individual seat dimension 35''W x 23.6''D x 19.7''H. Only three seats are needed to achieve a 118'' overall width. Solid Wood Plinth Base - The exposed wood frame is made of solid, kiln-dried wood for extra durability. A perfect blend of retro and mid-century modern vibes, this sofa is a welcome addition to any sophisticated home decor. Additionally, the solid wooden high-leg design allows a robot vacuum to easily pass through, keeping the home clean and tidy. Overstuffed Feather-Blend Cushions - Seat cushions are filled with 2.0 high-density foam and sterilized feathers. Foam is environmentally friendly with the seal of approval certified by CertiPUR-US. Back cushions are filled with soft fiber and sterilized feathers. Cushions are loose with zip-off covers. Cushions can be easily fluffed to maintain a clean look. Seat firmness medium. On a scale from 1 to 5 5 being firmest , it's a 3. Ideal for Busy Homes - Engineered for homes with lots of activities, these durable fabrics take a good beating from over use and continue to look like new. The linen-like fabric is soft to the touch and has variegated chenille yarns that create a heathered appearance. Fabrics are OEKO-TEX certified, containing no formaldehyde or harmful phthalates. Every component of these fabrics has been tested for harmful substances and the fabrics are harmless for human health. Premium Quality - Each CHITA modular piece is made by the skilled hands of artisans who have melted functionality and design. Sturdy corner blocked wooden frame is expertly crafted from solid engineered wood and hard wood. All wood is kiln-dried for added durability. High-gauge sinuous springs and synthetic webbing suspension provide additional support for seat and back cushions. Weight capacity for each seat 350 lbs. Seats That Do Not Slide Apart - Strong metal connectors come with each seat to keep different seats together from the bottom, creating a connected couch that doesn't slip or slide apart. CARE INSTRUCTIONS - For non-removable areas, blot and spot clean immediately with a clean, absorbent cloth and a water-free stain remover Cleaning Code S . Cushion covers are dry clean only. MINIMUM TOOL FREE ASSEMBLY REQUIRED - No extra tools are needed for assembly. Each assembly step is simple and intuitive.Note Do not start the assembly process until all boxes are present. Do not open all boxes at once. Start with Arms Box and follow detailed instructions. Five Packages - The 4-piece modular sofa comes with 5 boxes and may arrive at different dates. Each box is designed and packaged to maximize shipping efficiency and fits narrow staircase and elevator. Minimum door width 16''Box 1 ArmsBox 2 Left Chair Seat Backrest Box 3 Right Chair Seat BackrestBox 4 Armless chair Box 5 Ottoman. Price Category: luxury

combined_text: Product: Addy Genuine Leather Lift Assist Power Recliner With Heat Massage - Saddle. Category: Lift Chair. Description: Effortless Dual Motor Lift Chair Discover unparalleled comfort with the CHITA Power Lift Recliner Chair for elderly. The dual motor allows for smooth transitions from sitting upright to a relaxing lay-flat or lift position. You can raise the fully padded footrest without reclining the backrest, easing leg pressure and ensuring the optimal posture for watching TV. The power headrest provides independent support for your head and neck, making it ideal for both TV viewing and taking naps.Premium Top-Grain Leather The Power Lift Chair is an excellent choice for a well-tailored sitting experience. Its top grain leather is soft, luxurious, and easy to clean and maintain. It features hidden slide-out cup holders on the fronts of each arm that close when not in use.Massage Heat Therapy Enjoy 4 massage zones back, lumbar, thighs, calves with 8 modes and 3 intensity levels. The built-in heating system in the lumbar area is ideal for relaxing muscles and relieving joint pain.Convenient Living Enjoy the ease of charging your mobile phone or tablet with the built-in USB port. The thoughtfully designed storage pockets on either side of the armrests offer a practical solution for keeping wired controllers within reach, while also serving as an ideal spot to store your tablet or favorite magazines.Sturdy Construction Certified Materials Each piece is hand-made by master craftsmen using corner blocked wooden frame. Premium top grain leather on all seating areas, the top of armrests and footrests. Hand selected matching faux leather on the sides and back. Back cushions with bagged and channeled polyester fibre to maintain shape. No-sag spring platform to ensure support and comfort. The high quality metal mechanism and UL certified actuator offer not only comfort and stability but recline quietly and smoothly with a push of button. Weight Capacity 350 lbs.Bonus Accessory The removable lumbar pillow offers better support for the lumbar, catering to varying seat depth requirements. When fully reclined, it can be used to fill the gap between the back and the seat or serve as a head pillow.Overall Dimension 36''D x 38.2''W x 41.7''H. Seat Dimension 20.1''D x 21.7''W x 18.5''H. Weight Capacity 350 lbs. Recommended Seater Height 5'2"-6'. Seat Firmness Medium. On a scale from 1 to 5 5 being firmest , it's a 3.Simple Assembly Tool free assembly. Comes in 2 boxes which fits through doorways 23'' or wider. Removable back and armrests also allow for easy lifting and maneuvering through doorways.Warranty You are buckled up with our one-year warranty on mechanism and wood frame. If you have any questions, please contact our professional customer support team. We will give you a satisfactory solution.. Price Category: premium

combined_text: Product: Atlas Modern Zero-Gravity Power Recliner - Tan. Category: Recliners. Description: Tailored Comfort Discover personalized relaxation with the Zero-Gravity Power Recliner. In the upright position, the straight backrest creates an ideal setup for reading or sitting. Raise the fully padded footrest independently of the backrest to reduce leg pressure and achieve the most comfortable TV viewing posture. When fully extended, the chair reclines to a 140 zero-gravity position, giving you a true sense of weightless comfort. Zero-Gravity Comfort This recliner is ergonomically engineered to evenly distribute your body weight, reducing pressure points and delivering superior comfort. Inspired by the posture astronauts use during liftoff, it gently reclines to elevate your legs slightly above heart level creating a weightless sensation that eases heart pressure, improves circulation, relieves back pain, and enhances lung capacity. Unlike conventional zero-gravity recliners, our upgraded design raises the footrest 10 cm higher, allowing your body to achieve deeper relaxation. Sturdy Construction Certified Materials Each recliner is handcrafted by skilled artisans with a corner-blocked wooden frame for lasting durability. Back cushions are filled with bagged and channeled polyester fiber to maintain their shape, while a no-sag spring platform ensures consistent support and comfort. The high-quality metal reclining mechanism and UL-certified actuator provide both stability and smooth, quiet reclining at the push of a button. Weight Capacity 350 lbs. Convenient Charging Built-in USB and Type-C charging ports are integrated into the recliner's activator button, allowing you to effortlessly stay connected and keep devices powered throughout the day. This modern convenience enhances your lounging experience without the clutter of extra cords. Overall Dimension 39''D x 33.5''W x 41.3''H. Seat Dimension 20.9''D x 20.5''W x 19.7''H. Weight Capacity 350 lbs. Recommended Seater Height 5'1"-6'. Seat firmness medium. On a scale from 1 to 5 5 being firmest , it's a 3. Simple Assembly Tool free assembly. Comes in 1 box which fits through doorways 28.6'' or wider. Removable back also allows for easy lifting and maneuvering through doorways. Warranty You are buckled up with our one-year warranty on mechanism and wood frame. If you have any questions, please contact our professional customer support team. We will give you a satisfactory solution.. Price Category: mid-range

combined_text: Product: Isaac Genuine Leather Wall Hugger Power Recliner with Power Headrest - Cafe Extra-large. Category: Recliners. Description: Dual Motors Offering a full spectrum of five-star amenities, our Isaac power recliner is your gateway to relaxation perfection. Not only does it feature power motion and a power headrest that adjust to your liking, but it also provides unparalleled comfort and support. Wall Hugger Recliner Wall hugger recliners are great space-savers, making them perfect if you don't have a lot of room but still want the ability to recline e.g., in the RV . When you ease into the reclining position, the seat moves forward while maintaining no gap between the back and seat. Genuine Leather Premium top grain leather is upholstered everywhere you touch. The top-grain leather is soft, luxurious, and easy to clean and maintain. Power Headrest for Customized Positioning And Comfort As you lounge, the power headrest can be independently adjusted to support your head and neck, allowing you to read or watch TV while reclined. The waterfall chaise takes pressure off tired legs, while the contoured seat allows you to sit comfortably for as long as you like. Sturdy Construction Certified Materials Each piece is hand-made by master craftsmen using corner blocked wooden frame. Back cushions with bagged and channeled polyester fibre to maintain shape. No-sag spring platform to ensure support and comfort. The high quality metal reclining mechanism and UL certified actuator offer not only comfort and stability but recline quietly and smoothly with a push of button. Weight Capacity 350 lbs. Convenient Charging Built-in USB Type-C charging ports allow for easy charging of your mobile phone and are accessibly located on the reclining activator button. Easy To Clean Lightly moisten a cloth with water and wipe clean easily. Periodically dust using a clean, dry and non-abrasive white cloth. Formaldehyde is not detected. Simple Assembly Tool free assembly. Comes in 1 box which fits through doorways 29'' or wider. Removable back also allows for easy lifting and maneuvering through doorways. Overall Dimension of Medium Size 38.2''D x 37''W x 40.9''H. Seat Dimension 21.3''D x 22.8''W x 18.5''H. Weight Capacity 350 lbs. Recommended Seater Height 5'2"-6'1". Overall Dimension of Extra-Large Size 40.2''D x 40.7''W x 44.1''H. Seat Dimension 21.3''D x 25.2''W x 18.5''H. Weight Capacity 450 lbs. Recommended Seater Height 5'4"-6'4". Warranty You are buckled up with our one-year warranty on mechanism and wood frame. If you have any questions, please contact our professional customer support team. We will give you a satisfactory solution.. Price Category: premium

combined_text: Product: Kenna Ottoman Armless Chair - Armless Chair Teddy Brown-Performance Fabric. Category: Sofas. Description: As one of the most loungeable seating in the world, the Kenna collection creates the ultimate oasis for you and your family to pile on and and sink in. The collection features slim, sloped arms and low seat that make room for pillowy cushions for an extraordinary deep and comfortable sit. Available in multiple configurations, the modular pieces are easy to move around and can be easily rearranged to fit both small and spacious living rooms. Extra deep wide seat is perfect for curling up with your loved ones to read a book, watch a movie, or simply get relaxed. The deck is luxuriously padded by CertiPur-US foam and topped by loose cushions. Non-slip legs are smartly tucked beneath the deck for a floaty silhouette. Pillowy-soft cushions are padded with a soft blend of fiber and sterilized feathers. All cushions are loose and reversible with zip-off and machine washable covers. Cushions can be easily fluffed to maintain a clean look. Sturdy corner blocked wooden frame is expertly crafted from solid engineered wood and hard wood. All wood is kiln-dried for added durability. Highly resilient fabrics surpass durability standards with a rub count of over 100,000. Seat firmness Soft. On a scale from 1 to 5 5 being firmest , it's a 2. Fully assembled. No assembly required. Fits through doorways 32'' or wider. Please measure your elevator, doors, etc. to ensure smooth delivery. Ottoman Overall Size 44.9"W x 40.9"D x 20.9''H Ottoman Box Size 46.1''W x 42.1''D x 21.7''H Armless Chair Overall Size 40.94"W x 41.73"D x 27.56''H Armless Chair Box Size 42.5'' x 42.5'' x 29.1''. Price Category: premium

combined_text: Product: Keith Leather Swivel Glider Recliner with Power Headrest - Top Grain Leather Dark Brown. Category: Recliners. Description: Modern Stylish This recliner combines a modern aesthetic with fluid contours, delivering a luxurious look and feel. The double-layered armrests feature smooth, minimalist lines that curve gently outward, offering refined style and enhanced comfort. The seat cushion is accentuated with elegant tufted detailing, creating a plush, cloud-like comfort. Accented with fashionable single-stitch tailoring, it exudes contemporary elegance. Its sleek, sophisticated design integrates seamlessly into modern living spaces, making it an ideal choice for those who appreciate elevated home aesthetics.Ultimate Comfort Customization Experience unparalleled relaxation with our dual-motor power recliner, featuring a 270-degree swivel and smooth gliding motion. The adjustable power headrest and contoured backrest provide customized support for your neck and upper body. Plushly padded armrests offer added comfort, making it ideal for unwinding after a long day. In the upright position, the backrest remains straight, perfect for reading or working. You can also raise the fully padded footrest without reclining the backrest to reduce leg pressure and achieve the most comfortable TV viewing posture. When fully reclined, the chair extends to a 135-degree angle, offering a restful position for naps.Power Headrest Our power recliner is equipped with a power headrest feature that can be easily adjusted via the multi-function button, allowing you to find the most comfortable position. The power headrest adjusts the head support angle to suit your preference. When watching TV or using electronic devices, adjusting the headrest angle optimizes your line of sight and enhances the overall audio-visual experience.Premium Top-Grain Leather Premium top-grain leather covers everywhere you touch and is easy to clean. The padded seat, backrest, and inside of the armrests are covered in top-grain leather, which feels good to the touch and is highly durable, while the outside and backside feature matching faux leather. Leather is a natural product, both texture and color will vary slightly from hide to hide. Stretch marks, scars, and insect bites may be visible, proving the high quality and natural characteristics of the leather.Sturdy Construction Certified Materials Sturdy Construction Certified Materials Each piece is hand-made by master craftsmen using corner blocked wooden frame. Premium top grain leather on all seating areas, arms rests and footrests. Hand selected matching faux leather on the sides and back. Back cushions with bagged and channeled polyester fibre to maintain shape. No-sag spring platform to ensure support and comfort. The high quality metal reclining mechanism and UL certified actuator offer not only comfort and stability but recline quietly and smoothly with a push of button. Weight Capacity 350 lbs.Convenient Charging Built-in USB and Type-C charging ports are integrated into the recliner's activator button, allowing you to effortlessly stay connected and keep devices powered throughout the day. This modern convenience enhances your lounging experience without the clutter of extra cords.Overall Dimension 34.3''D x 38.6''W x 41.3''H. Seat Dimension 21.3''D x 22.8''W x 20.5''H. Weight Capacity 350 lbs. Recommended Seater Height 5'1"-6'. Seat firmness medium. On a scale from 1 to 5 5 being firmest , it's a 3.Simple Assembly Tool free assembly. Comes in 1 box which fits through doorways 30.7'' or wider. Removable back also allows for easy lifting and maneuvering through doorways.Warranty You are buckled up with our one-year warranty on mechanism and wood frame. If you have any questions, please contact our professional customer support team. We will give you a satisfactory solution.. Price Category: premium

combined_text: Product: Kenna Ottoman Armless Chair - Armless Chair Green-Performance Fabric. Category: Sofas. Description: As one of the most loungeable seating in the world, the Kenna collection creates the ultimate oasis for you and your family to pile on and and sink in. The collection features slim, sloped arms and low seat that make room for pillowy cushions for an extraordinary deep and comfortable sit. Available in multiple configurations, the modular pieces are easy to move around and can be easily rearranged to fit both small and spacious living rooms. Extra deep wide seat is perfect for curling up with your loved ones to read a book, watch a movie, or simply get relaxed. The deck is luxuriously padded by CertiPur-US foam and topped by loose cushions. Non-slip legs are smartly tucked beneath the deck for a floaty silhouette. Pillowy-soft cushions are padded with a soft blend of fiber and sterilized feathers. All cushions are loose and reversible with zip-off and machine washable covers. Cushions can be easily fluffed to maintain a clean look. Sturdy corner blocked wooden frame is expertly crafted from solid engineered wood and hard wood. All wood is kiln-dried for added durability. Highly resilient fabrics surpass durability standards with a rub count of over 100,000. Seat firmness Soft. On a scale from 1 to 5 5 being firmest , it's a 2. Fully assembled. No assembly required. Fits through doorways 32'' or wider. Please measure your elevator, doors, etc. to ensure smooth delivery. Ottoman Overall Size 44.9"W x 40.9"D x 20.9''H Ottoman Box Size 46.1''W x 42.1''D x 21.7''H Armless Chair Overall Size 40.94"W x 41.73"D x 27.56''H Armless Chair Box Size 42.5'' x 42.5'' x 29.1''. Price Category: premium

combined_text: Product: Theo Power Swivel Glider Recliner - Cream - Faux Leather Upgraded Adjustable. Category: Recliners. Description: Comfort The power recliner chair is designed with Mom's comfort in mind, featuring a 270-degree swivel, glide, and quiet, smooth recline function that can be operated with the push of a button. The 90-135 recliner angle offers flexibility and versatility for maximum comfort. Durability This chair is not your average nursery chair. It features a patented Leggett Platt mechanism, which has passed a rigorous 25,000-cycle life test and can support up to 350 lbs, ensuring long-lasting durability and stability. Sturdy Construction Certified Materials Each piece is hand-made by master craftsmen using a corner-blocked wooden frame. The back cushions feature bagged and channeled polyester fibre to maintain their shape. A no-sag spring platform ensures support and comfort. The high-quality metal reclining mechanism, along with a UL-certified actuator, not only offers comfort and stability but also allows for quiet and smooth reclining at the push of a button. Relaxation Convenient Charging The Power Glider Swivel Rocker Recliner Chair includes an extended footrest for complete relaxation, making it perfect for activities such as watching television, sleeping, and reading. Built-in USB charging ports allow for easy charging of your mobile phone and are accessibly located on the reclining activator button. Overall Dimension 39''D x 33.3''W x 39.6''H. Seat Dimension 21.3'D x 22.4''W x 19.3''H. Weight Capacity 350 lbs. Recommended Seater Height 5'1"-5'10". Simple Assembly Tool free assembly. Simply slide the backrest into the seat, connect the wires, plug in and voila. Comes in 1 box which fits through doorways 28'' or wider. Removable back also allows for easy lifting and maneuvering through doorways. Warranty You are buckled up with our one-year warranty on mechanism and wood frame. If you have any questions, please contact our professional customer support team. We will give you a satisfactory solution.. Price Category: mid-range

combined_text: Product: Jaxon Genuine Leather Swivel Glider Power Recliner with Power Headrest - Genuine Leather-Top Grain Leather Cognac. Category: Recliners. Description: Modern Stylish This recliner embodies modern design with its exquisite overall shape. The soft, beautifully curved cushions on the armrests showcase attention to detail and craftsmanship while providing excellent arm support. Its sophisticated aesthetic seamlessly blends into any modern living space, making it a must-have for fashion-forward individuals. Ultimate Comfort Customization Experience unparalleled relaxation with our dual-motor power recliner, featuring a 270-degree swivel and glider function. The power headrest and ergonomic double-layer backrest provide tailored support for your neck and lumbar. The soft padding on the armrests offers additional comfort for your arms, making it perfect for unwinding after a long day. When the chair is in the upright position, the backrest remains straight, ideal for sitting and reading. You can also raise the fully padded footrest without reclining the backrest to reduce leg pressure and achieve the most comfortable TV viewing posture. In the fully reclined position, the recliner opens up to a maximum angle of 135 degrees, perfect for naps. Power Headrest Our power recliner is equipped with a power headrest feature that can be easily adjusted via the multi-function button, allowing you to find the most comfortable position. The power headrest adjusts the head support angle to suit your preference. When watching TV or using electronic devices, adjusting the headrest angle optimizes your line of sight and enhances the overall audio-visual experience. Convenient Design Effortlessly stay connected with built-in USB and Type-C charging ports integrated into the recliner s activator button. Designed for modern living, this feature ensures your devices are always charged, enhancing your daily lounging experience without the clutter of extra cords. Premium Top-Grain Leather Premium top-grain leather covers everywhere you touch and is easy to clean. The padded seat, backrest, and inside of the armrests are covered in top-grain leather, which feels good to the touch and is highly durable, while the outside and backside feature matching faux leather. Leather is a natural product, both texture and color will vary slightly from hide to hide. Stretch marks, scars, and insect bites may be visible, proving the high quality and natural characteristics of the leather.. Price Category: premium

combined_text: Product: Isaac Genuine Leather Lift Assist Recliner With Power Headrest - Saddle. Category: Lift Chair. Description: Effortless Dual Motor Lift Recline Experience ultimate relaxation with the CHITA Power Lift Recliner Chair for Elderly. The dual motor enables seamless transitions from an upright position to a soothing 165 lay-flat or lifted position. Raise the fully padded footrest without reclining the backrest to reduce leg pressure and achieve the most comfortable TV viewing posture. The power headrest independently supports your head and neck, perfect for watching TV or napping. Massage and Heat Indulge in complete relaxation with our genuine leather recliner's massage and heat features. With eight massage vibration points targeting the back, waist, thighs, and calves, and six vibration modes with three intensity levels, this chair adapts to your comfort needs. The carbon fiber heating pad at the waist and seat provides three heating levels, catering to different temperature preferences. User-Friendly Controls The visual controller, equipped with buttons and a display, makes operating the chair a breeze. Easily adjust massage and heating modes with intuitive controls. The storage pockets on the outside of the armrests conveniently hold the wired controller and are also perfect for storing a tablet or magazines. Premium Top-Grain Leather Premium top-grain leather covers everywhere you touch and is easy to clean. The padded seat, backrest, and inside of the armrests are covered in top-grain leather, which feels good to the touch and is highly durable, while the outside and backside feature matching faux leather. Leather is a natural product, both texture and color will vary slightly from hide to hide. Stretch marks, scars, and insect bites may be visible, proving the high quality and natural characteristics of the leather. Sturdy Construction Certified Materials Each piece is hand-made by master craftsmen using corner blocked wooden frame. Back cushions with bagged and channeled polyester fibre to maintain shape. No-sag spring platform to ensure support and comfort. The high quality metal reclining mechanism and UL certified actuator offer not only comfort and stability but recline quietly and smoothly with a push of button. Weight Capacity 350 lbs. Overall Dimension 39''D x 37.2''W x 41.7''H. Seat Dimension 22.0''D x 22.8''W x 18.9''H. Weight Capacity 350 lbs. Recommended Seater Height 5'2"-6'1". Simple Assembly Tool free assembly. Comes in 1 box which fits through doorways 27.8'' or wider. Removable back also allows for easy lifting and maneuvering through doorways.. Price Category: premium

combined_text: Product: Kenna Modular 4 Seat Sofa-Chaise Sectional - With Corner Seat Green-Performance Fabric 0. Category: Sofas. Description: As one of the most loungeable seating in the world, the Kenna collection creates the ultimate oasis for you and your family to pile on and and sink in. The collection features slim, sloped arms and low seat that make room for pillowy cushions for an extraordinary deep and comfortable sit. Available in multiple configurations, the modular pieces are easy to move around and can be easily rearranged to fit both small and spacious living rooms. Extra deep wide seat is perfect for curling up with your loved ones to read a book, watch a movie, or simply get relaxed. The deck is luxuriously padded by CertiPur-US foam and topped by loose cushions. Non-slip legs are smartly tucked beneath the deck for a floaty silhouette. Pillowy-soft cushions are padded with a soft blend of fiber and sterilized feathers. All cushions are loose and reversible with zip-off and machine washable covers. Cushions can be easily fluffed to maintain a clean look. Sturdy corner blocked wooden frame is expertly crafted from solid engineered wood and hard wood. All wood is kiln-dried for added durability. Highly resilient fabrics surpass durability standards with a rub count of over 100,000. Seat firmness Soft. On a scale from 1 to 5 5 being firmest , it's a 2. Fully assembled. No assembly required. Fits through doorways 32'' or wider. Please measure your elevator, doors, etc. to ensure smooth delivery. Seat dimension Overall Size 130.7"W x 82.7"D x 36.6''H Seat Size 122.8"W x 76.4"D x 20.9''H Box dimension Left Arm Chair 46.1'' x 42.5'' x 29.1'' Right Arm Chair 46.1'' x 42.5'' x 29.1'' Armless Chair 42.5'' x 42.5'' x 29.1'' Ottoman 46.1'' x 42.1'' x 21.7''. Description: As one of the most loungeable seating in the world, the Kenna collection creates the ultimate oasis for you and your family to pile on and and sink in. The collection features slim, sloped arms and low seat that make room for pillowy cushions for an extraordinary deep and comfortable sit. Available in multiple configurations, the modular pieces are easy to move around and can be easily rearranged to fit both small and spacious living rooms. Extra deep wide seat is perfect for curling up with your loved ones to read a book, watch a movie, or simply get relaxed. The deck is luxuriously padded by CertiPur-US foam and topped by loose cushions. Non-slip legs are smartly tucked beneath the deck for a floaty silhouette. Pillowy-soft cushions are padded with a soft blend of fiber and sterilized feathers. All cushions are loose and reversible with zip-off and machine washable covers. Cushions can be easily fluffed to maintain a clean look. Sturdy corner blocked wooden frame is expertly crafted from solid engineered wood and hard wood. All wood is kiln-dried for added durability. Highly resilient fabrics surpass durability standards with a rub count of over 100,000. Seat firmness Soft. On a scale from 1 to 5 5 being firmest , it's a 2. Fully assembled. No assembly required. Fits through doorways 32'' or wider. Please measure your elevator, doors, etc. to ensure smooth delivery. Wall Hugger Wall hugger sofas are great space-savers, making them perfect if you don't have a lot of room but still want the ability to recline. When you ease into the reclining position, the seat moves forward, requiring only 3 inches of space between the backrest and the wall, while maintaining no gap between the back and seat. Top Grain Leather Premium top grain leather is upholstered everywhere you touch. The top-grain leather is soft, luxurious, and easy to clean and maintain. Leather is a natural product, both texture and color will vary slightly from hide to hide. Stretch marks, scars, and insect bites may be visible, proving the high quality and natural characteristics of the leather. Power Headrest for Customized Positioning And Comfort As you lounge, the power headrest can be independently adjusted to support your head and neck, allowing you to read or watch TV while reclined. The waterfall chaise takes pressure off tired legs, while the contoured seat allows you to sit comfortably for as long as you like. Sturdy Construction Certified Materials Each piece is hand-made by master craftsmen using corner blocked wooden frame. Back cushions with bagged and channeled polyester fibre to maintain shape. No-sag spring platform to ensure support and comfort. The high quality metal reclining mechanism and UL certified actuator offer not only comfort and stability but recline quietly and smoothly with a push of button. Weight Capacity 350 lbs. Convenient Charging Built-in USB Type-C charging ports allow for easy charging of your mobile phone and are accessibly located on the reclining activator button. Multi-Function Console The multi-function console comes equipped with features like a wireless charging panel, built-in storage box, and hidden cup holder, adding convenience to your daily life. The hidden stainless steel cup holder is removable and easy to clean, making it perfect for holding drinks and snacks while you watch movies or play games. The built-in storage box provides storage for small items such as remote controls, magazines, etc. , keeping them within easy reach. Easy To Clean Lightly moisten a cloth with water and wipe clean easily. Periodically dust using a clean, dry and non-abrasive white cloth. Formaldehyde is not detected. Simple Assembly Tool free assembly. Comes in 1 box which fits through doorways 29'' or wider. Removable back also allows for easy lifting and maneuvering through doorways.. Price Category: luxury

combined_text: Product: Kenna 6 Seat Modular Sofa Pit Sectional - Dark Gray. Category: Sofas. Description: As one of the most loungeable seating in the world, the Kenna collection creates the ultimate oasis for you and your family to pile on and and sink in. The collection features slim, sloped arms and low seat that make room for pillowy cushions for an extraordinary deep and comfortable sit. Available in multiple configurations, the modular pieces are easy to move around and can be easily rearranged to fit both small and spacious living rooms. Extra deep wide seat is perfect for curling up with your loved ones to read a book, watch a movie, or simply get relaxed. The deck is luxuriously padded by CertiPur-US foam and topped by loose cushions. Non-slip legs are smartly tucked beneath the deck for a floaty silhouette. Pillowy-soft cushions are padded with a soft blend of fiber and sterilized feathers. All cushions are loose and reversible with zip-off and machine washable covers. Cushions can be easily fluffed to maintain a clean look. Sturdy corner blocked wooden frame is expertly crafted from solid engineered wood and hard wood. All wood is kiln-dried for added durability. Highly resilient fabrics surpass durability standards with a rub count of over 100,000. Seat firmness Soft. On a scale from 1 to 5 5 being firmest , it's a 2. Fully assembled. No assembly required. Fits through doorways 32'' or wider. Please measure your elevator, doors, etc. to ensure smooth delivery. Seat dimension Overall Size 130.7"W x 82.7"D x 36.6''H Seat Size 122.8"W x 76.4"D x 20.9''H Box dimension Left Arm Chair 46.1'' x 42.5'' x 29.1'' Right Arm Chair 46.1'' x 42.5'' x 29.1'' Armless Chair 42.5'' x 42.5'' x 29.1'' Ottoman 46.1'' x 42.1'' x 21.7''. Price Category: luxury

combined_text: Product: Vinca Modern Power Swivel Glider Recliner with Power Lumbar Headrest - Fabric Dove gray. Category: Recliners. Description: Premium Triple-Motor Nursery Glider Far more than your typical nursery chair, this swivel glider recliner is designed with mom's comfort in mind. It features a triple-motor control system, 270-degree swivel and glide capabilities, a powered headrest, and powered lumbar support, providing unmatched comfort and support in all positions. It incorporates a patented Leggett Platt mechanism that has successfully passed an extensive 25,000-cycle life test and can support up to 350 lbs., guaranteeing long-lasting durability and stability. A no-sag spring platform ensures support and comfort. The high-quality metal reclining mechanism, paired with a UL-certified actuator, delivers both stability and silent, smooth reclining at the push of a button. Comfortable in All Positions The armrests of this nursery glider chair feature an outward-turned design, making them ideal for holding a baby to sleep or providing arm support while lying down to breastfeed. You can also raise the fully padded footrest without reclining the backrest to take pressure off your legs, achieving your most comfortable TV-watching position. When fully reclined, the chair reaches a 135 opening angle, perfect for napping. As you lounge, you can independently adjust the electric headrest and lumbar support to cradle your head, neck, and waist. This ensures optimal support during naps or short breaks, helping you achieve a more restorative rest. Power Headrest Power Lumbar Support Our electric recliner chair is equipped with power headrest and power lumbar Support, These features can be easily adjusted via the multi-function button, helping you and your baby find the most comfortable position. The power lumbar support effectively reduces pressure on the spine and muscles, relieving discomfort from prolonged sitting. The power headrest adjusts the head support angle to suit your preference. Moreover, when watching TV or using electronic devices, adjusting the headrest angle optimizes your line of sight and enhances the overall audio-visual experience. Convenient Design The recliner is designed with convenience in mind. It features pockets on both sides of the armrests, which can hold a 14-inch laptop, books, remote controls, etc., helping you save space. Additionally, built-in USB Type-C charging ports allow for easy charging of your mobile phone and are accessibly located on the reclining activator button, providing you with added convenience in your daily life. Overall Dimension 38.6''D x 35.8''W x 41.7''H. Seat Dimension 21.3'D x 22.4''W x 20.1''H. Weight Capacity 350 lbs. Recommended Seater Height 5'1"-6'. Seat firmness medium. On a scale from 1 to 5 5 being firmest , it's a 3. Simple Assembly Tool free assembly. Simply slide the backrest into the seat, connect the wires, plug in and voila. Comes in 1 box which fits through doorways 30.7'' or wider. Removable back also allows for easy lifting and maneuvering through doorways. Warranty You are buckled up with our one-year warranty on mechanism and wood frame. If you have any questions, please contact our professional customer support team. We will give you a satisfactory solution.. Price Category: premium

combined_text: Product: Delaney 5-Seat V Shaped Modular Sofa Chaise - Moss Green 1. Category: Sofas. Description: 5-PIECE CORNER MODULAR SOFA WITH LARGER SEATS - CHITA modular couches feature clean and classic design with comfortable and wider seats to offer you a never ending relax after a long day. Each seat has a 34'' seat width - 30 larger than most counterparts. Individual seat dimension 34''W x 21.5''D x 18.5''H. Only three seats are needed to achieve a 106'' overall width. REARRANGEABLE FOR ANY OCCASION - Available in multiple configurations, the modular pieces can be easily rearranged to fit both small and spacious living rooms, family rooms, basement playrooms, etc. To accommodate different occasions and gatherings, the modular combination allows you to pull the armless chair out as a standalone piece. A DIVE INTO COMFORT - Comfort is intimate and personal. With CHITA modular sofas, comfort is a feeling that there is nowhere else you want to be. The sofa frame is luxuriously padded with high density foam and topped by loose cushions. Soft, reversible back cushions and arm pillows are padded with a soft blend of fiber. Cozy, non-reversible seat cushions have fiber-wrapped, high-resiliency foam, which is CertiPur-US certified. Cushions can be easily fluffed to maintain a clean look. Seat firmness medium. On a scale from 1 to 5 5 being firmest , it's a 3. IDEAL FOR BUSY HOMES - Engineered for homes with lots of activities, these durable fabrics take a good beating from over use and continue to look like new. The linen-like fabric is soft to the touch and has variegated chenille yarns that create a heathered appearance. Fabrics are OEKO-TEX certified, containing no formaldehyde or harmful phthalates. Every component of these fabrics has been tested for harmful substances and the fabrics are harmless for human health. PREMIUM QUALITY - Each CHITA modular piece is made by the skilled hands of artisans who have melted functionality and design. Sturdy corner blocked wooden frame is expertly crafted from solid engineered wood and hard wood. All wood is kiln-dried for added durability. High-gauge sinuous springs and synthetic webbing suspension provide additional support for seat and back cushions. Weight capacity for each seat 350 lbs. SEATS THAT DO NOT SLIDE APART - In addition to non-slip legs, strong metal connectors come with each seat to keep different seats together from bottom, creating a connected couch that doesn't slip or slide apart. CARE INSTRUCTIONS - For non-removable areas, blot and spot clean immediately with a clean, absorbent cloth and a water-free stain remover Cleaning Code S . Cushion covers are dry clean only. MINIMUM TOOL FREE ASSEMBLY REQUIRED - No extra tools are needed for assembly. Each assembly step is simple and intuitive.Note Do not start the assembly process until all boxes are present. Do not open all boxes at once. Start with Arms Box and follow detailed instructions. SIX PACKAGES - The 5-piece corner modular sofa comes with 7 boxes and may arrive at different dates. Each box is designed and packaged to maximize shipping efficiency and fits narrow staircase and elevator. Minimum door width 20''Box 1 ArmsBox 2 Left seat backrest Box 3 Right seat backrestBox 4 Armless chair Box 5 Armless chair Box 6 Backs BoxBox 7 Seat Cushions Box. Price Category: luxury

combined_text: Product: Vinca Modern Power Swivel Glider Recliner with Power Lumbar Headrest - Fabric Forest Green. Category: Recliners. Description: Premium Triple-Motor Nursery Glider Far more than your typical nursery chair, this swivel glider recliner is designed with mom's comfort in mind. It features a triple-motor control system, 270-degree swivel and glide capabilities, a powered headrest, and powered lumbar support, providing unmatched comfort and support in all positions. It incorporates a patented Leggett Platt mechanism that has successfully passed an extensive 25,000-cycle life test and can support up to 350 lbs., guaranteeing long-lasting durability and stability. A no-sag spring platform ensures support and comfort. The high-quality metal reclining mechanism, paired with a UL-certified actuator, delivers both stability and silent, smooth reclining at the push of a button. Comfortable in All Positions The armrests of this nursery glider chair feature an outward-turned design, making them ideal for holding a baby to sleep or providing arm support while lying down to breastfeed. You can also raise the fully padded footrest without reclining the backrest to take pressure off your legs, achieving your most comfortable TV-watching position. When fully reclined, the chair reaches a 135 opening angle, perfect for napping. As you lounge, you can independently adjust the electric headrest and lumbar support to cradle your head, neck, and waist. This ensures optimal support during naps or short breaks, helping you achieve a more restorative rest. Power Headrest Power Lumbar Support Our electric recliner chair is equipped with power headrest and power lumbar Support, These features can be easily adjusted via the multi-function button, helping you and your baby find the most comfortable position. The power lumbar support effectively reduces pressure on the spine and muscles, relieving discomfort from prolonged sitting. The power headrest adjusts the head support angle to suit your preference. Moreover, when watching TV or using electronic devices, adjusting the headrest angle optimizes your line of sight and enhances the overall audio-visual experience. Convenient Design The recliner is designed with convenience in mind. It features pockets on both sides of the armrests, which can hold a 14-inch laptop, books, remote controls, etc., helping you save space. Additionally, built-in USB Type-C charging ports allow for easy charging of your mobile phone and are accessibly located on the reclining activator button, providing you with added convenience in your daily life. combined_text: Product: Delaney 5-Seat V Shaped Modular Sofa Chaise - Fossil Gray 1. Category: Sofas. Description: 5-PIECE CORNER MODULAR SOFA WITH LARGER SEATS - CHITA modular couches feature clean and classic design with comfortable and wider seats to offer you a never ending relax after a long day. Each seat has a 34'' seat width - 30 larger than most counterparts. Individual seat dimension 34''W x 21.5''D x 18.5''H. Only three seats are needed to achieve a 106'' overall width. REARRANGEABLE FOR ANY OCCASION - Available in multiple configurations, the modular pieces can be easily rearranged to fit both small and spacious living rooms, family rooms, basement playrooms, etc. To accommodate different occasions and gatherings, the modular combination allows you to pull the armless chair out as a standalone piece. A DIVE INTO COMFORT - Comfort is intimate and personal. With CHITA modular sofas, comfort is a feeling that there is nowhere else you want to be. The sofa frame is luxuriously padded with high density foam and topped by loose cushions. Soft, reversible back cushions and arm pillows are padded with a soft blend of fiber. Cozy, non-reversible seat cushions have fiber-wrapped, high-resiliency foam, which is CertiPur-US certified. Cushions can be easily fluffed to maintain a clean look. Seat firmness medium. On a scale from 1 to 5 5 being firmest , it's a 3. IDEAL FOR BUSY HOMES - Engineered for homes with lots of activities, these durable fabrics take a good beating from over use and continue to look like new. The linen-like fabric is soft to the touch and has variegated chenille yarns that create a heathered appearance. Fabrics are OEKO-TEX certified, containing no formaldehyde or harmful phthalates. Every component of these fabrics has been tested for harmful substances and the fabrics are harmless for human health. PREMIUM QUALITY - Each CHITA modular piece is made by the skilled hands of artisans who have melted functionality and design. Sturdy corner blocked wooden frame is expertly crafted from solid engineered wood and hard wood. All wood is kiln-dried for added durability. High-gauge sinuous springs and synthetic webbing suspension provide additional support for seat and back cushions. Weight capacity for each seat 350 lbs. SEATS THAT DO NOT SLIDE APART - In addition to non-slip legs, strong metal connectors come with each seat to keep different seats together from bottom, creating a connected couch that doesn't slip or slide apart. CARE INSTRUCTIONS - For non-removable areas, blot and spot clean immediately with a clean, absorbent cloth and a water-free stain remover Cleaning Code S . Cushion covers are dry clean only. MINIMUM TOOL FREE ASSEMBLY REQUIRED - No extra tools are needed for assembly. Each assembly step is simple and intuitive.Note Do not start the assembly process until all boxes are present. Do not open all boxes at once. Start with Arms Box and follow detailed instructions. SIX PACKAGES - The 5-piece corner modular sofa comes with 7 boxes and may arrive at different dates. Each box is designed and packaged to maximize shipping efficiency and fits narrow staircase and elevator. Minimum door width 20''Box 1 ArmsBox 2 Left seat backrest Box 3 Right seat backrestBox 4 Armless chair Box 5 Armless chair Box 6 Backs BoxBox 7 Seat Cushions Box. Price Category: luxury

combined_text: Product: Kenna 6 Seat Modular Sofa Pit Sectional - Green-Performance Fabric. Category: Sofas. Description: As one of the most loungeable seating in the world, the Kenna collection creates the ultimate oasis for you and your family to pile on and and sink in. The collection features slim, sloped arms and low seat that make room for pillowy cushions for an extraordinary deep and comfortable sit. Available in multiple configurations, the modular pieces are easy to move around and can be easily rearranged to fit both small and spacious living rooms. Extra deep wide seat is perfect for curling up with your loved ones to read a book, watch a movie, or simply get relaxed. The deck is luxuriously padded by CertiPur-US foam and topped by loose cushions. Non-slip legs are smartly tucked beneath the deck for a floaty silhouette. Pillowy-soft cushions are padded with a soft blend of fiber and sterilized feathers. All cushions are loose and reversible with zip-off and machine washable covers. Cushions can be easily fluffed to maintain a clean look. Sturdy corner blocked wooden frame is expertly crafted from solid engineered wood and hard wood. All wood is kiln-dried for added durability. Highly resilient fabrics surpass durability standards with a rub count of over 100,000. Seat firmness Soft. On a scale from 1 to 5 5 being firmest , it's a 2. Fully assembled. No assembly required. Fits through doorways 32'' or wider. Please measure your elevator, doors, etc. to ensure smooth delivery.
