combined_text: Product: Delaney 5-Seat Modular Sofa Chaise with Storage Ottomans - Moss Green 1. Category: Sofas. Description: 5-PIECE MODULAR SOFA WITH LARGER SEATS - CHITA modular couches feature clean and classic design with comfortable and wider seats to offer you a never ending relax after a long day. Each seat has a 34'' seat width - 30 larger than most counterparts. Individual seat dimension 34''W x 21.5''D x 18.5''H. Only three seats are needed to achieve a 112'' overall width. REARRANGEABLE FOR ANY OCCASION - Available in multiple configurations, the modular pieces can be easily rearranged to fit both small and spacious living rooms, family rooms, basement playrooms, etc. To accommodate different occasions and gatherings, the modular combination allows you to pull the armless chair out as a standalone piece. A DIVE INTO COMFORT - Comfort is intimate and personal. With CHITA modular sofas, comfort is a feeling that there is nowhere else you want to be. The sofa frame is luxuriously padded with high density foam and topped by loose cushions. Soft, reversible back cushions and arm pillows are padded with a soft blend of fiber. Cozy, non-reversible seat cushions have fiber-wrapped, high-resiliency foam, which is CertiPur-US certified. Cushions can be easily fluffed to maintain a clean look. Seat firmness medium. On a scale from 1 to 5 5 being firmest , it's a 3. IDEAL FOR BUSY HOMES - Engineered for homes with lots of activities, these durable fabrics take a good beating from over use and continue to look like new. The linen-like fabric is soft to the touch and has variegated chenille yarns that create a heathered appearance. Fabrics are OEKO-TEX certified, containing no formaldehyde or harmful phthalates. Every component of these fabrics has been tested for harmful substances and the fabrics are harmless for human health. PREMIUM QUALITY - Each CHITA modular piece is made by the skilled hands of artisans who have melted functionality and design. combined_text: Product: Errol Power Swivel Nursery Glider Recliner - Khaki. Category: Recliners. Description: Premium Nursery Glider Elevate your nursery experience with the CHITA Nursery Glider Recliner. Designed for mothers, it features a 270-degree swivel, glide, and quiet power recline, easily operated with a button. The 90-135 recline angle offers flexibility for maximum comfort. Built with a durable Leggett Platt mechanism, it supports up to 350 lbs., ensuring long-lasting durability and stability. A no-sag spring platform provides both support and comfort. The high-quality metal reclining mechanism, combined with a UL-certified actuator, ensures stability and smooth reclining at the touch of a button. Comfortable in All Positions Experience superior comfort with rounded armrests for enhanced support during feeding. Raise the fully padded footrest independently of the backrest to reduce leg pressure and achieve the most comfortable TV viewing posture. When fully reclined, the swivel recliner reaches a 135 angle, perfect for napping. The removable lumbar pillow provides additional waist support when lying down and can be placed under the armrest for extra support during breastfeeding. Exquisite Detail Design Thoughtful design meets convenience with side pockets on the armrests, ideal for storing a laptop, bottles, or small items. USB and Type-C charging ports are built into the swivel glider recliner's activation button, providing easy access to charge your devices and enhance daily life with added convenience. Family-Friendly Features Crafted from FSC-certified wood, the solid wood base is gentle on floors, ensuring stability and protection for your home. Fully enclosed armrests prevent bumps and scratches, creating a safer environment for children and adults alike. Overall Dimension 37.8''D x 34.3''W x 39.4''H. Seat Dimension 21.7'D x 22.4''W x 19.7''H. Weight Capacity 350 lbs. Recommended Seater Height 5'1"-5.9'. Seat firmness medium. On a scale from 1 to 5 5 being firmest , it's a 3. Simple Assembly Tool free assembly. Simply slide the backrest into the seat, connect the wires, plug in and voila. Comes in 1 box which fits through doorways 27'' or wider. Removable back also allows for easy lifting and maneuvering through doorways. Warranty You are buckled up with our one-year warranty on mechanism and wood frame. If you have any questions, please contact our professional customer support team. We will give you a satisfactory solution.. Price Category: mid-range

combined_text: Product: Delaney 5-Seat Modular Sofa Chaise with Storage Ottomans - Milo Linen 1. Category: Sofas. Description: 5-PIECE MODULAR SOFA WITH LARGER SEATS - CHITA modular couches feature clean and classic design with comfortable and wider seats to offer you a never ending relax after a long day. Each seat has a 34'' seat width - 30 larger than most counterparts. Individual seat dimension 34''W x 21.5''D x 18.5''H. Only three seats are needed to achieve a 112'' overall width. REARRANGEABLE FOR ANY OCCASION - Available in multiple configurations, the modular pieces can be easily rearranged to fit both small and spacious living rooms, family rooms, basement playrooms, etc. To accommodate different occasions and gatherings, the modular combination allows you to pull the armless chair out as a standalone piece. A DIVE INTO COMFORT - Comfort is intimate and personal. With CHITA modular sofas, comfort is a feeling that there is nowhere else you want to be. The sofa frame is luxuriously padded with high density foam and topped by loose cushions. Soft, reversible back cushions and arm pillows are padded with a soft blend of fiber. Cozy, non-reversible seat cushions have fiber-wrapped, high-resiliency foam, which is CertiPur-US certified. Cushions can be easily fluffed to maintain a clean look. Seat firmness medium. On a scale from 1 to 5 5 being firmest , it's a 3. IDEAL FOR BUSY HOMES - Engineered for homes with lots of activities, these durable fabrics take a good beating from over use and continue to look like new. The linen-like fabric is soft to the touch and has variegated chenille yarns that create a heathered appearance. Fabrics are OEKO-TEX certified, containing no formaldehyde or harmful phthalates. Every component of these fabrics has been tested for harmful substances and the fabrics are harmless for human health. PREMIUM QUALITY - Each CHITA modular piece is made by the skilled hands of artisans who have melted functionality and design. Sturdy corner blocked wooden frame is expertly crafted from solid engineered wood and hard wood. All wood is kiln-dried for added durability. High-gauge sinuous springs and synthetic webbing suspension provide additional support for seat and back cushions. Weight capacity for each seat 350 lbs. CARE INSTRUCTIONS - For non-removable areas, blot and spot clean immediately with a clean, absorbent cloth and a water-free stain remover Cleaning Code S . Cushion covers are dry clean only. MINIMUM TOOL FREE ASSEMBLY REQUIRED - No extra tools are needed for assembly. Each assembly step is simple and intuitive.Note Do not start the assembly process until all boxes are present. Do not open all boxes at once. Start with Arms Box and follow detailed instructions. FIVE PACKAGES - The 4-piece modular sofa comes with 5 boxes and may arrive at different dates. Each box is designed and packaged to maximize shipping efficiency and fits narrow staircase and elevator. Minimum door width 18''Box 1 ArmsBox 2 Left seat backrest Box 3 Right seat backrestBox 4 Armless chair Box 5 Ottoman. Price Category: luxury

combined_text: Product: Janice Power Swivel Nursery Glider Recliner with Power Headrest - Dove gray. Category: Recliners. Description: Premium Dual-Motor Nursery Glider This nursery swivel glider recliner goes beyond the typical nursery chair, prioritizing mom's comfort. It is equipped with a dual-motor control system, 270-degree swivel and glide capabilities, and a power headrest support, providing unparalleled comfort and support in all positions. The chair features a patented Leggett Platt mechanism that has successfully passed an extensive 25,000-cycle life test and can support up to 350 lbs., ensuring long-lasting durability and stability. A no-sag spring platform ensures both support and comfort. The high-quality metal reclining mechanism, along with a UL-certified actuator, offers stability and smooth reclining at the touch of a button. Comfortable in All Positions The armrests of this baby glider chair are designed with a concave arc in the middle, making the mother's arms more comfortable when breastfeeding. You can also raise the fully padded footrest without reclining the backrest to take pressure off your legs, achieving your most comfortable TV-watching position. When fully reclined, the chair reaches a 135 opening angle, perfect for napping. As you lounge, you can independently adjust the electric headrest to cradle your head and neck. This ensures optimal support during naps or short breaks, helping you achieve a more restorative rest. Additionally, the removable lumbar pillow provides support for the mother's waist when lying down and can be positioned under the armrest for added support during breastfeeding. Power Headrest Our nursery glider recliner is equipped with a power headrest feature that can be easily adjusted via the multi-function button, allowing you and your baby to find the most comfortable position. The power headrest adjusts the head support angle to suit your preference. When watching TV or using electronic devices, adjusting the headrest angle optimizes your line of sight and enhances the overall audio-visual experience. Exquisite Detail Design The chair is equipped with built-in USB and Type-C charging ports for easy charging of your mobile phone. These ports are conveniently located on the reclining activator button. The solid wood base is floor-friendly, ensuring stability and protection for your floors. Overall Dimension 38.6''D x 33.1''W x 42.1''H. Seat Dimension 22.2'D x 22.4''W x 20.9''H. Weight Capacity 350 lbs. Recommended Seater Height 5'1"-6'. Seat firmness medium. On a scale from 1 to 5 5 being firmest , it's a 3. Simple Assembly Tool free assembly. Simply slide the backrest into the seat, connect the wires, plug in and voila. Comes in 1 box which fits through doorways 28.6'' or wider. Removable back also allows for easy lifting and maneuvering through doorways.. Price Category: mid-range

combined_text: Product: Neta Modern Boucle Upholstered Platform Bed, Full Queen Sizes - Queen. Category: Bed. Description: Modern design - a wide headboard and a clean frame, supported by rounded pillar legs. These cylindrical posts add a smooth geometric beauty to the entire bed. Easy to clean this bed features BOUCLE-style jacquard fabric that is soft and comfortable. It has a waterproof function, so you don t have to worry about water stains on the light-colored fabric. The bed frame boasts a sturdy wooden construction, It features seven solid rubberwood leg contact points with the floor, ensuring optimal stability. The full-size frame can support a maximum weight of 700 lbs, whereas the queen-size frame is capable of bearing up to 800 lbs. This bed frame is suitable for 8-10 inch mattresses. The queen bed has 14 slats spaced 2.9 inches apart, making it compatible with any type of mattress, whether it s a spring mattress, memory foam mattress, latex mattress, or hybrid mattress. Adding EVA foam sound insulation in the middle rail. This provides a better sleep experience Easy to assemble, The instructions are simple to follow . It can be put together in just 60 minutes, and we suggest having two people to expedite the process. Two-Box Shipment. Facilitating the convenient transport of larger items into your home, though the boxes may not arrive simultaneously. Fabric is certified by OEKO-TEX, containing no formaldehyde or harmful phthalates. Every component of this fabric has been tested for harmful substances and that the fabric therefore is harmless for human health Simple assembly is required. The queen size bed comes in two separate boxes. one box is 66.5" L x 40.1" W x 3.9" H the other is 83.5" L x 20.5" W x 10.2" H.Should you have any questions, please don't hesitate to contact our professional customer support team. We are dedicated to providing you with a satisfactory solution.. Price Category: mid-range

combined_text: Product: Delaney Power Functional Storage Console - Fossil Gray. Category: Sofas. Description: SPACIOUS VERSATILE STORAGE CONSOLE - Storage Console with Cupholders USB, a perfect blend of modern style and functionality. This versatile console in a soft feeling is crafted from high-quality polyester fabric, wood, engineered wood, foam, and steel. Its modular design offers versatile seating options, making it an ideal addition to any living space. Easy-to-Clean Plastic Storage The unit features a plastic storage compartment that is easy to clean and ideal for holding books, remotes, iPads, snacks, and charging cables. Dual Hidden Cup Holders Features two hidden cup holders designed for convenient access and secure placement of beverages. Effortless Charging at Your Fingertips Lift the lid to stay connected with our versatile console. Featuring 2 AC outlets, 1 USB port, and 1 Type-C port, it allows you to easily charge your laptop, lamp, phone, tablet, and more while sitting on the sofa. Wooden Tabletop Design The wooden tabletop not only enhances elegance but also provides practical space for displaying and organizing items. SEATS THAT DO NOT SLIDE APART - In addition to non-slip legs, strong metal connectors come with each seat to keep different seats together from bottom, creating a connected couch that doesn't slip or slide apart. Note Ottoman is a standalone piece and cannot be attached to any seat with metal connectors. CARE INSTRUCTIONS - For non-removable areas, blot and spot clean immediately with a clean, absorbent cloth and a water-free stain remover Cleaning Code S . Cushion covers are dry clean only. MINIMUM TOOL FREE ASSEMBLY REQUIRED - No extra tools are needed for assembly. Each assembly step is simple and intuitive.. Price Category: budget

combined_text: Product: James Modern Genuine Leather Power Swivel Glider Recliner - Genuine Leather-Top Grain Leather Light Gray. Category: Recliners. Description: Design Stylish This electric swivel recliner features a stylish design, with simple and smooth lines creating a modern aesthetic. The staggered gussets and curves in front of the armrests add intricate details to the product. It seamlessly fits into study rooms, living rooms, bedrooms, and other spaces, effortlessly enhancing the ambiance of the space. It is the ideal choice for both home and office settings. Customized for Your Comfort Our power glider recliner combines a 270-degree swivel and smooth glide with ergonomic support. The double-layer backrest cradles your head and lumbar, while curved armrests provide natural arm support. when the chair is in the upright position, the backrest remains straight, perfect for sitting and reading. You can also raise the fully padded footrest without reclining the backrest to reduce leg pressure and achieve the most comfortable TV viewing posture. In the fully reclined position, the recliner opens up to a maximum angle of 135 degrees, perfect for naps Memory foam The seat cushion is lined with a layer of memory foam, which provides responsive cushioning and contours to your body, gently conforming to your hips. Its slow-rebound properties evenly distribute pressure, ensuring ultimate comfort. Convenient Design The swivel glider recliner is designed with convenience in mind. It features pockets on both sides of the armrests, which can hold a 14-inch laptop, books, remote controls, etc., helping you save space. Additionally, built-in USB Type-C charging ports allow for easy charging of your mobile phone and are accessibly located on the reclining activator button, providing you with added convenience in your daily life. Top Grain Leather Premium top-grain leather covers all areas you touch when sitting and is easy to clean. The top of padded seat, front of backrest, top and inside of the armrests are all covered in top-grain leather, which feels good to the touch and is highly durable. The outside and backside feature matching faux leather. Durability Certified Materials It incorporates a patented Leggett Platt mechanism that has successfully passed an extensive 25,000-cycle life test and can support up to 350 lbs, guaranteeing long-lasting durability and stability. A no-sag spring platform ensures support and comfort. Overall Dimension 33.9''W x 38.2''D x 40.9''H. Seat Dimension 22.8''W x 21.3'D x 18.9''H. Weight Capacity 350 lbs. Recommended Seater Height 5'1"-6'. Seat firmness medium. On a scale from 1 to 5 5 being firmest , it's a 3. Simple Assembly Tool free assembly. Simply slide the backrest into the seat, connect the wires, plug in and voila. Comes in 1 box which fits through doorways 30'' or wider. Removable back also allows for easy lifting and maneuvering through doorways. Warranty You are buckled up with our one-year warranty on mechanism and wood frame. If you have any questions, please contact our professional customer support team. We will give you a satisfactory solution.. Price Category: mid-range

Category: Sofas.
Description: SPACIOUS VERSATILE STORAGE CONSOLE.
Storage Console with Cupholders USB, a perfect blend of modern style and functionality.
This versatile console in a soft feeling is crafted from high-quality polyester fabric, wood, engineered wood, foam, and steel.
Its modular design offers versatile seating options, making it an ideal addition to any living space.
Easy-to-Clean Plastic Storage The unit features a plastic storage compartment that is easy to clean and ideal for holding books, remotes, iPads, snacks, and charging cables.
Dual Hidden Cup Holders Features two hidden cup holders designed for convenient access and secure placement of beverages.
Effortless Charging at Your Fingertips Lift the lid to stay connected with our versatile console.
Featuring AC outlets, USB port, and Type-C port, it allows you to easily charge your laptop, lamp, phone, tablet, and more while sitting on the sofa.
Wooden Tabletop Design The wooden tabletop not only enhances elegance but also provides practical space for displaying and organizing items.
SEATS THAT DO NOT SLIDE APART.
In addition to non-slip legs, strong metal connectors come with each seat to keep different seats together from bottom, creating a connected couch that doesn't slip or slide apart.
Note Ottoman is a standalone piece and cannot be attached to any seat with metal connectors.
CARE INSTRUCTIONS.
For non-removable areas, blot and spot clean immediately with a clean, absorbent cloth and a water-free stain remover Cleaning Code S .
Cushion covers are dry clean only.
MINIMUM TOOL FREE ASSEMBLY REQUIRED.
No extra tools are needed for assembly.
Each assembly step is simple and intuitive.
Price Category: budget

combined_text: Product: Garrison Genuine Leather Power Lay Flat Recliner with Power Headrest - Genuine Leather-Top Grain Leather Brown. Category: Recliners. Description: Customize Your Comfort Our power recliners are equipped with a dual motor system to provide you with unparalleled comfort and support in any position. In the upright position, the backrest remains straight, making it ideal for sitting and reading. In the fully reclined position, the modern leather recliner offers a maximum recline angle of up to 165 degrees, making it perfect for taking a nap. The power headrest can be independently adjusted to support your head and neck, allowing you to easily read or watch TV while reclined. Lay Flat The correct lying posture can help relieve muscle pressure, especially for people who sit for long periods of time. The lay-flat recliner allows you to recline completely flat, improving blood circulation and providing complete relaxation for your body and mind. It is the best choice for your lunch break or a nap. Top Grain Leather Premium top-grain leather covers everywhere you touch and is easy to clean. The padded seat, backrest, and inside of the armrests are covered in top-grain leather, which feels good to the touch and is highly durable, while the outside and backside feature matching faux leather. Leather is a natural product both texture and color will vary slightly from hide to hide. Stretch marks, scars, and insect bites may be visible, proving the high quality and natural characteristics of the leather. Convenient Design The recliner is designed with convenience in mind. It features pockets and cup holders on both sides of the armrests. The pockets can hold a 14-inch laptop, books, or other small items, while the dual cup holders are perfect for holding drinks and snacks while you watch a movie or play games. combined_text: Product: Skyline Power Console - Cream. Category: Sofas. Description: Skyline Motion sofa Modern Aesthetic, Upgraded Comfort, for a Zero-Gravity Home Experience. Skyline lives up to its name by providing a versatile array of design choices, from linear to corner configurations, adaptable to any living space and personal style. This sofa ingeniously fuses comfort with contemporary elegance, making it an unparalleled choice for living rooms of all dimensions. Skyline adopts a high back design, which is full and round, fitting the human body curve. It is padded with a soft blend of fiber, providing you with comprehensive support from neck to waist. The specially designed fixed lumbar pillow effectively supports the waist, relieves fatigue from long periods of sitting, and allows you to relax your body and mind. The seat cushion is filled with a combination of sponge, a soft blend of fiber, and sterilized feathers mixed in scientific proportions. It is soft and fluffy without losing support, perfectly wrapping the buttocks and providing a comfortable sitting experience like sitting on a cloud. Whether watching a movie, reading or taking a nap, you can be immersed in it. Furthermore, Skyline features modular components that are easy to move and can be configured in various ways. This makes it suitable for both small and spacious living rooms. The zero gravity feature of this sofa is ergonomically designed to position your body in an evenly distributed manner, reducing pressure points and providing superior comfort. This type of sofa mimics the position astronauts take during liftoff on space missions. When fully reclined, it can elevate your legs slightly above your heart. The purpose is to create a sense of weightlessness, which not only reduces heart pressure and improves blood circulation, but also relieves back pain and enhances lung capacity. Upon pressing the activation button, the sofa's footrest gracefully elevates, allowing you to settle into a supremely comfortable position for reading or watching TV. As you unwind, the power headrest can be adjusted independently to cradle your head and neck perfectly, making it ideal for those moments of relaxation while lying down. Whether you're engrossed in a book, enjoying your favorite show, or drifting off to sleep, this feature ensures unparalleled comfort and convenience. An enveloping design is elegantly paired with exquisite handcrafted details, such as the distinctive stitching on the seat and headrest, which imbue it with character and a sense of exclusivity. Skyline offers unparalleled versatility and modularity, along with cutting-edge features that set it apart from the rest. Seat firmness Soft. On a scale from 1 to 5 5 being firmest , it's a 3. Fabric The boucle fabric, with its textured, looped yarn, creates a cozy and inviting feel. The cream color adds sophistication and timelessness to the piece, making it a perfect fit for any decor style. Engineered for busy homes with lots of activities, these fabrics take a good beating from over use and continue to look like new because of the incredible durability. Fabrics are certified by OEKO-TEX Standard 100 and suitable for high-traffic use tested up to 100,000 rubs , containing no formaldehyde or harmful phthalates. Every component of these fabrics has been tested for harmful substances and the fabrics are harmless for human health. Multifunctional Console Multifunctional Console Effortlessly integrates storage solutions, built-in power outlets, wireless charging capabilities, hidden cup holders, and more infusing your living room with a touch of refined elegance and functionality. Built-in USB and Type-C charging ports allow for easy charging of your mobile phone and are conveniently located in the storage compartment. Hidden stainless steel cup holders can be easily removed and cleaned. Frame FSC certified engineered pine and plywood frame. The high-quality metal reclining mechanism and UL-certified actuator offer not only comfort and stability but also recline quietly and smoothly with the push of a button. Sturdy corner blocked wooden frame is expertly crafted from solid engineered wood and hard wood. All wood is kiln-dried for added durability. Frame support system features no-sag springs and is sustained by flexible elastic webbing. The deck is luxuriously padded with CertiPur-US foam and topped with a polyfiber and feather blend. Caution Fits through doorways 32'' or wider. Please measure your elevator, doors, etc. to ensure smooth delivery. Box dimension Power Left Chair 40.6'' x 38.2'' x 29.9'' Power Right Chair 40.6'' x 38.2'' x 29.9'' Armless Chair 38.2'' x 31.5'' x 29.9'' Power Armless Chair 38.2'' x 31.5'' x 29.9'' Wedge 62.6'' x 41.7'' x 31.5'' Console 38.2'' x 14.2'' x 34.3''. Price Category: mid-range

Skyline lives up to its name by providing a versatile array of design choices, from linear to corner configurations, adaptable to any living space and personal style. This sofa ingeniously fuses comfort with contemporary elegance, making it an unparalleled choice for living rooms of all dimensions. Skyline adopts a high back design, which is full and round, fitting the human body curve. It is padded with a soft blend of fiber, providing you with comprehensive support from neck to waist. The specially designed fixed lumbar pillow effectively supports the waist, relieves fatigue from long periods of sitting, and allows you to relax your body and mind. The seat cushion is filled with a combination of sponge, a soft blend of fiber, and sterilized feathers mixed in scientific proportions. It is soft and fluffy without losing support, perfectly wrapping the buttocks and providing a comfortable sitting experience like sitting on a cloud. Whether watching a movie, reading or taking a nap, you can be immersed in it. Furthermore, Skyline features modular components that are easy to move and can be configured in various ways. This makes it suitable for both small and spacious living rooms. The zero gravity feature of this sofa is ergonomically designed to position your body in an evenly distributed manner, reducing pressure points and providing superior comfort. This type of sofa mimics the position astronauts take during liftoff on space missions. When fully reclined, it can elevate your legs slightly above your heart. The purpose is to create a sense of weightlessness, which not only reduces heart pressure and improves blood circulation, but also relieves back pain and enhances lung capacity. Upon pressing the activation button, the sofa's footrest gracefully elevates, allowing you to settle into a supremely comfortable position for reading or watching TV. As you unwind, the power headrest can be adjusted independently to cradle your head and neck perfectly, making it ideal for those moments of relaxation while lying down. Whether you're engrossed in a book, enjoying your favorite show, or drifting off to sleep, this feature ensures unparalleled comfort and convenience. An enveloping design is elegantly paired with exquisite handcrafted details, such as the distinctive stitching on the seat and headrest, which imbue it with character and a sense of exclusivity. Skyline offers unparalleled versatility and modularity, along with cutting-edge features that set it apart from the rest. Seat firmness Soft. On a scale from 1 to 5 5 being firmest , it's a 3. Fabric The boucle fabric, with its textured, looped yarn, creates a cozy and inviting feel. The cream color adds sophistication and timelessness to the piece, making it a perfect fit for any decor style. Engineered for busy homes with lots of activities, these fabrics take a good beating from over use and continue to look like new because of the incredible durability. Fabrics are certified by OEKO-TEX Standard 100 and suitable for high-traffic use tested up to 100,000 rubs , containing no formaldehyde or harmful phthalates. Every component of these fabrics has been tested for harmful substances and the fabrics are harmless for human health. Multifunctional Console Multifunctional Console Effortlessly integrates storage solutions, built-in power outlets, wireless charging capabilities, hidden cup holders, and more infusing your living room with a touch of refined elegance and functionality. Built-in USB and Type-C charging ports allow for easy charging of your mobile phone and are conveniently located in the storage compartment. Hidden stainless steel cup holders can be easily removed and cleaned. Frame FSC certified engineered pine and plywood frame. The high-quality metal reclining mechanism and UL-certified actuator offer not only comfort and stability but also recline quietly and smoothly with the push of a button. Sturdy corner blocked wooden frame is expertly crafted from solid engineered wood and hard wood. All wood is kiln-dried for added durability. Frame support system features no-sag springs and is sustained by flexible elastic webbing. The deck is luxuriously padded with CertiPur-US foam and topped with a polyfiber and feather blend. Caution Fits through doorways 32'' or wider. Please measure your elevator, doors, etc. to ensure smooth delivery. Box dimension Power Left Chair 40.6'' x 38.2'' x 29.9'' Power Right Chair 40.6'' x 38.2'' x 29.9'' Armless Chair 38.2'' x 31.5'' x 29.9'' Power Armless Chair 38.2'' x 31.5'' x 29.9'' Wedge 62.6'' x 41.7'' x 31.5'' Console 38.2'' x 14.2'' x 34.3''. Price Category: premium

Skyline lives up to its name by providing a versatile array of design choices, from linear to corner configurations, adaptable to any living space and personal style.
This sofa ingeniously fuses comfort with contemporary elegance, making it an unparalleled choice for living rooms of all dimensions.
Skyline adopts a high back design, which is full and round, fitting the human body curve.
It is padded with a soft blend of fiber, providing you with comprehensive support from neck to waist.
The specially designed fixed lumbar pillow effectively supports the waist, relieves fatigue from long periods of sitting, and allows you to relax your body and mind.
The seat cushion is filled with a combination of sponge, a soft blend of fiber, and sterilized feathers mixed in scientific proportions.
It is soft and fluffy without losing support, perfectly wrapping the buttocks and providing a comfortable sitting experience like sitting on a cloud.
Whether watching a movie, reading or taking a nap, you can be immersed in it.
Furthermore, Skyline features modular components that are easy to move and can be configured in various ways.
This makes it suitable for both small and spacious living rooms.
The zero gravity feature of this sofa is ergonomically designed to position your body in an evenly distributed manner, reducing pressure points and providing superior comfort.
This type of sofa mimics the position astronauts take during liftoff on space missions.
When fully reclined, it can elevate your legs slightly above your heart.
The purpose is to create a sense of weightlessness, which not only reduces heart pressure and improves blood circulation, but also relieves back pain and enhances lung capacity.
Upon pressing the activation button, the sofa's footrest gracefully elevates, allowing you to settle into a supremely comfortable position for reading or watching TV.
As you unwind, the power headrest can be adjusted independently to cradle your head and neck perfectly, making it ideal for those moments of relaxation while lying down.
Whether you're engrossed in a book, enjoying your favorite show, or drifting off to sleep, this feature ensures unparalleled comfort and convenience.
An enveloping design is elegantly paired with exquisite handcrafted details, such as the distinctive stitching on the seat and headrest, which imbue it with character and a sense of exclusivity.
Skyline offers unparalleled versatility and modularity, along with cutting-edge features that set it apart from the rest.
Seat firmness Soft.
On a scale from to being firmest , it's a .
Fabric The boucle fabric, with its textured, looped yarn, creates a cozy and inviting feel.
The cream color adds sophistication and timelessness to the piece, making it a perfect fit for any decor style.
Engineered for busy homes with lots of activities, these fabrics take a good beating from over use and continue to look like new because of the incredible durability.
Fabrics are certified by OEKO-TEX Standard and suitable for high-traffic use tested up to , rubs , containing no formaldehyde or harmful phthalates.
Every component of these fabrics has been tested for harmful substances and the fabrics are harmless for human health.

Multifunctional Console Multifunctional Console Effortlessly integrates storage solutions, built-in power outlets, wireless charging capabilities, hidden cup holders, and more infusing your living room with a touch of refined elegance and functionality.
Built-in USB and Type-C charging ports allow for easy charging of your mobile phone and are conveniently located in the storage compartment.
Hidden stainless steel cup holders can be easily removed and cleaned.
Frame FSC certified engineered pine and plywood frame.
The high-quality metal reclining mechanism and UL-certified actuator offer not only comfort and stability but also recline quietly and smoothly with the push of a button.
Sturdy corner blocked wooden frame is expertly crafted from solid engineered wood and hard wood.
All wood is kiln-dried for added durability.
Frame support system features no-sag springs and is sustained by flexible elastic webbing.
The deck is luxuriously padded with CertiPur-US foam and topped with a polyfiber and feather blend.
Caution Fits through doorways '' or wider.
Please measure your elevator, doors, etc.
to ensure smooth delivery.

With a 3-motor control system, it delivers unparalleled comfort and support in all positions. In the upright position, the backrest remains straight, making it great for sitting and reading. You can also raise the fully padded footrest without reclining the backrest, relieving pressure on your legs and achieving your most comfortable TV-watching position. In the fully reclined position, the chair is perfect for taking a nap. The power headrest can be independently adjusted to support your head and neck, making it easy to read or watch TV while reclined. The power lumbar support can be independently adjusted to support your lower back and reduce lumbar pressure. Power Lumbar Support By offering additional lower back support, power lumbar systems effectively reduce pressure on the spine and muscles, alleviating discomfort from prolonged sitting. Whether watching TV, reading a book, or taking a nap, power lumbar supports significantly enhance the overall comfort experience of seating furniture with a more ergonomic design approach. Power Headrest Support The power headrest offers adjustable settings to cater to individual preferences. It provides enhanced support for healthier rest during naps or short breaks. Additionally, when watching TV or using electronic devices, adjusting the headrest angle optimizes the line of sight and enhances the overall audio-visual experience. Durability Certified Materials It incorporates a patented Leggett Platt mechanism that has successfully passed an extensive 25,000-cycle life test and can support up to 350 lbs, guaranteeing long-lasting durability and stability. A no-sag spring platform ensures support and comfort. Convenient Design The recliner is designed with convenience in mind. It features pockets on both sides of the armrests, which can hold a 14-inch laptop, books, remote controls, etc., helping you save space. Additionally, built-in USB Type-C charging ports allow for easy charging of your mobile phone and are accessibly located on the reclining activator button, providing you with added convenience in your daily life. Top Grain Leather Premium top-grain leather covers all areas you touch when sitting and is easy to clean. The top of padded seat, front of backrest, top and inside of the armrests are all covered in top-grain leather, which feels good to the touch and is highly durable. The outside and backside feature matching faux leather. Overall Dimension 37''D x 31.1''W x 40.9''H. Seat Dimension 21.3'D x 22.8''W x 19.7''H. Weight Capacity 350 lbs. Recommended Seater Height 5'1"-6'. Seat firmness medium. On a scale from 1 to 5 5 being firmest , it's a 3. Simple Assembly Tool free assembly. Simply slide the backrest into the seat, connect the wires, plug in and voila. Comes in 1 box which fits through doorways 32.5'' or wider. Removable back also allows for easy lifting and maneuvering through doorways. Warranty You are buckled up with our one-year warranty on mechanism and wood frame. If you have any questions, please contact our professional customer support team. We will give you a satisfactory solution.. Price Category: premium

combined_text: Product: Skyline 5-Seat Zero Gravity Reclining Sectional sofa with Power Headrest - 4 Note Corner-side seats can't recline simultaneously 0. Category: Sofas. Description: Skyline Motion sofa Modern Aesthetic, Upgraded Comfort, for a Zero-Gravity Home Experience. Skyline lives up to its name by providing a versatile array of design choices, from linear to corner configurations, adaptable to any living space and personal style. This sofa ingeniously fuses comfort with contemporary elegance, making it an unparalleled choice for living rooms of all dimensions. Skyline adopts a high back design, which is full and round, fitting the human body curve. It is padded with a soft blend of fiber, providing you with comprehensive support from neck to waist. The specially designed fixed lumbar pillow effectively supports the waist, relieves fatigue from long periods of sitting, and allows you to relax your body and mind. The seat cushion is filled with a combination of sponge, a soft blend of fiber, and sterilized feathers mixed in scientific proportions. It is soft and fluffy without losing support, perfectly wrapping the buttocks and providing a comfortable sitting experience like sitting on a cloud. Whether watching a movie, reading or taking a nap, you can be immersed in it. Furthermore, Skyline features modular components that are easy to move and can be configured in various ways. This makes it suitable for both small and spacious living rooms. The zero gravity feature of this sofa is ergonomically designed to position your body in an evenly distributed manner, reducing pressure points and providing superior comfort. This type of sofa mimics the position astronauts take during liftoff on space missions. When fully reclined, it can elevate your legs slightly above your heart. The purpose is to create a sense of weightlessness, which not only reduces heart pressure and improves blood circulation, but also relieves back pain and enhances lung capacity. Upon pressing the activation button, the sofa's footrest gracefully elevates, allowing you to settle into a supremely comfortable position for reading or watching TV. As you unwind, the power headrest can be adjusted independently to cradle your head and neck perfectly, making it ideal for those moments of relaxation while lying down. Whether you're engrossed in a book, enjoying your favorite show, or drifting off to sleep, this feature ensures unparalleled comfort and convenience. An enveloping design is elegantly paired with exquisite handcrafted details, such as the distinctive stitching on the seat and headrest, which imbue it with character and a sense of exclusivity. Skyline offers unparalleled versatility and modularity, along with cutting-edge features that set it apart from the rest. Seat firmness Soft. On a scale from 1 to 5 5 being firmest , it's a 3. Fabric The boucle fabric, with its textured, looped yarn, creates a cozy and inviting feel. The cream color adds sophistication and timelessness to the piece, making it a perfect fit for any decor style. Engineered for busy homes with lots of activities, these fabrics take a good beating from over use and continue to look like new because of the incredible durability. Fabrics are certified by OEKO-TEX Standard 100 and suitable for high-traffic use tested up to 100,000 rubs , containing no formaldehyde or harmful phthalates. Every component of these fabrics has been tested for harmful substances and the fabrics are harmless for human health. Multifunctional Console Multifunctional Console Effortlessly integrates storage solutions, built-in power outlets, wireless charging capabilities, hidden cup holders, and more infusing your living room with a touch of refined elegance and functionality. Built-in USB and Type-C charging ports allow for easy charging of your mobile phone and are conveniently located in the storage compartment. Hidden stainless steel cup holders can be easily removed and cleaned. Frame FSC certified engineered pine and plywood frame. The high-quality metal reclining mechanism and UL-certified actuator offer not only comfort and stability but also recline quietly and smoothly with the push of a button. Sturdy corner blocked wooden frame is expertly crafted from solid engineered wood and hard wood. All wood is kiln-dried for added durability. Frame support system features no-sag springs and is sustained by flexible elastic webbing. The deck is luxuriously padded with CertiPur-US foam and topped with a polyfiber and feather blend. Caution Fits through doorways 32'' or wider. Please measure your elevator, doors, etc. to ensure smooth delivery. Box dimension Power Left Chair 40.6'' x 38.2'' x 29.9'' Power Right Chair 40.6'' x 38.2'' x 29.9'' Armless Chair 38.2'' x 31.5'' x 29.9'' Power Armless Chair 38.2'' x 31.5'' x 29.9'' Wedge 62.6'' x 41.7'' x 31.5'' Console 38.2'' x 14.2'' x 34.3''. Price Category: luxury

It incorporates a patented Leggett Platt mechanism that has successfully passed an extensive 25,000-cycle life test and can support up to 350 lbs, guaranteeing long-lasting durability and stability. A no-sag spring platform ensures support and comfort. The high-quality metal reclining mechanism, paired with a UL-certified actuator, delivers both stability and silent, smooth reclining at the push of a button. It provides enhanced support for healthier rest during naps or short breaks. Additionally, when watching TV or using electronic devices, adjusting the headrest angle optimizes your line of sight and enhances the overall audio-visual experience. Convenient Design Built-in USB and Type-C charging ports allow for easy charging of your mobile phone and are conveniently located on the reclining activator button. What's more, it comes with a built-in nightlight that illuminates the area underneath, making it ideal for late-night feedings or when you want to peek in on the baby without waking them up. Seat firmness Medium. On a scale from 1 to 5 5 being firmest , it's a 3. Ergonomic Design Cuddle up for naptime and baby bonding in the luxurious comfort of our Dream Deluxe Glider. The Lulla features an extra layer of soft padding on the armrests, perfect for keeping your baby comfortably asleep or for breastfeeding while reclining. The power headrest offers adjustable settings to cater to individual preferences and provides enhanced support for healthier rest during naps or short breaks. combined_text: Product: Maxwell Genuine Leather Swivel Glider Recliner with Power Lumbar Headrest - Genuine Leather-Top Grain Leather Saddle. Category: Recliners. Description: Triple Motor Recliner, Customized for Your Comfort Our power glider recliner is meticulously designed, featuring 270-degree swivel and gliding functions. With a 3-motor control system, it delivers unparalleled comfort and support in all positions. In the upright position, the backrest remains straight, making it great for sitting and reading. You can also raise the fully padded footrest without reclining the backrest, relieving pressure on your legs and achieving your most comfortable TV-watching position. In the fully reclined position, the chair is perfect for taking a nap. The power headrest can be independently adjusted to support your head and neck, making it easy to read or watch TV while reclined. The power lumbar support can be independently adjusted to support your lower back and reduce lumbar pressure. Power Lumbar Support By offering additional lower back support, power lumbar systems effectively reduce pressure on the spine and muscles, alleviating discomfort from prolonged sitting. Whether watching TV, reading a book, or taking a nap, power lumbar supports significantly enhance the overall comfort experience of seating furniture with a more ergonomic design approach. Power Headrest Support The power headrest offers adjustable settings to cater to individual preferences. It provides enhanced support for healthier rest during naps or short breaks. Additionally, when watching TV or using electronic devices, adjusting the headrest angle optimizes the line of sight and enhances the overall audio-visual experience. Durability Certified Materials It incorporates a patented Leggett Platt mechanism that has successfully passed an extensive 25,000-cycle life test and can support up to 350 lbs, guaranteeing long-lasting durability and stability. A no-sag spring platform ensures support and comfort. Convenient Design The recliner is designed with convenience in mind. It features pockets on both sides of the armrests, which can hold a 14-inch laptop, books, remote controls, etc., helping you save space. Additionally, built-in USB Type-C charging ports allow for easy charging of your mobile phone and are accessibly located on the reclining activator button, providing you with added convenience in your daily life. Top Grain Leather Premium top-grain leather covers all areas you touch when sitting and is easy to clean. The top of padded seat, front of backrest, top and inside of the armrests are all covered in top-grain leather, which feels good to the touch and is highly durable. The outside and backside feature matching faux leather. Overall Dimension 37''D x 31.1''W x 40.9''H. Seat Dimension 21.3'D x 22.8''W x 19.7''H. Weight Capacity 350 lbs. Recommended Seater Height 5'1"-6'. Seat firmness medium. On a scale from 1 to 5 5 being firmest , it's a 3. Simple Assembly Tool free assembly. Simply slide the backrest into the seat, connect the wires, plug in and voila. Comes in 1 box which fits through doorways 32.5'' or wider. Removable back also allows for easy lifting and maneuvering through doorways. Warranty You are buckled up with our one-year warranty on mechanism and wood frame. If you have any questions, please contact our professional customer support team. We will give you a satisfactory solution.. Price Category: premium

combined_text: Product: Skyline 4-Seat Zero Gravity Reclining Sectional sofa with Power Headrest - 3 Note Corner-side seats can't recline simultaneously 0. Category: Sofas. Description: Skyline Motion sofa Modern Aesthetic, Upgraded Comfort, for a Zero-Gravity Home Experience. Skyline lives up to its name by providing a versatile array of design choices, from linear to corner configurations, adaptable to any living space and personal style. This sofa ingeniously fuses comfort with contemporary elegance, making it an unparalleled choice for living rooms of all dimensions. Skyline adopts a high back design, which is full and round, fitting the human body curve. It is padded with a soft blend of fiber, providing you with comprehensive support from neck to waist. The specially designed fixed lumbar pillow effectively supports the waist, relieves fatigue from long periods of sitting, and allows you to relax your body and mind. The seat cushion is filled with a combination of sponge, a soft blend of fiber, and sterilized feathers mixed in scientific proportions. It is soft and fluffy without losing support, perfectly wrapping the buttocks and providing a comfortable sitting experience like sitting on a cloud. Whether watching a movie, reading or taking a nap, you can be immersed in it. Furthermore, Skyline features modular components that are easy to move and can be configured in various ways. This makes it suitable for both small and spacious living rooms. The zero gravity feature of this sofa is ergonomically designed to position your body in an evenly distributed manner, reducing pressure points and providing superior comfort. This type of sofa mimics the position astronauts take during liftoff on space missions. When fully reclined, it can elevate your legs slightly above your heart. The purpose is to create a sense of weightlessness, which not only reduces heart pressure and improves blood circulation, but also relieves back pain and enhances lung capacity. Upon pressing the activation button, the sofa's footrest gracefully elevates, allowing you to settle into a supremely comfortable position for reading or watching TV. As you unwind, the power headrest can be adjusted independently to cradle your head and neck perfectly, making it ideal for those moments of relaxation while lying down. Whether you're engrossed in a book, enjoying your favorite show, or drifting off to sleep, this feature ensures unparalleled comfort and convenience. An enveloping design is elegantly paired with exquisite handcrafted details, such as the distinctive stitching on the seat and headrest, which imbue it with character and a sense of exclusivity. Skyline offers unparalleled versatility and modularity, along with cutting-edge features that set it apart from the rest. Seat firmness Soft. On a scale from 1 to 5 5 being firmest , it's a 3. Fabric The boucle fabric, with its textured, looped yarn, creates a cozy and inviting feel. The cream color adds sophistication and timelessness to the piece, making it a perfect fit for any decor style. Engineered for busy homes with lots of activities, these fabrics take a good beating from over use and continue to look like new because of the incredible durability. Fabrics are certified by OEKO-TEX Standard 100 and suitable for high-traffic use tested up to 100,000 rubs , containing no formaldehyde or harmful phthalates. Every component of these fabrics has been tested for harmful substances and the fabrics are harmless for human health. Multifunctional Console Multifunctional Console Effortlessly integrates storage solutions, built-in power outlets, wireless charging capabilities, hidden cup holders, and more infusing your living room with a touch of refined elegance and functionality. Built-in USB and Type-C charging ports allow for easy charging of your mobile phone and are conveniently located in the storage compartment. Hidden stainless steel cup holders can be easily removed and cleaned. Frame FSC certified engineered pine and plywood frame. The high-quality metal reclining mechanism and UL-certified actuator offer not only comfort and stability but also recline quietly and smoothly with the push of a button. Sturdy corner blocked wooden frame is expertly crafted from solid engineered wood and hard wood. All wood is kiln-dried for added durability. Frame support system features no-sag springs and is sustained by flexible elastic webbing. The deck is luxuriously padded with CertiPur-US foam and topped with a polyfiber and feather blend. Caution Fits through doorways 32'' or wider. Please measure your elevator, doors, etc. to ensure smooth delivery. Box dimension Power Left Chair 40.6'' x 38.2'' x 29.9'' Power Right Chair 40.6'' x 38.2'' x 29.9'' Armless Chair 38.2'' x 31.5'' x 29.9'' Power Armless Chair 38.2'' x 31.5'' x 29.9'' Wedge 62.6'' x 41.7'' x 31.5'' Console 38.2'' x 14.2'' x 34.3''. Price Category: luxury

This makes it suitable for both small and spacious living rooms. The zero gravity feature of this sofa is ergonomically designed to position your body in an evenly distributed manner, reducing pressure points and providing superior comfort. This type of sofa mimics the position astronauts take during liftoff on space missions. When fully reclined, it can elevate your legs slightly above your heart. The purpose is to create a sense of weightlessness, which not only reduces heart pressure and improves blood circulation, but also relieves back pain and enhances lung capacity. Upon pressing the activation button, the sofa's footrest gracefully elevates, allowing you to settle into a supremely comfortable position for reading or watching TV. combined_text: Product: Maxwell Genuine Leather Swivel Glider Recliner with Power Lumbar Headrest - Genuine Leather-Top Grain Leather Light Gray. Category: Recliners. Description: Triple Motor Recliner, Customized for Your Comfort Our power glider recliner is meticulously designed, featuring 270-degree swivel and gliding functions. With a 3-motor control system, it delivers unparalleled comfort and support in all positions. In the upright position, the backrest remains straight, making it great for sitting and reading. You can also raise the fully padded footrest without reclining the backrest, relieving pressure on your legs and achieving your most comfortable TV-watching position. In the fully reclined position, the chair is perfect for taking a nap. The power headrest can be independently adjusted to support your head and neck, making it easy to read or watch TV while reclined. The power lumbar support can be independently adjusted to support your lower back and reduce lumbar pressure. Power Lumbar Support By offering additional lower back support, power lumbar systems effectively reduce pressure on the spine and muscles, alleviating discomfort from prolonged sitting. Whether watching TV, reading a book, or taking a nap, power lumbar supports significantly enhance the overall comfort experience of seating furniture with a more ergonomic design approach. Power Headrest Support The power headrest offers adjustable settings to cater to individual preferences. It provides enhanced support for healthier rest during naps or short breaks. Additionally, when watching TV or using electronic devices, adjusting the headrest angle optimizes the line of sight and enhances the overall audio-visual experience. Durability Certified Materials It incorporates a patented Leggett Platt mechanism that has successfully passed an extensive 25,000-cycle life test and can support up to 350 lbs, guaranteeing long-lasting durability and stability. A no-sag spring platform ensures support and comfort. Convenient Design The recliner is designed with convenience in mind. It features pockets on both sides of the armrests, which can hold a 14-inch laptop, books, remote controls, etc., helping you save space. Additionally, built-in USB Type-C charging ports allow for easy charging of your mobile phone and are accessibly located on the reclining activator button, providing you with added convenience in your daily life. Top Grain Leather Premium top-grain leather covers all areas you touch when sitting and is easy to clean. The top of padded seat, front of backrest, top and inside of the armrests are all covered in top-grain leather, which feels good to the touch and is highly durable. The outside and backside feature matching faux leather. Overall Dimension 37''D x 31.1''W x 40.9''H. Seat Dimension 21.3'D x 22.8''W x 19.7''H. Weight Capacity 350 lbs. Recommended Seater Height 5'1"-6'. Seat firmness medium. On a scale from 1 to 5 5 being firmest , it's a 3. Simple Assembly Tool free assembly. Simply slide the backrest into the seat, connect the wires, plug in and voila. Comes in 1 box which fits through doorways 32.5'' or wider. Removable back also allows for easy lifting and maneuvering through doorways. Warranty You are buckled up with our one-year warranty on mechanism and wood frame. If you have any questions, please contact our professional customer support team. We will give you a satisfactory solution.. Price Category: premium

It features an attractive birch wood base that ensures stability and adds visual appeal.
Upholstered in textured boucle and chenille fabric, it introduces a fresh aesthetic and magical tactile experience, promising both softness and durability.
Whether used as dining or desk chairs, the removable casters hidden beneath the wooden plinth allow for smooth rolling across any setting.
Sturdy Construction Certified Materials.
Frame is expertly crafted from solid engineered wood and hard wood.
All wood is kiln-dried for added durability.
Premium high density foam topped with polyester fiber offer comfort and durability.
Foam is environmentally friendly with the seal of approval certified by CertiPUR-US.
Price Category: premium

combined_text: Product: Henry Swivel Accent Chair with Electric Footrests Charging Ports - Fabric Light Gray. Category: Recliners. Description: Comfort The power recliner chair's clean and simple silhouette recalls the look of 20th-century modernism. It complements any decor and is versatile enough for your living area or bedroom, boasting a 270-degree swivel functionality. The high-quality metal reclining mechanism, paired with a UL-certified actuator, delivers both stability and silent, smooth reclining at the push of a button. Relaxation in Multiple Positions In the upright position, the cushion back remains straight up, making it great for sitting and reading. You can also raise the fully padded footrest without reclining the backrest to relieve pressure on your legs, achieving your most comfortable TV-watching position. Convenient Charging Built-in USB Type-C charging ports allow for easy charging of your mobile phone and are accessibly located on the reclining activator button. Reversible Cushions All cushions are loose and reversible, featuring zip-off, dry-cleanable covers. Pillowy-soft back cushion is padded with soft fiber and can be easily fluffed to maintain a clean look. Sturdy Construction Certified Materials Each piece is hand-made by master craftsmen using corner blocked wooden frame. The high quality metal reclining mechanism and UL certified actuator offer not only comfort and stability but recline quietly and smoothly with a push of button. Seat firmness medium. On a scale from 1 to 5 5 being firmest , it's a 3. No assembly required. Overall Dimension 35''D x 29.5''W x 34.6''H. Seat Dimension 22''D x 23.6''W x 20.1''H. Weight Capacity 350 lbs. Recommended Seater Height 4'10''-5'10". Warranty You are buckled up with our one-year warranty on mechanism and wood frame. If you have any questions, please contact our professional customer support team. We will give you a satisfactory solution.. Price Category: mid-range

combined_text: Product: Jolie Performance Boucle Swivel Accent Chair - Boucl Sand. Category: Accent Chair. Description: Cozy Swivel Boucle Chair - With its curved, padded back and seat, this accent chair was built for lingering. Understated 360 degree swivel seating features an armless sleek modern profile and is ideal for conversation corners or arranged in multiples. OEKO-Certified Performance Boucle Fabric - Textured fabric is easy to clean, soft, and durable engineered with stain-resistant and moisture-resistant technology to withstand everyday living. Formaldehyde is not detected in our fabric. Care instruction Spot clean with upholstery shampoo, foam from a mild detergent, or mild dry cleaning solvent. Cloud-Like Comfort - Seat cushion is padded with dense foam and topped with a soft blend of fiber and sterilized feathers to offer supreme comfort and plushness. On a scale from 1 to 5 5 being firmest , it's a 2. Seat cushion is fixed and not removable. Sturdy Construction Certified Materials - Frame is expertly crafted from solid engineered wood and hard wood. All wood is kiln-dried for added durability. Synthetic webbing suspension and premium high density foam topped with polyester fiber offer comfort and durability. Foam is environmentally friendly with the seal of approval certified by CertiPUR-US. Overall Product Dimension 30.3''D x 28.7''W x 29.1''H. Seat Dimension 22.4''D x 26.4''W x 19.7''H. Weight capacity 350 lbs.. Price Category: mid-range

combined_text: Product: Sophia 3-Piece Feather Power Modular Sofa with Electric Footrests - 3. Category: Sofas. Description: 3-PIECE MODULAR SOFA WITH LARGER SEATS - CHITA modular couches feature clean and classic design with comfortable and wider seats to offer you a never ending relax after a long day. Each seat has a 34'' seat width - 30 larger than most counterparts. Individual seat dimension 34''W x 20.5''D x 20''H. Only three seats are needed to achieve a 114'' overall width. REARRANGEABLE FOR ANY OCCASION - Available in multiple configurations, the modular pieces can be easily rearranged to fit both small and spacious living rooms, family rooms, basement playrooms, etc. To accommodate different occasions and gatherings, the modular combination allows you to pull the armless chair out as a standalone piece. A DIVE INTO COMFORT - Comfort is intimate and personal. With CHITA modular sofas, comfort is a feeling that there is nowhere else you want to be. The sofa frame is luxuriously padded with high density foam, which is CertiPur-US certified, and topped by loose cushions. Soft, reversible cushions and arm pillows are padded with a soft blend of fiber and sterilized feather. Cushions can be easily fluffed to maintain a clean look. Seat firmness medium plush. On a scale from 1 to 5 5 being firmest , it's a 2. IDEAL FOR BUSY HOMES - Engineered for homes with lots of activities, these durable fabrics take a good beating from over use and continue to look like new. The luxurious look fabric that creates a casual vibe in your room and gives you everyday comfort.. Fabrics are OEKO-TEX certified, containing no formaldehyde or harmful phthalates. Every component of these fabrics has been tested for harmful substances and the fabrics are harmless for human health. 100 FSC CERTIFIED WOOD FRAME- Each CHITA modular piece is made by the skilled hands of artisans who have melted functionality and design. Sturdy corner blocked wooden frame is expertly crafted from solid engineered wood and hard wood. All wood is kiln-dried for added durability. High-gauge sinuous springs and synthetic webbing suspension provide additional support for seat and back cushions. Weight capacity for each seat 350 lbs. FEATHER FILLED REVERSIBLE CUSHIONS - Pillowy-soft cushions are padded with a soft blend of fiber and sterilized feathers with down proof ticking. All cushions are loose and reversible, featuring zip-off, dry-cleanable covers. Cushions can be easily fluffed to maintain a clean look. CARE INSTRUCTIONS - For non-removable areas, blot and spot clean immediately with a clean, absorbent cloth and a water-free stain remover Cleaning Code S . Cushion covers are dry clean only. MINIMUM TOOL FREE ASSEMBLY REQUIRED - No extra tools are needed for assembly. Each assembly step is simple and intuitive.Note Do not start the assembly process until all boxes are present. Do not open all boxes at once. Start with Arms Box and follow detailed instructions. FOUR PACKAGES - The 3-piece modular sofa comes with 4 boxes and may arrive on different dates. Each box is designed and packaged to maximize shipping efficiency and fits narrow staircase and elevator. Minimum door width 20''Box 1 ArmsBox 2 Left seat backrest Box 3 Right seat backrestBox 4 Armless chair. Price Category: luxury

When you ease into the reclining position, the seat moves forward but leaves no gap between the back and seat. The back of the recliner doesn't bump against wall or whatever is placed behind it. Reliable Comfort with Power Headrest As you lounge, the power headrest can be independently adjusted to support your head and neck, allowing you to read or watch TV while reclined. The waterfall chaise takes pressure off tired legs, while the contoured seat allows you to sit comfortably for as long as you like. Convenient Charging Built-in USB Type-C charging ports allow for easy charging of your mobile phone and are accessibly located on the reclining activator button. Sturdy Construction Certified Materials Each piece is hand-made by master craftsmen using corner blocked wooden frame. Description: 3-PIECE MODULAR SOFA WITH LARGER SEATS - CHITA modular couches feature clean and classic design with comfortable and wider seats to offer you a never ending relax after a long day. Each seat has a 34'' seat width - 30 larger than most counterparts. Individual seat dimension 34''W x 20.5''D x 20''H. Only three seats are needed to achieve a 114'' overall width. REARRANGEABLE FOR ANY OCCASION - Available in multiple configurations, the modular pieces can be easily rearranged to fit both small and spacious living rooms, family rooms, basement playrooms, etc. To accommodate different occasions and gatherings, the modular combination allows you to pull the armless chair out as a standalone piece. A DIVE INTO COMFORT - Comfort is intimate and personal. With CHITA modular sofas, comfort is a feeling that there is nowhere else you want to be. The sofa frame is luxuriously padded with high density foam, which is CertiPur-US certified, and topped by loose cushions. Soft, reversible cushions and arm pillows are padded with a soft blend of fiber and sterilized feather. Cushions can be easily fluffed to maintain a clean look. Seat firmness medium plush. On a scale from 1 to 5 5 being firmest , it's a 2. IDEAL FOR BUSY HOMES - Engineered for homes with lots of activities, these durable fabrics take a good beating from over use and continue to look like new. The luxurious look fabric that creates a casual vibe in your room and gives you everyday comfort.. Fabrics are OEKO-TEX certified, containing no formaldehyde or harmful phthalates. Every component of these fabrics has been tested for harmful substances and the fabrics are harmless for human health. 100 FSC CERTIFIED WOOD FRAME- Each CHITA modular piece is made by the skilled hands of artisans who have melted functionality and design. Sturdy corner blocked wooden frame is expertly crafted from solid engineered wood and hard wood. All wood is kiln-dried for added durability. High-gauge sinuous springs and synthetic webbing suspension provide additional support for seat and back cushions. Weight capacity for each seat 350 lbs. FEATHER FILLED REVERSIBLE CUSHIONS - Pillowy-soft cushions are padded with a soft blend of fiber and sterilized feathers with down proof ticking. All cushions are loose and reversible, featuring zip-off, dry-cleanable covers. Cushions can be easily fluffed to maintain a clean look. CARE INSTRUCTIONS - For non-removable areas, blot and spot clean immediately with a clean, absorbent cloth and a water-free stain remover Cleaning Code S . Cushion covers are dry clean only. MINIMUM TOOL FREE ASSEMBLY REQUIRED - No extra tools are needed for assembly. Each assembly step is simple and intuitive.Note Do not start the assembly process until all boxes are present. Do not open all boxes at once. Start with Arms Box and follow detailed instructions. FOUR PACKAGES - The 3-piece modular sofa comes with 4 boxes and may arrive on different dates. Each box is designed and packaged to maximize shipping efficiency and fits narrow staircase and elevator. Minimum door width 20''Box 1 ArmsBox 2 Left seat backrest Box 3 Right seat backrestBox 4 Armless chair. Price Category: premium

combined_text: Product: Ohana Modular Corner Seat - Milo Linen. Category: Sofas. Description: Oversized sectional sofa creates maximum comfort, in addition to modular pieces that make dreams come true, which are easy to move around and can be effortlessly rearranged to fit both small and spacious living rooms. Extra deep and wide seat is perfect for curling up with your loved ones to read a book, watch a movie, or simply relax. Pillowy-soft cushions are padded with a soft blend of fiber and sterilized feathers with down proof ticking. All cushions are loose and reversible, featuring zip-off, machine-washable covers. Cushions can be easily fluffed to maintain a clean look. Double-stacked pillowy seats and loose cushions add much more comfort, making you feel like you are surrounded by clouds. Removable back cushion to adjust the seat depth to match different seating needs. Comfortable in All Positions In the up-right position, the cushion back is straight up, making it great for sitting and reading. You can also raise the fully padded footrest without reclining the backrest to take pressure off your legs, achieving your most comfortable TV-watching position. In the fully reclined position, the chair lies flat, perfect for taking a nap. This wall hugger recliner, also known as a wall saver or zero clearance recliner, is specially designed to take up less space than traditional reclining chairs. Zero-gravity is designed to position your body in a way that evenly distributes your weight across the chair, reducing pressure points and providing superior comfort. The idea is to give you a feeling of weightlessness, which can relieve stress on the body and improve circulation. Built-in USB Type-C charging ports allow for easy charging of your mobile phone and are accessibly located on the reclining activator button. Hidden anti-slip legs to prevent sliding apart. Seat firmness Soft. On a scale from 1 to 5 5 being firmest , it's a 2. Free White Glove Service Packages will be brought into the home, placed in the room of your choice, fully assembled and all packaging will be removed.. Price Category: premium

combined_text: Product: Liam 6-Piece Overstuffed Feather Wood Base Sectional Sofa - Milo Linen U-Shape. Category: Sofas. Description: 6-Piece Oversized Modular Sofa with Chaise - CHITA oversized modular sectional offers maximum comfort with its modular pieces that make dreams come true. These pieces feature extra deep seats, are easy to move around, and can be effortlessly rearranged to fit both small and spacious living rooms. Individual seat dimension 35''W x 23.6''D x 19.7''H. Only four seats are needed to achieve a 153'' overall width. Solid Wood Plinth Base - The exposed wood frame is made of solid, kiln-dried wood for extra durability. A perfect blend of retro and mid-century modern vibes, this sofa is a welcome addition to any sophisticated home decor. Additionally, the solid wooden high-leg design allows a robot vacuum to easily pass through, keeping the home clean and tidy. Overstuffed Feather-Blend Cushions - Seat cushions are filled with 2.0 high-density foam and sterilized feathers. Foam is environmentally friendly with the seal of approval certified by CertiPUR-US. Back cushions are filled with soft fiber and sterilized feathers. Cushions are loose with zip-off covers. Cushions can be easily fluffed to maintain a clean look. Seat firmness medium. On a scale from 1 to 5 5 being firmest , it's a 3. Ideal for Busy Homes - Engineered for homes with lots of activities, these durable fabrics take a good beating from over use and continue to look like new. The linen-like fabric is soft to the touch and has variegated chenille yarns that create a heathered appearance. Fabrics are OEKO-TEX certified, containing no formaldehyde or harmful phthalates. Every component of these fabrics has been tested for harmful substances and the fabrics are harmless for human health. Premium Quality - Each CHITA modular piece is made by the skilled hands of artisans who have melted functionality and design. Sturdy corner blocked wooden frame is expertly crafted from solid engineered wood and hard wood. All wood is kiln-dried for added durability. High-gauge sinuous springs and synthetic webbing suspension provide additional support for seat and back cushions. Weight capacity for each seat 350 lbs. Seats That Do Not Slide Apart - Strong metal connectors come with each seat to keep different seats together from the bottom, creating a connected couch that doesn't slip or slide apart. CARE INSTRUCTIONS - For non-removable areas, blot and spot clean immediately with a clean, absorbent cloth and a water-free stain remover Cleaning Code S . Cushion covers are dry clean only. MINIMUM TOOL FREE ASSEMBLY REQUIRED - No extra tools are needed for assembly. Each assembly step is simple and intuitive.Note Do not start the assembly process until all boxes are present. Do not open all boxes at once. Start with Arms Box and follow detailed instructions. Seven Packages - The U-shaped modular sofa comes with 7 boxes and may arrive at different dates. Each box is designed and packaged to maximize shipping efficiency and fits narrow staircase and elevator. Minimum door width 16''Box 1 ArmsBox 2 Left Chair Seat Backrest Box 3 Right Chair Seat BackrestBox 4 Armless chair Box 5 Armless chairBox 6 Ottoman Box 7 Ottoman. Price Category: luxury

combined_text: Product: Elysian Power Swivel Nursery Glider Recliner with Adjustable Headrest - Chenille Contrast Luxe White. Category: Recliners. Description: Comfort The power recliner chair is thoughtfully crafted to prioritize Mom's comfort, boasting a 270-degree swivel and glide functionality. The high-quality metal reclining mechanism, paired with a UL-certified actuator, delivers both stability and silent, smooth reclining at the push of a button. Durability Certified Materials This chair is far from your typical nursery chair. It incorporates a patented Leggett Platt mechanism that has successfully passed an extensive 25,000-cycle life test and can support up to 350 lbs, guaranteeing long-lasting durability and stability. A no-sag spring platform ensures support and comfort. Comfortable in All Positions In the upright position, the cushion back is straight up, making it great for sitting and reading. You can also raise the fully padded footrest without reclining the backrest to take pressure off your legs, achieving your most comfortable TV-watching position. In the fully reclined position, the chair is perfect for taking a nap. As you lounge, the power headrest can be independently adjusted to support your head and neck, allowing you to read or watch TV while reclined. The waterfall chaise takes pressure off tired legs, while the contoured seat allows you to sit comfortably for as long as you like. Relaxation Convenient Charging The Power Glider Swivel Rocker Recliner Chair includes an extended footrest for complete relaxation, making it perfect for activities such as watching television, sleeping, and reading. The double-layer backrest features bagged and channeled polyester fiber to maintain its shape. Built-in USB charging ports allow for easy charging of your mobile phone and are conveniently located on the reclining activator button. Overall Dimension 38.6''D x 32.7''W x 41.7''H. Seat Dimension 21.3'D x 22.4''W x 19.3''H. Weight Capacity 350 lbs. Recommended Seater Height 5'1"-6'. Simple Assembly Tool free assembly. Simply slide the backrest into the seat, connect the wires, plug in and voila. Comes in 1 box which fits through doorways 31'' or wider. Removable back also allows for easy lifting and maneuvering through doorways. Warranty You are buckled up with our one-year warranty on mechanism and wood frame. If you have any questions, please contact our professional customer support team. We will give you a satisfactory solution.. Price Category: mid-range

In the fully reclined position, the chair lies flat, perfect for taking a nap. This wall hugger recliner, also known as a wall saver or zero clearance recliner, is specially designed to take up less space than traditional reclining chairs. Zero-gravity is designed to position your body in a way that evenly distributes your weight across the chair, reducing pressure points and providing superior comfort. The idea is to give you a feeling of weightlessness, which can relieve stress on the body and improve circulation. Built-in USB Type-C charging ports allow for easy charging of your mobile phone and are accessibly located on the reclining activator button. Hidden anti-slip legs to prevent sliding apart. Extra deep and wide seat is perfect for curling up with your loved ones to read a book, watch a movie, or simply relax.
Pillowy-soft cushions are padded with a soft blend of fiber and sterilized feathers with down proof ticking.
All cushions are loose and reversible, featuring zip-off, machine-washable covers.
Cushions can be easily fluffed to maintain a clean look.
Double-stacked pillowy seats and loose cushions add much more comfort, making you feel like you are surrounded by clouds.
Removable back cushion to adjust the seat depth to match different seating needs.
Comfortable in All Positions In the up-right position, the cushion back is straight up, making it great for sitting and reading.
You can also raise the fully padded footrest without reclining the backrest to take pressure off your legs, achieving your most comfortable TV-watching position.
In the fully reclined position, the chair lies flat, perfect for taking a nap.
This wall hugger recliner, also known as a wall saver or zero clearance recliner, is specially designed to take up less space than traditional reclining chairs.
Zero-gravity is designed to position your body in a way that evenly distributes your weight across the chair, reducing pressure points and providing superior comfort.
The idea is to give you a feeling of weightlessness, which can relieve stress on the body and improve circulation.
Built-in USB Type-C charging ports allow for easy charging of your mobile phone and are accessibly located on the reclining activator button.
Hidden anti-slip legs to prevent sliding apart.
Seat firmness Soft.
On a scale from to being firmest , it's a .
Free White Glove Service Packages will be brought into the home, placed in the room of your choice, fully assembled and all packaging will be removed.
Price Category: luxury

combined_text: Product: Liam 2-Piece Overstuffed Feather Wood Base Sectional Sofa - Milo Linen. Category: Sofas. Overall sofa dimension 83''W x 38''D x 33''H. Solid Wood Plinth Base - The exposed wood frame is made of solid, kiln-dried wood for extra durability. A perfect blend of retro and mid-century modern vibes, this sofa is a welcome addition to any sophisticated home decor. Ideal for Busy Homes - Engineered for homes with lots of activities, these durable fabrics take a good beating from over use and continue to look like new.
