combined_text: Product: Aurora Power Swivel Nursery Glider Recliner - Fabric Oatmeal. Category: Recliners. Description: Amelia nursery recliner offers a comfortable spot for you and your little one to bond and relax. This power recliner provides the ultimate relaxation with its 270 swivel and gentle gliding motion. Upholstered in a soft-touch fabric, it features a solid wood round base and classic roll arms for an elegant look. Amelia features a power reclining mechanism, allowing you to extend the footrest for complete relaxation. Whether you're feeding, reading, watching TV, sleeping, or just relaxing, it offers maximum comfort and convenience. In the upright position, the back is straight up, making it great for sitting, feeding, and reading. You can also raise the fully padded footrest without reclining the backrest to take pressure off your legs, achieving your most comfortable TV-watching position. In the fully reclined position, the chair is perfect for taking a nap. Ideal for nurseries or living rooms, Amelia comes with a removable lumbar pillow that provides extra support to your lower back, allowing for enhanced comfort during leisure moments. Seat firmness Medium. On a scale from 1 to 5 5 being firmest , it's a 3. Amelia is not your average nursery chair. It features a patented Leggett Platt mechanism that has passed a rigorous 25,000-cycle life test and can support up to 350 lbs, ensuring long-lasting durability and stability.The solid wood base is more friendly to your floor and offers better value. The built-in USB and Type-C charging ports make it easy to charge your mobile devices. Plus, assembly is simple tool-free assembly. Just slide the back into the seat, and you're ready to go. Amelia has ample seat depth and a wide backrest, making it more accommodating to your body shape. Overall Dimension 31.9"W x 39.4"D x 39.8"H. Seat Dimension 22.4"W x 22.4"D x 20.9"H. Weight Capacity 350 lbs. Recommended Seater Height 5'-5'10". Eco-friendly The foam is environmentally friendly and certified by CertiPUR-US. The fabric is OEKO-TEX Certified, and the wood used in the frame of this recliner comes from well-managed, FSC -certified forests. The FSC label means that the wood has been harvested to benefit communities, wildlife, and the environment. Warranty You are buckled up with our one-year warranty on mechanism and wood frame. If you have any questions, please contact o ur professional customer support team. We will give you a satisfactory solution.. Price Category: mid-range

combined_text: Product: Elysian Power Swivel Nursery Glider Recliner with Adjustable Headrest - Hopsack Premium Blend Ivory. Category: Recliners. Description: Comfort The power recliner chair is thoughtfully crafted to prioritize Mom's comfort, boasting a 270-degree swivel and glide functionality. You can also raise the fully padded footrest without reclining the backrest to take pressure off your legs, achieving your most comfortable TV-watching position. In the fully reclined position, the chair is perfect for taking a nap. As you lounge, the power headrest can be independently adjusted to support your head and neck, allowing you to read or watch TV while reclined. The waterfall chaise takes pressure off tired legs, while the contoured seat allows you to sit comfortably for as long as you like. Relaxation Convenient Charging The Power Glider Swivel Rocker Recliner Chair includes an extended footrest for complete relaxation, making it perfect for activities such as watching television, sleeping, and reading. The double-layer backrest features bagged and channeled polyester fiber to maintain its shape. Built-in USB charging ports allow for easy charging of your mobile phone and are conveniently located on the reclining activator button. Overall Dimension 38.6''D x 32.7''W x 41.7''H. If you have any questions, please contact our professional customer support team. We will give you a satisfactory solution.. Price Category: mid-range

Description: Oversized Armless Chair - Clean and classic design with extra deep seat to offer you a never ending relax after a long day. Individual seat dimension 35''W x 23.6''D x 19.7''H. Overall dimension 35''W x 38''D x 33''H. Solid Wood Plinth Base - The exposed wood frame is made of solid, kiln-dried wood for extra durability. A perfect blend of retro and mid-century modern vibes, this sofa is a welcome addition to any sophisticated home decor. Additionally, the solid wooden high-leg design allows a robot vacuum to easily pass through, keeping the home clean and tidy. Overstuffed Feather-Blend Cushions - Seat cushions are filled with 2.0 high-density foam and sterilized feathers. Foam is environmentally friendly with the seal of approval certified by CertiPUR-US. Back cushions are filled with soft fiber and sterilized feathers. Cushions are loose with zip-off covers. Cushions can be easily fluffed to maintain a clean look. Seat firmness medium. On a scale from 1 to 5 5 being firmest , it's a 3. Ideal for Busy Homes - Engineered for homes with lots of activities, these durable fabrics take a good beating from over use and continue to look like new. The linen-like fabric is soft to the touch and has variegated chenille yarns that create a heathered appearance. Fabrics are OEKO-TEX certified, containing no formaldehyde or harmful phthalates. Every component of these fabrics has been tested for harmful substances and the fabrics are harmless for human health. Premium Quality - Each CHITA modular piece is made by the skilled hands of artisans who have melted functionality and design. Sturdy corner blocked wooden frame is expertly crafted from solid engineered wood and hard wood. All wood is kiln-dried for added durability. High-gauge sinuous springs and synthetic webbing suspension provide additional support for seat and back cushions. Weight capacity for each seat 350 lbs. CARE INSTRUCTIONS - For non-removable areas, blot and spot clean immediately with a clean, absorbent cloth and a water-free stain remover Cleaning Code S . Cushion covers are dry clean only. MINIMUM TOOL FREE ASSEMBLY REQUIRED - No extra tools are needed for assembly. Each assembly step is simple and intuitive. One Package - The armless chair comes with 1 box and is packaged to maximize shipping efficiency and fits narrow staircase and elevator. Minimum door width 14''Box 1 Armless chair. Price Category: mid-range

combined_text: Product: Oliver 3-Seat Wall-hugger Reclining Sectional Sofa with Power Headrest - 3 2 Creamy Gray. Category: Sofas. Description: Oliver is designed with a low-slung, boxy silhouette that offers maximum comfort, making any space look instantly sleek and modern. Oliver boasts extra-large seat depth and width, perfect for snuggling up with loved ones to read, watch a movie, or just relax. It can bring you the ultimate comfort. In addition, Oliver has modular components that are easy to move and can be configured in different ways. It is suitable for both small and spacious living rooms. Oliver's back and seat cushions are padded with a soft blend of fiber and sterilized feathers, ensuring both support and enhanced comfort. The combination of these filling materials creates an enveloping feeling that allows you to completely relax. Oliver is equipped with an adjustable headrest, allowing you to meet different needs for better support of the back and neck. When you are reading or watching a movie, you can also lift the footrest without tilting the backrest to achieve the most comfortable TV viewing position. In the fully reclined position, it lays flat for naps. Oliver is specially designed as a zero-wall recliner to take up less space than traditional items. Better than a wall hugger, it can be placed directly against the wall and optimizes the available space. When you ease into the reclining position, the seat moves forward but leaves no gap between the back and seat. The back of the recliner doesn't bump against the wall or anything placed behind it. Built-in USB Type-C charging ports allow for easy charging of your mobile phone and are accessibly located on the reclining activator button. Oliver collection includes metal connectors for keeping components securely interlocked. It is not modular and is not designed to stand alone. Seat firmness Soft. On a scale from 1 to 5 5 being firmest , it's a 2.. Price Category: luxury

combined_text: Product: Liam Overstuffed Feather Modular Corner Seat - Fossil Gray. Category: Ottoman. Description: Overstuffed Feather-Blend Cushions - Seat cushions are filled with 2.0 high-density foam and sterilized feathers. Foam is environmentally friendly with the seal of approval certified by CertiPUR-US. Back cushions are filled with soft fiber and sterilized feathers. Cushions are loose with zip-off covers. Cushions can be easily fluffed to maintain a clean look. Seat firmness medium. On a scale from 1 to 5 5 being firmest , it's a 3. Ideal for Busy Homes - Engineered for homes with lots of activities, these durable fabrics take a good beating from over use and continue to look like new. The linen-like fabric is soft to the touch and has variegated chenille yarns that create a heathered appearance. Fabrics are OEKO-TEX certified, containing no formaldehyde or harmful phthalates. Every component of these fabrics has been tested for harmful substances and the fabrics are harmless for human health. Premium Quality - Each CHITA modular piece is made by the skilled hands of artisans who have melted functionality and design. Sturdy corner blocked wooden frame is expertly crafted from solid engineered wood and hard wood. All wood is kiln-dried for added durability. High-gauge sinuous springs and synthetic webbing suspension provide additional support for seat and back cushions. Weight capacity for each seat 350 lbs. Seats That Do Not Slide Apart - Strong metal connectors come with each seat to keep different seats together from the bottom, creating a connected couch that doesn't slip or slide apart. CARE INSTRUCTIONS - For non-removable areas, blot and spot clean immediately with a clean, absorbent cloth and a water-free stain remover Cleaning Code S . Cushion covers are dry clean only. MINIMUM TOOL FREE ASSEMBLY REQUIRED - No extra tools are needed for assembly. Each assembly step is simple and intuitive.. Price Category: mid-range

combined_text: Product: Mila Power Swivel Nursery Glider Recliner - Fabric Cream White. Category: Recliners. Description: Design Style The oversized, organic proportions coupled with its natural wood base fit into a soft and modern palette. It features flared armrests and an overstuffed backrest to provide better support for your arms and back, allowing for greater comfort and relaxation during your leisure time. Comfort Convenience The power recliner chair features a 270-degree swivel, glide, and a quiet, smooth recline function that can be operated with the push of a button. The 90-135 recline angle offers flexibility and versatility for maximum comfort. It has built-in USB Type-C charging ports, making it easy to charge your mobile devices. Storage pockets on both sides are within your reach. Seat firmness Medium. On a scale from 1 to 5 5 being firmest , it's a 3. Durability This power recliner chair is not your average nursery chair. It features a patented Leggett Platt mechanism and a UL-certified actuator, which has passed a rigorous 25,000-cycle life test and can support up to 350 lbs, ensuring long-lasting durability and stability. The solid wood base is more friendly to your floor and offers better value. Relaxation in All Positions In the upright position, the back is straight up, making it great for sitting, feeding, and reading. You can also raise the fully padded footrest without reclining the backrest to take pressure off your legs, achieving your most comfortable TV-watching position. In the fully reclined position, the chair is perfect for taking a nap. Eco-friendly The foam is environmentally friendly and certified by CertiPUR-US. The fabric is OEKO-TEX Certified, and the wood used in the frame of this recliner comes from well-managed, FSC -certified forests. The FSC label means that the wood has been harvested to benefit communities, wildlife, and the environment. Overall Dimension 38.6''D x 37.4''W x 40.2''H. Seat Dimension 22.4'D x 22.8''W x 20.5''H. Weight Capacity 350 lbs. Recommended Seater Height 5'-6'. Simple Assembly Simply slide the backrest into the seat, connect the wires, plug in and voila. Comes in 1 box which fits through doorways 28'' or wider. Removable back also allows for easy lifting and maneuvering through doorways.. Price Category: mid-range

combined_text: Product: Oliver Power Console - Creamy Gray. Category: Sofas. Description: Oliver is designed with a low-slung, boxy silhouette that offers maximum comfort, making any space look instantly sleek and modern. Oliver boasts extra-large seat depth and width, perfect for snuggling up with loved ones to read, watch a movie, or just relax. It can bring you the ultimate comfort. In addition, Oliver has modular components that are easy to move and can be configured in different ways. It is suitable for both small and spacious living rooms. Oliver's back and seat cushions are padded with a soft blend of fiber and sterilized feathers, ensuring both support and enhanced comfort. The combination of these filling materials creates an enveloping feeling that allows you to completely relax. Oliver is equipped with an adjustable headrest, allowing you to meet different needs for better support of the back and neck. When you are reading or watching a movie, you can also lift the footrest without tilting the backrest to achieve the most comfortable TV viewing position. In the fully reclined position, it lays flat for naps. Oliver is specially designed as a zero-wall recliner to take up less space than traditional items. Better than a wall hugger, it can be placed directly against the wall and optimizes the available space. When you ease into the reclining position, the seat moves forward but leaves no gap between the back and seat. The back of the recliner doesn't bump against the wall or anything placed behind it. Built-in USB Type-C charging ports allow for easy charging of your mobile phone and are accessibly located on the reclining activator button. Oliver collection includes metal connectors for keeping components securely interlocked. It is not modular and is not designed to stand alone. Seat firmness Soft. On a scale from 1 to 5 5 being firmest , it's a 2.. Price Category: mid-range

combined_text: Product: Henry Swivel Accent Chair with Electric Footrests Charging Ports - Fabric Cream. Category: Recliners. Description: Comfort The power recliner chair's clean and simple silhouette recalls the look of 20th-century modernism. It complements any decor and is versatile enough for your living area or bedroom, boasting a 270-degree swivel functionality. The high-quality metal reclining mechanism, paired with a UL-certified actuator, delivers both stability and silent, smooth reclining at the push of a button. Relaxation in Multiple Positions In the upright position, the cushion back remains straight up, making it great for sitting and reading. You can also raise the fully padded footrest without reclining the backrest to relieve pressure on your legs, achieving your most comfortable TV-watching position. Convenient Charging Built-in USB Type-C charging ports allow for easy charging of your mobile phone and are accessibly located on the reclining activator button. Reversible Cushions All cushions are loose and reversible, featuring zip-off, dry-cleanable covers. Pillowy-soft back cushion is padded with soft fiber and can be easily fluffed to maintain a clean look. Sturdy Construction Certified Materials Each piece is hand-made by master craftsmen using corner blocked wooden frame. The high quality metal reclining mechanism and UL certified actuator offer not only comfort and stability but recline quietly and smoothly with a push of button. Seat firmness medium. On a scale from 1 to 5 5 being firmest , it's a 3. No assembly required. Overall Dimension 35''D x 29.5''W x 34.6''H. Seat Dimension 22''D x 23.6''W x 20.1''H. Weight Capacity 350 lbs. Recommended Seater Height 4'10''-5'10". Warranty You are buckled up with our one-year warranty on mechanism and wood frame. combined_text: Product: Grace 3-Seat Modular Curved Sofa Generously Sized Design - 2 0 Cream. Category: Sofas. Description: Our Grace modular sofa's sweeping curves make it a modern showstopper. With a wide variety of configurations, Grace can easily find a home in any space, whether large or small, sophisticated or casual. The deep seat offers relaxing sink-in comfort, while the loose back keeps you supported. Grace collection features a deep seat with overstuffed back cushions, offering exceptional relaxation, while its comforting curves embrace a mellow, blissed-out shape. The boucle fabric, with its textured, looped yarn, creates a cozy and inviting feel. The color adds sophistication and timelessness to the piece, making it a perfect fit for any decor style. The curved shape of the sofa provides a sense of fluidity and movement, creating a dynamic and visually interesting focal point in the room. Sturdy corner blocked wooden frame is expertly crafted from solid engineered wood and hard wood. All wood is kiln-dried for added durability. Tight seat cushion is high-resilience polyfoam with an innerspring coil system and topped with an extra layer of fiber. Pillowy-soft cushions are padded with soft polyester fiber and are loose and reversible, featuring zip-off, machine-washable covers. The cushions can be easily fluffed to maintain a clean look. The padded console features a trapezium-shaped top with a walnut veneer over engineered wood and includes gas-lift storage. The multifunctional ottoman features a walnut veneer over an engineered wood top. It can easily serve as a coffee table, and removing the top reveals hidden interior storage. Hidden anti-slip legs to prevent sliding apart. Made with FSC -certified wood. Your purchase helps support healthy forests and ecosystems worldwide for generations to come. Seat firmness Medium. On a scale from 1 to 5 5 being firmest , it's a 3. Foam is environmentally friendly with the seal of approval certified by CertiPUR-US. Weight Capacity 350 lbs per seat. Minimal assembly required. Simply attach the legs to the seat. Fits through doorways 30'' or wider.. Price Category: luxury

combined_text: Product: Sophia Power Armless Seat Module with Electric Footrest - Standard Armless Module Cream. Category: Sofas. Description: ARMLESS CHAIR - Clean and classic design with comfortable seat to offer you a never ending relax after a long day. Individual seat dimension 34''W x 35''D x 35''H. A DIVE INTO COMFORT - Comfort is intimate and personal. With CHITA modular sofas, comfort is a feeling that there is nowhere else you want to be. The sofa frame is luxuriously padded with high density foam, which is CertiPur-US certified, and topped by loose cushions. Soft, reversible cushions and arm pillows are padded with a soft blend of fiber and sterilized feather. Cushions can be easily fluffed to maintain a clean look. Seat firmness medium plush. On a scale from 1 to 5 5 being firmest , it's a 2. IDEAL FOR BUSY HOMES - Engineered for homes with lots of activities, these durable fabrics take a good beating from over use and continue to look like new. The luxurious look fabric that creates a casual vibe in your room and gives you everyday comfort.. Fabrics are OEKO-TEX certified, containing no formaldehyde or harmful phthalates. Every component of these fabrics has been tested for harmful substances and the fabrics are harmless for human health. 100 FSC CERTIFIED WOOD FRAME- Each CHITA modular piece is made by the skilled hands of artisans who have melted functionality and design. Sturdy corner blocked wooden frame is expertly crafted from solid engineered wood and hard wood. All wood is kiln-dried for added durability. High-gauge sinuous springs and synthetic webbing suspension provide additional support for seat and back cushions. Weight capacity for each seat 350 lbs. FEATHER FILLED REVERSIBLE CUSHIONS - Pillowy-soft cushions are padded with a soft blend of fiber and sterilized feathers with down proof ticking. All cushions are loose and reversible, featuring zip-off, dry-cleanable covers. Cushions can be easily fluffed to maintain a clean look. CARE INSTRUCTIONS - For non-removable areas, blot and spot clean immediately with a clean, absorbent cloth and a water-free stain remover Cleaning Code S . Cushion covers are dry clean only. MINIMUM TOOL FREE ASSEMBLY REQUIRED - No extra tools are needed for assembly. Each assembly step is simple and intuitive. ONE PACKAGE - It comes with 1 box. Minimum door width 20''. Price Category: mid-range

combined_text: Product: Mila Power Swivel Nursery Glider Recliner - Fabric Dove Gray. Category: Recliners. Description: Design Style The oversized, organic proportions coupled with its natural wood base fit into a soft and modern palette. It features flared armrests and an overstuffed backrest to provide better support for your arms and back, allowing for greater comfort and relaxation during your leisure time. Comfort Convenience The power recliner chair features a 270-degree swivel, glide, and a quiet, smooth recline function that can be operated with the push of a button. The 90-135 recline angle offers flexibility and versatility for maximum comfort. It has built-in USB Type-C charging ports, making it easy to charge your mobile devices. Storage pockets on both sides are within your reach. Seat firmness Medium. On a scale from 1 to 5 5 being firmest , it's a 3. Durability This power recliner chair is not your average nursery chair. It features a patented Leggett Platt mechanism and a UL-certified actuator, which has passed a rigorous 25,000-cycle life test and can support up to 350 lbs, ensuring long-lasting durability and stability. The solid wood base is more friendly to your floor and offers better value. Relaxation in All Positions In the upright position, the back is straight up, making it great for sitting, feeding, and reading. You can also raise the fully padded footrest without reclining the backrest to take pressure off your legs, achieving your most comfortable TV-watching position. In the fully reclined position, the chair is perfect for taking a nap. Eco-friendly The foam is environmentally friendly and certified by CertiPUR-US. The fabric is OEKO-TEX Certified, and the wood used in the frame of this recliner comes from well-managed, FSC -certified forests. The FSC label means that the wood has been harvested to benefit communities, wildlife, and the environment. Overall Dimension 38.6''D x 37.4''W x 40.2''H. Seat Dimension 22.4'D x 22.8''W x 20.5''H. Weight Capacity 350 lbs. Recommended Seater Height 5'-6'. Simple Assembly Simply slide the backrest into the seat, connect the wires, plug in and voila. Comes in 1 box which fits through doorways 28'' or wider. Removable back also allows for easy lifting and maneuvering through doorways.. Price Category: mid-range

combined_text: Product: Ohana Power Console - Fossil Gray. Category: Sofas. Description: Oversized sectional sofa creates maximum comfort, in addition to modular pieces that make dreams come true, which are easy to move around and can be effortlessly rearranged to fit both small and spacious living rooms. Extra deep and wide seat is perfect for curling up with your loved ones to read a book, watch a movie, or simply relax. Pillowy-soft cushions are padded with a soft blend of fiber and sterilized feathers with down proof ticking. All cushions are loose and reversible, featuring zip-off, machine-washable covers. Cushions can be easily fluffed to maintain a clean look. Double-stacked pillowy seats and loose cushions add much more comfort, making you feel like you are surrounded by clouds. Removable back cushion to adjust the seat depth to match different seating needs. Comfortable in All Positions In the up-right position, the cushion back is straight up, making it great for sitting and reading. You can also raise the fully padded footrest without reclining the backrest to take pressure off your legs, achieving your most comfortable TV-watching position. In the fully reclined position, the chair lies flat, perfect for taking a nap. This wall hugger recliner, also known as a wall saver or zero clearance recliner, is specially designed to take up less space than traditional reclining chairs. Zero-gravity is designed to position your body in a way that evenly distributes your weight across the chair, reducing pressure points and providing superior comfort. The idea is to give you a feeling of weightlessness, which can relieve stress on the body and improve circulation. Built-in USB Type-C charging ports allow for easy charging of your mobile phone and are accessibly located on the reclining activator button. Hidden anti-slip legs to prevent sliding apart. Seat firmness Soft. On a scale from 1 to 5 5 being firmest , it's a 2. Free White Glove Service Packages will be brought into the home, placed in the room of your choice, fully assembled and all packaging will be removed.. Price Category: mid-range

A DIVE INTO COMFORT - Comfort is intimate and personal. With CHITA modular sofas, comfort is a feeling that there is nowhere else you want to be. The sofa frame is luxuriously padded with high density foam and topped by loose cushions. Soft, reversible back cushions and arm pillows are padded with a soft blend of fiber. Cozy, non-reversible seat cushions have fiber-wrapped, high-resiliency foam, which is CertiPur-US certified. Cushions can be easily fluffed to maintain a clean look. Seat firmness medium. On a scale from 1 to 5 5 being firmest , it's a 3. IDEAL FOR BUSY HOMES - Engineered for homes with lots of activities, these durable fabrics take a good beating from over use and continue to look like new. The linen-like fabric is soft to the touch and has variegated chenille yarns that create a heathered appearance. Fabrics are OEKO-TEX certified, containing no formaldehyde or harmful phthalates. Every component of these fabrics has been tested for harmful substances and the fabrics are harmless for human health. PREMIUM QUALITY - Each CHITA modular piece is made by the skilled hands of artisans who have melted functionality and design. Sturdy corner blocked wooden frame is expertly crafted from solid engineered wood and hard wood. All wood is kiln-dried for added durability. High-gauge sinuous springs and synthetic webbing suspension provide additional support for seat and back cushions. Weight capacity for each seat 350 lbs. SEATS THAT DO NOT SLIDE APART - In addition to non-slip legs, strong metal connectors come with each seat to keep different seats together from bottom, creating a connected couch that doesn't slip or slide apart. CARE INSTRUCTIONS - For non-removable areas, blot and spot clean immediately with a clean, absorbent cloth and a water-free stain remover Cleaning Code S . Cushion covers are dry clean only. MINIMUM TOOL FREE ASSEMBLY REQUIRED - No extra tools are needed for assembly. Each assembly step is simple and intuitive.Note Do not start the assembly process until all boxes are present. Do not open all boxes at once. Start with Arms Box and follow detailed instructions. SIX PACKAGES - The 5-piece corner modular sofa comes with 7 boxes and may arrive at different dates. Each box is designed and packaged to maximize shipping efficiency and fits narrow staircase and elevator. Description: Sophisticated mixed materials features a solid hardwood frame and legs perfectly combined with boucle style fabric on the headboard, adding warmth and texture. The queen-sized model features 16 roller slats, positioned 2.7 inches apart, which offer exceptional support for all mattress types, be it spring, memory foam, latex, or hybrid. Felt sponge pads on the bottom of the four legs protect your floor from wear and minimize noise, guaranteeing a tranquil sleep. Easy to assemble The instructions are simple to follow, and we also include mini ratchet wrenches for effortless installation. It can be put together in just thirty minutes, and we suggest having two people to expedite the process. Safe and Certified Materials Our beds feature CertiPUR-US certified foam and OEKO-TEX certified fabrics, ensuring a healthy and trustworthy sleeping environment. No Box Spring Needed - Sturdy wooden slats support and extend the life of your latex, memory foam or spring mattress without the need for a box spring. Storage Space The 9.8 inch height under the bed can store some of your household items. Also the sweeper can easily pass through. Storable while easy to clean. The headboard is wrapped in Supersoft, durable fabric with a subtle weave, easy to clean, and the natural hue of cotton ball fabric creates a warm, gentle atmosphere. Simple assembly is required. The queen size bed comes in two separate boxes. one box is 83" L x 15" W x 11" H the other is 65" L x 43" W x 4" H .Should you have any questions, please don't hesitate to contact our professional customer support team. Storage Space The 9.8 inch height under the bed can store some of your household items. Also the sweeper can easily pass through. Storable while easy to clean. The headboard is wrapped in Supersoft, durable fabric with a subtle weave, easy to clean, and the natural hue of cotton ball fabric creates a warm, gentle atmosphere. Simple assembly is necessary. combined_text: Product: Delaney 5-Seat V Shaped Modular Sofa Chaise - Fossil Gray 0. Category: Sofas. Description: 5-PIECE CORNER MODULAR SOFA WITH LARGER SEATS - CHITA modular couches feature clean and classic design with comfortable and wider seats to offer you a never ending relax after a long day. Each seat has a 34'' seat width - 30 larger than most counterparts. Individual seat dimension 34''W x 21.5''D x 18.5''H. Only three seats are needed to achieve a 106'' overall width. REARRANGEABLE FOR ANY OCCASION - Available in multiple configurations, the modular pieces can be easily rearranged to fit both small and spacious living rooms, family rooms, basement playrooms, etc. To accommodate different occasions and gatherings, the modular combination allows you to pull the armless chair out as a standalone piece. A DIVE INTO COMFORT - Comfort is intimate and personal. With CHITA modular sofas, comfort is a feeling that there is nowhere else you want to be. The sofa frame is luxuriously padded with high density foam and topped by loose cushions. Soft, reversible back cushions and arm pillows are padded with a soft blend of fiber. Cozy, non-reversible seat cushions have fiber-wrapped, high-resiliency foam, which is CertiPur-US certified. Cushions can be easily fluffed to maintain a clean look. Seat firmness medium. On a scale from 1 to 5 5 being firmest , it's a 3. IDEAL FOR BUSY HOMES - Engineered for homes with lots of activities, these durable fabrics take a good beating from over use and continue to look like new. The linen-like fabric is soft to the touch and has variegated chenille yarns that create a heathered appearance. Fabrics are OEKO-TEX certified, containing no formaldehyde or harmful phthalates. Every component of these fabrics has been tested for harmful substances and the fabrics are harmless for human health. PREMIUM QUALITY - Each CHITA modular piece is made by the skilled hands of artisans who have melted functionality and design. Sturdy corner blocked wooden frame is expertly crafted from solid engineered wood and hard wood. All wood is kiln-dried for added durability. High-gauge sinuous springs and synthetic webbing suspension provide additional support for seat and back cushions. Weight capacity for each seat 350 lbs. SEATS THAT DO NOT SLIDE APART - In addition to non-slip legs, strong metal connectors come with each seat to keep different seats together from bottom, creating a connected couch that doesn't slip or slide apart. CARE INSTRUCTIONS - For non-removable areas, blot and spot clean immediately with a clean, absorbent cloth and a water-free stain remover Cleaning Code S . Cushion covers are dry clean only. MINIMUM TOOL FREE ASSEMBLY REQUIRED - No extra tools are needed for assembly. Each assembly step is simple and intuitive.Note Do not start the assembly process until all boxes are present. Do not open all boxes at once. Start with Arms Box and follow detailed instructions. SIX PACKAGES - The 5-piece corner modular sofa comes with 7 boxes and may arrive at different dates. Each box is designed and packaged to maximize shipping efficiency and fits narrow staircase and elevator. Minimum door width 20''Box 1 ArmsBox 2 Left seat backrest Box 3 Right seat backrestBox 4 Armless chair Box 5 Armless chair Box 6 Backs BoxBox 7 Seat Cushions Box. Price Category: luxury

Description: The Davin Triple Power Lift Chair is an excellent choice for a well-tailored sitting experience. Its top grain leather is soft, luxurious, and easy to clean and maintain. It features hidden slide-out cup holders on the fronts of each arm that close when not in use. Infinite-Position Power Lift Chair This lift chair recliner represents the perfect combination of style and function. In addition to offering massage and heat features, it supports true infinite positioning this enables the backrest, footrest, and headrest to move independently from one another. The triple-power reclining mechanism allows effortless angle adjustment from an upright to a fully reclined or lifted position. Sturdy Construction Certified Materials Each piece is hand-made by master craftsmen using corner blocked wooden frame. Premium top grain leather on all seating areas, the top of armrests and footrests. Hand selected matching faux leather on the sides and back. The high quality metal mechanism and UL certified actuator offer not only comfort and stability but recline quietly and smoothly with a push of button. Weight Capacity 350 lbs. Easy-To-Use Controller Convenient Charging A hand-held remote with soft-touch buttons allows you to independently adjust the footrest and backrest for custom relaxation, and can be positioned on your left or right-hand side. A built-in USB charging port enables easy charging of your mobile phone or tablet. The wired controller can be stored in the side storage pockets, which are easily accessible and large enough for your tablets or magazines. The removable lumbar pillow provides better support for the waist, catering to the varying needs of seat depth. When fully reclined, it can be used to fill the gap between the back and seat or serve as a head pillow. Easy to Clean Simply moisten a cloth lightly with water for easy wiping. Periodically, dust the surface using a clean, dry, and non-abrasive white cloth. No formaldehyde is detected. Large Size Lift Chair Overall Dimension 38.6''D x 37.8''W x 42.1''H. Comes in 3 boxes which fit through doorways 22'' or wider. Removable back and arms also allow for easy lifting and maneuvering through doorways. Description: Oversized sectional sofa creates maximum comfort, in addition to modular pieces that make dreams come true, which are easy to move around and can be effortlessly rearranged to fit both small and spacious living rooms. Extra deep and wide seat is perfect for curling up with your loved ones to read a book, watch a movie, or simply relax. Pillowy-soft cushions are padded with a soft blend of fiber and sterilized feathers with down proof ticking. All cushions are loose and reversible, featuring zip-off, machine-washable covers. Cushions can be easily fluffed to maintain a clean look. Double-stacked pillowy seats and loose cushions add much more comfort, making you feel like you are surrounded by clouds. Removable back cushion to adjust the seat depth to match different seating needs. Comfortable in All Positions In the up-right position, the cushion back is straight up, making it great for sitting and reading. You can also raise the fully padded footrest without reclining the backrest to take pressure off your legs, achieving your most comfortable TV-watching position. In the fully reclined position, the chair lies flat, perfect for taking a nap. This wall hugger recliner, also known as a wall saver or zero clearance recliner, is specially designed to take up less space than traditional reclining chairs. Zero-gravity is designed to position your body in a way that evenly distributes your weight across the chair, reducing pressure points and providing superior comfort. The idea is to give you a feeling of weightlessness, which can relieve stress on the body and improve circulation. Built-in USB Type-C charging ports allow for easy charging of your mobile phone and are accessibly located on the reclining activator button. Hidden anti-slip legs to prevent sliding apart. Seat firmness Soft. On a scale from 1 to 5 5 being firmest , it's a 2. combined_text: Product: Tracee Modern Power Swivel Glider Recliner - Fabric Amber. Category: Recliners. Description: Power Swivel Glider Designed with Mom s comfort in mind, it swivels 270 degrees , glides, and reclines quietly and smoothly with a push of button. Not An Average Nursery Chair Although not quite visible, the patented Leggett Platt mechanism really stands out. The mechanism passes 25,000-cycle life test and has a weight limit of 350 lbs. Powered mechanism also allows you to get up from the chair without waking up the baby in your arms. Not An Eye Sore Mom deserves beautiful things. Tired of husband s boxy or chunky recliners We heard you. Be prepared to receive compliments on this elegant low profile design with curved silhouette. Bonus Features Built-in USB charging ports for easy charging of your mobile devices. Fixed lumbar cushion offers extra support and keeps your room clean and tidy. Safe Sound Foam is environmentally friendly and certified by CertiPUR-US, meaning it is made without PBDEs or Tris flame retardants, heavy metals, formaldehyde, etc. Engineered wood is EPA TSCA Title VI compliant. Actuator, adaptor and handset are certified by UL. Simple Assembly Warranty Just slide the back into the seat and Shoop you re all set. You are also buckled up with our one-year warranty on mechanism and solid wood frame. Price Category: mid-range

combined_text: Product: Elvin Genuine Leather Recliner Lounge Chair Ottoman - Genuine Top-grain Leather White. Category: Accent Chair. Description: Reclining Swivel Chair and Ottoman This chair and ottoman set is just right for a modern office, den, or living room. A recline feature makes this chair even more comfortable when you need it. Sink into the double layered foam back cushion and relax. Finished in a contemporary neutral shade, it will complement any color decor. Memory Swivel Base Adjustable Headrest Stable 4-prong metal base features memory return that spins back to your original position after you get up from it. Headrest can be lifted up to accommodate different heights. In the fully reclined position, the headrest can be pushed forward to better support your head and neck. Seriously, you will love lounging here, and look cool while you do it. 100 Top Grain Leather Top grain leather is the highest quality part of the hide, which makes it highly durable and long-lasting. It can withstand everyday wear and tear, making it a practical choice for chairs in high-use areas. In addition, it adds an upscale and sophisticated look to any room. Leather becomes more comfortable over time as it conforms to your body's contours and maintains a comfortable temperature. It doesn't trap heat and thus, providing a more comfortable seating experience. Note Leather is a natural product. Both texture and color will vary slightly from hide to hide. Stretch marks, scars and insect bites will be visible and prove the high quality and naturalism of the leather. Overall Dimension Chair in upright position 34.3''D x 31.1''W x 39.4''H. Chair in fully reclined position 45.3''D x 31.1''W x 28.7''H. Wall Clearance Needed To Recline 11''. Ottoman 17.3''D x 20.5''W x 15.7''H. Seat Dimension 19.3''D x 18.9''W x 17.3''H. Weight Capacity 350 lbs. Simple assembly required. If you have any questions, please contact our professional customer support team. We will give you a satisfactory solution. Two Packages The chair and ottoman set comes with 2 boxes and may arrive at different dates. Each box is designed and packaged to maximize shipping efficiency and fits narrow staircase and elevator. Minimum door width 30''. Box 1 Chair Ottoman body. Box 2 Chair Ottoman base.. Price Category: premium

combined_text: Product: Delaney 5-Seat V Shaped Modular Sofa Chaise - Terracotta 0. Category: Sofas. Description: 5-PIECE CORNER MODULAR SOFA WITH LARGER SEATS - CHITA modular couches feature clean and classic design with comfortable and wider seats to offer you a never ending relax after a long day. Each seat has a 34'' seat width - 30 larger than most counterparts. Individual seat dimension 34''W x 21.5''D x 18.5''H. Only three seats are needed to achieve a 106'' overall width. REARRANGEABLE FOR ANY OCCASION - Available in multiple configurations, the modular pieces can be easily rearranged to fit both small and spacious living rooms, family rooms, basement playrooms, etc. To accommodate different occasions and gatherings, the modular combination allows you to pull the armless chair out as a standalone piece. A DIVE INTO COMFORT - Comfort is intimate and personal. With CHITA modular sofas, comfort is a feeling that there is nowhere else you want to be. The sofa frame is luxuriously padded with high density foam and topped by loose cushions. Soft, reversible back cushions and arm pillows are padded with a soft blend of fiber. Cozy, non-reversible seat cushions have fiber-wrapped, high-resiliency foam, which is CertiPur-US certified. Cushions can be easily fluffed to maintain a clean look. Seat firmness medium. On a scale from 1 to 5 5 being firmest , it's a 3. IDEAL FOR BUSY HOMES - Engineered for homes with lots of activities, these durable fabrics take a good beating from over use and continue to look like new. The linen-like fabric is soft to the touch and has variegated chenille yarns that create a heathered appearance. Fabrics are OEKO-TEX certified, containing no formaldehyde or harmful phthalates. Every component of these fabrics has been tested for harmful substances and the fabrics are harmless for human health. PREMIUM QUALITY - Each CHITA modular piece is made by the skilled hands of artisans who have melted functionality and design. Sturdy corner blocked wooden frame is expertly crafted from solid engineered wood and hard wood. All wood is kiln-dried for added durability. High-gauge sinuous springs and synthetic webbing suspension provide additional support for seat and back cushions. Weight capacity for each seat 350 lbs. SEATS THAT DO NOT SLIDE APART - In addition to non-slip legs, strong metal connectors come with each seat to keep different seats together from bottom, creating a connected couch that doesn't slip or slide apart. CARE INSTRUCTIONS - For non-removable areas, blot and spot clean immediately with a clean, absorbent cloth and a water-free stain remover Cleaning Code S . Cushion covers are dry clean only. MINIMUM TOOL FREE ASSEMBLY REQUIRED - No extra tools are needed for assembly. Each assembly step is simple and intuitive.Note Do not start the assembly process until all boxes are present. Do not open all boxes at once. Start with Arms Box and follow detailed instructions. SIX PACKAGES - The 5-piece corner modular sofa comes with 7 boxes and may arrive at different dates. Each box is designed and packaged to maximize shipping efficiency and fits narrow staircase and elevator. Minimum door width 20''Box 1 ArmsBox 2 Left seat backrest Box 3 Right seat backrestBox 4 Armless chair Box 5 Armless chair Box 6 Backs BoxBox 7 Seat Cushions Box. Price Category: luxury

combined_text: Product: Davin Power Lift Assist Infinite Position Recliner - Top Grain Leather Saddle. Category: Lift Chair. Description: The Davin Triple Power Lift Chair is an excellent choice for a well-tailored sitting experience. Its top grain leather is soft, luxurious, and easy to clean and maintain. It features hidden slide-out cup holders on the fronts of each arm that close when not in use. Infinite-Position Power Lift Chair This lift chair recliner represents the perfect combination of style and function. In addition to offering massage and heat features, it supports true infinite positioning this enables the backrest, footrest, and headrest to move independently from one another. The triple-power reclining mechanism allows effortless angle adjustment from an upright to a fully reclined or lifted position. Sturdy Construction Certified Materials Each piece is hand-made by master craftsmen using corner blocked wooden frame. Premium top grain leather on all seating areas, the top of armrests and footrests. Hand selected matching faux leather on the sides and back. Back cushions with bagged and channeled polyester fibre to maintain shape. No-sag spring platform to ensure support and comfort. The high quality metal mechanism and UL certified actuator offer not only comfort and stability but recline quietly and smoothly with a push of button. Weight Capacity 350 lbs. Easy-To-Use Controller Convenient Charging A hand-held remote with soft-touch buttons allows you to independently adjust the footrest and backrest for custom relaxation, and can be positioned on your left or right-hand side. A built-in USB charging port enables easy charging of your mobile phone or tablet. The wired controller can be stored in the side storage pockets, which are easily accessible and large enough for your tablets or magazines. The removable lumbar pillow provides better support for the waist, catering to the varying needs of seat depth. When fully reclined, it can be used to fill the gap between the back and seat or serve as a head pillow. Easy to Clean Simply moisten a cloth lightly with water for easy wiping. Periodically, dust the surface using a clean, dry, and non-abrasive white cloth. No formaldehyde is detected. Large Size Lift Chair Overall Dimension 38.6''D x 37.8''W x 42.1''H. Seat Dimension 21.3''D x 22.4''W x 19.9''H. Weight Capacity 350 lbs. Recommended Seater Height 5'2"-6'2''. Simple Assembly Tool-free assembly. Comes in 3 boxes which fit through doorways 22'' or wider. Removable back and arms also allow for easy lifting and maneuvering through doorways. We will give you a satisfactory solution.. Price Category: premium

The idea is to give you a feeling of weightlessness, which can relieve stress on the body and improve circulation.

Cozy, non-reversible seat cushions have fiber-wrapped, high-resiliency foam, which is CertiPur-US certified. Cushions can be easily fluffed to maintain a clean look. Seat firmness medium. On a scale from 1 to 5 5 being firmest , it's a 3. IDEAL FOR BUSY HOMES - Engineered for homes with lots of activities, these durable fabrics take a good beating from over use and continue to look like new. The linen-like fabric is soft to the touch and has variegated chenille yarns that create a heathered appearance. Fabrics are OEKO-TEX certified, containing no formaldehyde or harmful phthalates. Every component of these fabrics has been tested for harmful substances and the fabrics are harmless for human health. PREMIUM QUALITY - Each CHITA modular piece is made by the skilled hands of artisans who have melted functionality and design. Sturdy corner blocked wooden frame is expertly crafted from solid engineered wood and hard wood. All wood is kiln-dried for added durability. High-gauge sinuous springs and synthetic webbing suspension provide additional support for seat and back cushions. Weight capacity for each seat 350 lbs. CARE INSTRUCTIONS - For non-removable areas, blot and spot clean immediately with a clean, absorbent cloth and a water-free stain remover Cleaning Code S . Cushion covers are dry clean only. MINIMUM TOOL FREE ASSEMBLY REQUIRED - No extra tools are needed for assembly. Each assembly step is simple and intuitive.Note Do not start the assembly process until all boxes are present. Do not open all boxes at once. Start with Arms Box and follow detailed instructions. FIVE PACKAGES - The 4-piece modular sofa comes with 5 boxes and may arrive at different dates. Each box is designed and packaged to maximize shipping efficiency and fits narrow staircase and elevator. Minimum door width 18''Box 1 ArmsBox 2 Left seat backrest Box 3 Right seat backrestBox 4 Armless chair Box 5 Ottoman. Price Category: premium

combined_text: Product: Noah Zero-Gravity Genuine Leather Recliner with Power Headrest - Top Grain Genuine Leather Light Gray Set of 2. Category: Recliners. Description: The Noah power recliner is the perfect fit for the modern home, featuring soft, luxurious top grain leather that is easy to clean and maintain. It offers a power motion seat with a power headrest, allowing you to select the optimal position for your comfort. The recliner also features hidden slide-out cup holders on the fronts of each arm, which close when not in use. The mechanism provides the ability for users to recline with their feet above their heart which allows you to relax in comfort. Sturdy Construction Certified Materials Each piece is hand-made by master craftsmen using corner blocked wooden frame. Premium top grain leather on all seating areas, arms rests and footrests. Hand selected matching faux leather on the sides and back. Back cushions with bagged and channeled polyester fibre to maintain shape. No-sag spring platform to ensure support and comfort. The high quality metal reclining mechanism and UL certified actuator offer not only comfort and stability but recline quietly and smoothly with a push of button. Weight Capacity 350 lbs. Bonus Features Built-in USB charging ports for easy charging of your mobile devices. Fixed lumbar cushion offers extra support and keeps your room clean and tidy. Power Headrests for Customized Positioning And Comfort As you lounge, the power headrest can be independently adjusted to support your head and neck, allowing you to read or watch TV while reclined. The waterfall chaise takes pressure off tired legs, while the contoured seat allows you to sit comfortably for as long as you like. Convenient Charging Built-in USB Type-C charging ports allow for easy charging of your mobile phone and are accessibly located on the reclining activator button. Easy To Clean Lightly moisten a cloth with water and wipe clean easily. Periodically dust using a clean, dry and non-abrasive white cloth. Formaldehyde is not detected. Simple Assembly Tool free assembly. Comes in 3 box which fits through doorways 22'' or wider. Removable back and arms also allow for easy lifting and maneuvering through doorways. combined_text: Product: Ohana 3-Seat Zero Gravity Modular Reclining Sofa - 3 0 Fossil Gray. Category: Sofas. Description: Oversized sectional sofa creates maximum comfort, in addition to modular pieces that make dreams come true, which are easy to move around and can be effortlessly rearranged to fit both small and spacious living rooms. Extra deep and wide seat is perfect for curling up with your loved ones to read a book, watch a movie, or simply relax. Pillowy-soft cushions are padded with a soft blend of fiber and sterilized feathers with down proof ticking. All cushions are loose and reversible, featuring zip-off, machine-washable covers. Cushions can be easily fluffed to maintain a clean look. Double-stacked pillowy seats and loose cushions add much more comfort, making you feel like you are surrounded by clouds. Removable back cushion to adjust the seat depth to match different seating needs. Comfortable in All Positions In the up-right position, the cushion back is straight up, making it great for sitting and reading. You can also raise the fully padded footrest without reclining the backrest to take pressure off your legs, achieving your most comfortable TV-watching position. In the fully reclined position, the chair lies flat, perfect for taking a nap. This wall hugger recliner, also known as a wall saver or zero clearance recliner, is specially designed to take up less space than traditional reclining chairs. Zero-gravity is designed to position your body in a way that evenly distributes your weight across the chair, reducing pressure points and providing superior comfort. The idea is to give you a feeling of weightlessness, which can relieve stress on the body and improve circulation. Built-in USB Type-C charging ports allow for easy charging of your mobile phone and are accessibly located on the reclining activator button. Hidden anti-slip legs to prevent sliding apart. Seat firmness Soft. On a scale from 1 to 5 5 being firmest , it's a 2. Free White Glove Service Packages will be brought into the home, placed in the room of your choice, fully assembled and all packaging will be removed.. Price Category: luxury

A recline feature makes this chair even more comfortable when you need it. Sink into the double layered foam back cushion and relax. Finished in a contemporary neutral shade, it will complement any color decor. Memory Swivel Base Adjustable Headrest Stable 4-prong metal base features memory return that spins back to your original position after you get up from it. Headrest can be lifted up to accommodate different heights. In the fully reclined position, the headrest can be pushed forward to better support your head and neck. Seriously, you will love lounging here, and look cool while you do it. 100 Top Grain Leather Top grain leather is the highest quality part of the hide, which makes it highly durable and long-lasting. It can withstand everyday wear and tear, making it a practical choice for chairs in high-use areas. In addition, it adds an upscale and sophisticated look to any room. Leather becomes more comfortable over time as it conforms to your body's contours and maintains a comfortable temperature. It doesn't trap heat and thus, providing a more comfortable seating experience. Note Leather is a natural product. Both texture and color will vary slightly from hide to hide. Stretch marks, scars and insect bites will be visible and prove the high quality and naturalism of the leather. Overall Dimension Chair in upright position 34.3''D x 31.1''W x 39.4''H. Chair in fully reclined position 45.3''D x 31.1''W x 28.7''H. Wall Clearance Needed To Recline 11''. Ottoman 17.3''D x 20.5''W x 15.7''H. Seat Dimension 19.3''D x 18.9''W x 17.3''H. Weight Capacity 350 lbs. Simple assembly required. If you have any questions, please contact our professional customer support team. We will give you a satisfactory solution. Two Packages The chair and ottoman set comes with 2 boxes and may arrive at different dates. Each box is designed and packaged to maximize shipping efficiency and fits narrow staircase and elevator. Minimum door width 30''. Box 1 Chair Ottoman body. Box 2 Chair Ottoman base.. Price Category: premium

combined_text: Product: Ohana 5-Seat Zero Gravity Modular Reclining Sofa - 3 0 Milo Linen. Category: Sofas. Description: Oversized sectional sofa creates maximum comfort, in addition to modular pieces that make dreams come true, which are easy to move around and can be effortlessly rearranged to fit both small and spacious living rooms. Extra deep and wide seat is perfect for curling up with your loved ones to read a book, watch a movie, or simply relax. Pillowy-soft cushions are padded with a soft blend of fiber and sterilized feathers with down proof ticking. All cushions are loose and reversible, featuring zip-off, machine-washable covers. Cushions can be easily fluffed to maintain a clean look. Double-stacked pillowy seats and loose cushions add much more comfort, making you feel like you are surrounded by clouds. Removable back cushion to adjust the seat depth to match different seating needs. Comfortable in All Positions In the up-right position, the cushion back is straight up, making it great for sitting and reading. You can also raise the fully padded footrest without reclining the backrest to take pressure off your legs, achieving your most comfortable TV-watching position. In the fully reclined position, the chair lies flat, perfect for taking a nap. This wall hugger recliner, also known as a wall saver or zero clearance recliner, is specially designed to take up less space than traditional reclining chairs. Zero-gravity is designed to position your body in a way that evenly distributes your weight across the chair, reducing pressure points and providing superior comfort. The idea is to give you a feeling of weightlessness, which can relieve stress on the body and improve circulation. Built-in USB Type-C charging ports allow for easy charging of your mobile phone and are accessibly located on the reclining activator button. Hidden anti-slip legs to prevent sliding apart. Seat firmness Soft. On a scale from 1 to 5 5 being firmest , it's a 2. Free White Glove Service Packages will be brought into the home, placed in the room of your choice, fully assembled and all packaging will be removed.. Price Category: luxury
sentences: Product: Ohana -Seat Zero Gravity Modular Reclining Sofa.

combined_text: Product: Isaac Genuine Leather Wall Hugger Power Recliner with Power Headrest - Brown Standard. Category: Recliners. Description: Dual Motors Offering a full spectrum of five-star amenities, our Isaac power recliner is your gateway to relaxation perfection. Not only does it feature power motion and a power headrest that adjust to your liking, but it also provides unparalleled comfort and support. Wall Hugger Recliner Wall hugger recliners are great space-savers, making them perfect if you don't have a lot of room but still want the ability to recline e.g., in the RV . When you ease into the reclining position, the seat moves forward while maintaining no gap between the back and seat. Genuine Leather Premium top grain leather is upholstered everywhere you touch. The top-grain leather is soft, luxurious, and easy to clean and maintain. Power Headrest for Customized Positioning And Comfort As you lounge, the power headrest can be independently adjusted to support your head and neck, allowing you to read or watch TV while reclined. The waterfall chaise takes pressure off tired legs, while the contoured seat allows you to sit comfortably for as long as you like. Sturdy Construction Certified Materials Each piece is hand-made by master craftsmen using corner blocked wooden frame. Back cushions with bagged and channeled polyester fibre to maintain shape. No-sag spring platform to ensure support and comfort. The high quality metal reclining mechanism and UL certified actuator offer not only comfort and stability but recline quietly and smoothly with a push of button. Weight Capacity 350 lbs. Convenient Charging Built-in USB Type-C charging ports allow for easy charging of your mobile phone and are accessibly located on the reclining activator button. Easy To Clean Lightly moisten a cloth with water and wipe clean easily. Periodically dust using a clean, dry and non-abrasive white cloth. Formaldehyde is not detected. Overall Dimension of Extra-Large Size 40.2''D x 40.7''W x 44.1''H. Seat Dimension 21.3''D x 25.2''W x 18.5''H. Weight Capacity 450 lbs. Recommended Seater Height 5'4"-6'4". combined_text: Product: Davin Power Lift Assist Infinite Position Recliner - Top Grain Leather Brown. Category: Lift Chair. Description: The Davin Triple Power Lift Chair is an excellent choice for a well-tailored sitting experience. Its top grain leather is soft, luxurious, and easy to clean and maintain. It features hidden slide-out cup holders on the fronts of each arm that close when not in use. Infinite-Position Power Lift Chair This lift chair recliner represents the perfect combination of style and function. In addition to offering massage and heat features, it supports true infinite positioning this enables the backrest, footrest, and headrest to move independently from one another. The triple-power reclining mechanism allows effortless angle adjustment from an upright to a fully reclined or lifted position. Sturdy Construction Certified Materials Each piece is hand-made by master craftsmen using corner blocked wooden frame. Premium top grain leather on all seating areas, the top of armrests and footrests. Hand selected matching faux leather on the sides and back. Back cushions with bagged and channeled polyester fibre to maintain shape. No-sag spring platform to ensure support and comfort. The high quality metal mechanism and UL certified actuator offer not only comfort and stability but recline quietly and smoothly with a push of button. Weight Capacity 350 lbs. Easy-To-Use Controller Convenient Charging A hand-held remote with soft-touch buttons allows you to independently adjust the footrest and backrest for custom relaxation, and can be positioned on your left or right-hand side. A built-in USB charging port enables easy charging of your mobile phone or tablet. The wired controller can be stored in the side storage pockets, which are easily accessible and large enough for your tablets or magazines. The removable lumbar pillow provides better support for the waist, catering to the varying needs of seat depth. When fully reclined, it can be used to fill the gap between the back and seat or serve as a head pillow. Easy to Clean Simply moisten a cloth lightly with water for easy wiping. Periodically, dust the surface using a clean, dry, and non-abrasive white cloth. No formaldehyde is detected. Large Size Lift Chair Overall Dimension 38.6''D x 37.8''W x 42.1''H. Seat Dimension 21.3''D x 22.4''W x 19.9''H. Weight Capacity 350 lbs. Recommended Seater Height 5'2"-6'2''. Simple Assembly Tool-free assembly. Comes in 3 boxes which fit through doorways 22'' or wider. Removable back and arms also allow for easy lifting and maneuvering through doorways. Warranty You are buckled up with our one-year warranty on mechanism and wood frame. If you have any questions, please contact our professional customer support team. We will give you a satisfactory solution.. Price Category: premium

combined_text: Product: Elvin Genuine Leather Recliner Lounge Chair Ottoman - Multi-Colored Fabric White. Category: Accent Chair. Description: Reclining Swivel Chair and Ottoman This chair and ottoman set is just right for a modern office, den, or living room. A recline feature makes this chair even more comfortable when you need it. Sink into the double layered foam back cushion and relax. Finished in a contemporary neutral shade, it will complement any color decor. Memory Swivel Base Adjustable Headrest Stable 4-prong metal base features memory return that spins back to your original position after you get up from it. Headrest can be lifted up to accommodate different heights. In the fully reclined position, the headrest can be pushed forward to better support your head and neck. Seriously, you will love lounging here, and look cool while you do it. 100 Top Grain Leather Top grain leather is the highest quality part of the hide, which makes it highly durable and long-lasting. It can withstand everyday wear and tear, making it a practical choice for chairs in high-use areas. In addition, it adds an upscale and sophisticated look to any room. Leather becomes more comfortable over time as it conforms to your body's contours and maintains a comfortable temperature. It doesn't trap heat and thus, providing a more comfortable seating experience. Note Leather is a natural product. Both texture and color will vary slightly from hide to hide. Stretch marks, scars and insect bites will be visible and prove the high quality and naturalism of the leather. Overall Dimension Chair in upright position 34.3''D x 31.1''W x 39.4''H. Chair in fully reclined position 45.3''D x 31.1''W x 28.7''H. Wall Clearance Needed To Recline 11''. Ottoman 17.3''D x 20.5''W x 15.7''H. Seat Dimension 19.3''D x 18.9''W x 17.3''H. Weight Capacity 350 lbs. Simple assembly required. If you have any questions, please contact our professional customer support team. We will give you a satisfactory solution. Two Packages The chair and ottoman set comes with 2 boxes and may arrive at different dates. Each box is designed and packaged to maximize shipping efficiency and fits narrow staircase and elevator. Minimum door width 30''. Box 1 Chair Ottoman body. Box 2 Chair Ottoman base.. Price Category: premium

combined_text: Product: Noah Zero-Gravity Genuine Leather Recliner with Power Headrest - Top Grain Genuine Leather Brown Set of 2. Category: Recliners. Description: The Noah power recliner is the perfect fit for the modern home, featuring soft, luxurious top grain leather that is easy to clean and maintain. It offers a power motion seat with a power headrest, allowing you to select the optimal position for your comfort. Additionally, it includes a metal switch with USB and Type-C ports for charging your electronic devices. The recliner also features hidden slide-out cup holders on the fronts of each arm, which close when not in use. Zero-gravity Reclining is designed with innovation and ergonomics in mind, so it only makes sense to adopt this concept into comfortable seating. The mechanism provides the ability for users to recline with their feet above their heart which allows you to relax in comfort. One can experience the amazing zero gravity position at the touch of a button and discover convenient comfort right at home. Sturdy Construction Certified Materials Each piece is hand-made by master craftsmen using corner blocked wooden frame. Premium top grain leather on all seating areas, arms rests and footrests. Hand selected matching faux leather on the sides and back. Back cushions with bagged and channeled polyester fibre to maintain shape. No-sag spring platform to ensure support and comfort. The high quality metal reclining mechanism and UL certified actuator offer not only comfort and stability but recline quietly and smoothly with a push of button. Weight Capacity 350 lbs. Bonus Features Built-in USB charging ports for easy charging of your mobile devices. Fixed lumbar cushion offers extra support and keeps your room clean and tidy. Power Headrests for Customized Positioning And Comfort As you lounge, the power headrest can be independently adjusted to support your head and neck, allowing you to read or watch TV while reclined. The waterfall chaise takes pressure off tired legs, while the contoured seat allows you to sit comfortably for as long as you like. Convenient Charging Built-in USB Type-C charging ports allow for easy charging of your mobile phone and are accessibly located on the reclining activator button. Easy To Clean Lightly moisten a cloth with water and wipe clean easily. Periodically dust using a clean, dry and non-abrasive white cloth. Formaldehyde is not detected. Simple Assembly Tool free assembly. Comes in 3 box which fits through doorways 22'' or wider. Removable back and arms also allow for easy lifting and maneuvering through doorways. Warranty You are buckled up with our one-year warranty on mechanism and wood frame. If you have any questions, please contact our professional customer support team. We will give you a satisfactory solution.. Price Category: premium

combined_text: Product: Ohana 5-Seat Zero Gravity Modular Reclining Sofa - 2 0 Milo Linen. Category: Sofas. Description: Oversized sectional sofa creates maximum comfort, in addition to modular pieces that make dreams come true, which are easy to move around and can be effortlessly rearranged to fit both small and spacious living rooms. Extra deep and wide seat is perfect for curling up with your loved ones to read a book, watch a movie, or simply relax. Pillowy-soft cushions are padded with a soft blend of fiber and sterilized feathers with down proof ticking. All cushions are loose and reversible, featuring zip-off, machine-washable covers. Cushions can be easily fluffed to maintain a clean look. Double-stacked pillowy seats and loose cushions add much more comfort, making you feel like you are surrounded by clouds. Removable back cushion to adjust the seat depth to match different seating needs. Comfortable in All Positions In the up-right position, the cushion back is straight up, making it great for sitting and reading. You can also raise the fully padded footrest without reclining the backrest to take pressure off your legs, achieving your most comfortable TV-watching position. In the fully reclined position, the chair lies flat, perfect for taking a nap. This wall hugger recliner, also known as a wall saver or zero clearance recliner, is specially designed to take up less space than traditional reclining chairs. Zero-gravity is designed to position your body in a way that evenly distributes your weight across the chair, reducing pressure points and providing superior comfort. The idea is to give you a feeling of weightlessness, which can relieve stress on the body and improve circulation. Built-in USB Type-C charging ports allow for easy charging of your mobile phone and are accessibly located on the reclining activator button. Hidden anti-slip legs to prevent sliding apart. Seat firmness Soft. On a scale from 1 to 5 5 being firmest , it's a 2. Free White Glove Service Packages will be brought into the home, placed in the room of your choice, fully assembled and all packaging will be removed.. Price Category: luxury

Extra deep and wide seat is perfect for curling up with your loved ones to read a book, watch a movie, or simply relax. Pillowy-soft cushions are padded with a soft blend of fiber and sterilized feathers with down proof ticking. All cushions are loose and reversible, featuring zip-off, machine-washable covers. Cushions can be easily fluffed to maintain a clean look. Double-stacked pillowy seats and loose cushions add much more comfort, making you feel like you are surrounded by clouds. Removable back cushion to adjust the seat depth to match different seating needs. Comfortable in All Positions In the up-right position, the cushion back is straight up, making it great for sitting and reading. You can also raise the fully padded footrest without reclining the backrest to take pressure off your legs, achieving your most comfortable TV-watching position. In the fully reclined position, the chair lies flat, perfect for taking a nap. This wall hugger recliner, also known as a wall saver or zero clearance recliner, is specially designed to take up less space than traditional reclining chairs. Zero-gravity is designed to position your body in a way that evenly distributes your weight across the chair, reducing pressure points and providing superior comfort. The idea is to give you a feeling of weightlessness, which can relieve stress on the body and improve circulation. Built-in USB Type-C charging ports allow for easy charging of your mobile phone and are accessibly located on the reclining activator button. Hidden anti-slip legs to prevent sliding apart. Seat firmness Soft. On a scale from 1 to 5 5 being firmest , it's a 2. Free White Glove Service Packages will be brought into the home, placed in the room of your choice, fully assembled and all packaging will be removed.. Price Category: luxury

combined_text: Product: Isaac Genuine Leather Wall Hugger Power Recliner with Power Headrest - Saddle Standard. Category: Recliners. Description: Dual Motors Offering a full spectrum of five-star amenities, our Isaac power recliner is your gateway to relaxation perfection. Not only does it feature power motion and a power headrest that adjust to your liking, but it also provides unparalleled comfort and support. Wall Hugger Recliner Wall hugger recliners are great space-savers, making them perfect if you don't have a lot of room but still want the ability to recline e.g., in the RV . When you ease into the reclining position, the seat moves forward while maintaining no gap between the back and seat. Genuine Leather Premium top grain leather is upholstered everywhere you touch. The top-grain leather is soft, luxurious, and easy to clean and maintain. Power Headrest for Customized Positioning And Comfort As you lounge, the power headrest can be independently adjusted to support your head and neck, allowing you to read or watch TV while reclined. The waterfall chaise takes pressure off tired legs, while the contoured seat allows you to sit comfortably for as long as you like. Sturdy Construction Certified Materials Each piece is hand-made by master craftsmen using corner blocked wooden frame. Back cushions with bagged and channeled polyester fibre to maintain shape. No-sag spring platform to ensure support and comfort. The high quality metal reclining mechanism and UL certified actuator offer not only comfort and stability but recline quietly and smoothly with a push of button. Weight Capacity 350 lbs. Convenient Charging Built-in USB Type-C charging ports allow for easy charging of your mobile phone and are accessibly located on the reclining activator button. Easy To Clean Lightly moisten a cloth with water and wipe clean easily. Periodically dust using a clean, dry and non-abrasive white cloth. Formaldehyde is not detected. Simple Assembly Tool free assembly. Comes in 1 box which fits through doorways 29'' or wider. Removable back also allows for easy lifting and maneuvering through doorways. Overall Dimension of Medium Size 38.2''D x 37''W x 40.9''H. Seat Dimension 21.3''D x 22.8''W x 18.5''H. Weight Capacity 350 lbs. Recommended Seater Height 5'2"-6'1". Overall Dimension of Extra-Large Size 40.2''D x 40.7''W x 44.1''H. Seat Dimension 21.3''D x 25.2''W x 18.5''H. Weight Capacity 450 lbs. Recommended Seater Height 5'4"-6'4". Warranty You are buckled up with our one-year warranty on mechanism and wood frame. If you have any questions, please contact our professional customer support team. We will give you a satisfactory solution.. Price Category: mid-range

combined_text: Product: Delaney Storage Ottoman - Blue. Category: Sofas. Description: SPACIOUS VERSATILE STORAGE OTTOMAN - Lift up the ottoman top with a built-in smooth gas-lift mechanism to reveal plenty of out-of-sight storage. dStorage space 28.7''W x 27.6''D x 8.3''H. In addition, it is a perfect footrest or table when topped with a tray. A DIVE INTO COMFORT - Comfort is intimate and personal. With CHITA modular sofas, comfort is a feeling that there is nowhere else you want to be. The sofa frame is luxuriously padded with high density foam and topped by loose cushions. Soft, reversible back cushions and arm pillows are padded with a soft blend of fiber. Cozy, non-reversible seat cushions have fiber-wrapped, high-resiliency foam, which is CertiPur-US certified. Cushions can be easily fluffed to maintain a clean look. Seat firmness medium. On a scale from 1 to 5 5 being firmest , it's a 3. IDEAL FOR BUSY HOMES - Engineered for homes with lots of activities, these durable fabrics take a good beating from over use and continue to look like new. The linen-like fabric is soft to the touch and has variegated chenille yarns that create a heathered appearance. Fabrics are OEKO-TEX certified, containing no formaldehyde or harmful phthalates. Every component of these fabrics has been tested for harmful substances and the fabrics are harmless for human health. PREMIUM QUALITY - Each piece is made by the skilled hands of artisans who have melted functionality and design. Sturdy corner blocked wooden frame is expertly crafted from solid engineered wood and hard wood. All wood is kiln-dried for added durability. Weight capacity for each seat 350 lbs. CARE INSTRUCTIONS - For non-removable areas, blot and spot clean immediately with a clean, absorbent cloth and a water-free stain remover Cleaning Code S . Cushion covers are dry clean only. MINIMUM TOOL FREE ASSEMBLY REQUIRED - No extra tools are needed for assembly. Each assembly step is simple and intuitive.. Price Category: budget

combined_text: Product: Serene Full Contemporary Upholstered Platform Bed - Gray. Category: Bed. Description: Sophisticated mixed materials features a solid hardwood frame and legs perfectly combined with boucle style fabric on the headboard, adding warmth and texture. This modern mid-century bed seamlessly integrates into any space. This sturdy bed features 4 solid wood cone-shaped legs , 16 internal slats with 2.5" spacing for FULL size and 2.7"for Queen size. It includes 4 central support legs, supporting up to 700 pounds for FULL size and 800 pounds for Queen size. Universally Compatible with Mattresses Our bed frame is perfectly designed to accommodate mattresses ranging from 8 to 14 inches in thickness. The queen-sized model features 16 roller slats, positioned 2.7 inches apart, which offer exceptional support for all mattress types, be it spring, memory foam, latex, or hybrid. Felt sponge pads on the bottom of the four legs protect your floor from wear and minimize noise, guaranteeing a tranquil sleep. Easy to assemble The instructions are simple to follow, and we also include mini ratchet wrenches for effortless installation. It can be put together in just thirty minutes, and we suggest having two people to expedite the process. Safe and Certified Materials Our beds feature CertiPUR-US certified foam and OEKO-TEX certified fabrics, ensuring a healthy and trustworthy sleeping environment. No Box Spring Needed - Sturdy wooden slats support and extend the life of your latex, memory foam or spring mattress without the need for a box spring. Storage Space The 9.8 inch height under the bed can store some of your household items. Also the sweeper can easily pass through. Storable while easy to clean. The headboard is wrapped in Supersoft, durable fabric with a subtle weave, easy to clean, and the natural hue of cotton ball fabric creates a warm, gentle atmosphere. Simple assembly is required. The queen size bed comes in two separate boxes. one box is 83" L x 15" W x 11" H the other is 65" L x 43" W x 4" H .Should you have any questions, please don't hesitate to contact our professional customer support team. We are dedicated to providing you with a satisfactory solution. If you have any questions, please contact our professional customer support team. We will give you a satisfactory solution. Comfortable medium headboard feel On a scale from 1 to 5 5 being firmest , it's a 3. Price Category: premium

Relaxation Convenient Charging The Power Glider Swivel Rocker Recliner Chair includes an extended footrest for complete relaxation, making it perfect for activities such as watching television, sleeping, and reading.
