combined_text: Product: Tracee Modern Power Swivel Glider Recliner - Fabric Blue. Category: Recliners. Description: Power Swivel Glider Designed with Mom s comfort in mind, it swivels 270 degrees , glides, and reclines quietly and smoothly with a push of button. Not An Average Nursery Chair Although not quite visible, the patented Leggett Platt mechanism really stands out. The mechanism passes 25,000-cycle life test and has a weight limit of 350 lbs. Powered mechanism also allows you to get up from the chair without waking up the baby in your arms. Not An Eye Sore Mom deserves beautiful things. Tired of husband s boxy or chunky recliners We heard you. Be prepared to receive compliments on this elegant low profile design with curved silhouette. Bonus Features Built-in USB charging ports for easy charging of your mobile devices. Fixed lumbar cushion offers extra support and keeps your room clean and tidy. Safe Sound Foam is environmentally friendly and certified by CertiPUR-US, meaning it is made without PBDEs or Tris flame retardants, heavy metals, formaldehyde, etc. Engineered wood is EPA TSCA Title VI compliant. Actuator, adaptor and handset are certified by UL. Simple Assembly Warranty Just slide the back into the seat and Shoop you re all set. You are also buckled up with our one-year warranty on mechanism and solid wood frame. Price Category: mid-range

combined_text: Product: Delaney Modular Armless Chair 2-Seat Armless Sofa - Armless Chair Blue. Category: Sofas. Description: 2-PIECE MODULAR ARMLESS SOFA - CHITA modular armless couch features clean and classic design with comfortable seats to offer you a never ending relax after a long day. Individual seat dimension 34''W x 21.5''D x 18.5''H. Overall sofa dimension 68''W x 33''D x 35''H. A DIVE INTO COMFORT - Comfort is intimate and personal. With CHITA modular sofas, comfort is a feeling that there is nowhere else you want to be. The sofa frame is luxuriously padded with high density foam and topped by loose cushions. Soft, reversible back cushions and arm pillows are padded with a soft blend of fiber. Cozy, non-reversible seat cushions have fiber-wrapped, high-resiliency foam, which is CertiPur-US certified. Cushions can be easily fluffed to maintain a clean look. Seat firmness medium. On a scale from 1 to 5 5 being firmest , it's a 3. IDEAL FOR BUSY HOMES - Engineered for homes with lots of activities, these durable fabrics take a good beating from over use and continue to look like new. The linen-like fabric is soft to the touch and has variegated chenille yarns that create a heathered appearance. Fabrics are OEKO-TEX certified, containing no formaldehyde or harmful phthalates. Every component of these fabrics has been tested for harmful substances and the fabrics are harmless for human health. PREMIUM QUALITY - Each CHITA modular piece is made by the skilled hands of artisans who have melted functionality and design. Sturdy corner blocked wooden frame is expertly crafted from solid engineered wood and hard wood. All wood is kiln-dried for added durability. High-gauge sinuous springs and synthetic webbing suspension provide additional support for seat and back cushions. Weight capacity for each seat 350 lbs. CARE INSTRUCTIONS - For non-removable areas, blot and spot clean immediately with a clean, absorbent cloth and a water-free stain remover Cleaning Code S . Cushion covers are dry clean only. MINIMUM TOOL FREE ASSEMBLY REQUIRED - No extra tools are needed for assembly. Each assembly step is simple and intuitive. TWO PACKAGES - The 2-piece armless sofa comes with 2 boxes and may arrive at different dates. Each box is designed and packaged to maximize shipping efficiency and fits narrow staircase and elevator. Minimum door width 18''Box 1 Armless chairBox 2 Armless chair. Price Category: mid-range

combined_text: Product: Kenna Modular 4 Seat Sofa-Chaise Sectional - With Ottoman Dark Gray 0. Category: Sofas. Description: As one of the most loungeable seating in the world, the Kenna collection creates the ultimate oasis for you and your family to pile on and and sink in. The collection features slim, sloped arms and low seat that make room for pillowy cushions for an extraordinary deep and comfortable sit. Available in multiple configurations, the modular pieces are easy to move around and can be easily rearranged to fit both small and spacious living rooms. Extra deep wide seat is perfect for curling up with your loved ones to read a book, watch a movie, or simply get relaxed. The deck is luxuriously padded by CertiPur-US foam and topped by loose cushions. Non-slip legs are smartly tucked beneath the deck for a floaty silhouette. Pillowy-soft cushions are padded with a soft blend of fiber and sterilized feathers. All cushions are loose and reversible with zip-off and machine washable covers. Cushions can be easily fluffed to maintain a clean look. Sturdy corner blocked wooden frame is expertly crafted from solid engineered wood and hard wood. All wood is kiln-dried for added durability. Highly resilient fabrics surpass durability standards with a rub count of over 100,000. Seat firmness Soft. On a scale from 1 to 5 5 being firmest , it's a 2. Fully assembled. No assembly required. Fits through doorways 32'' or wider. Please measure your elevator, doors, etc. to ensure smooth delivery. Seat dimension Overall Size 130.7"W x 82.7"D x 36.6''H Seat Size 122.8"W x 76.4"D x 20.9''H Box dimension Left Arm Chair 46.1'' x 42.5'' x 29.1'' Right Arm Chair 46.1'' x 42.5'' x 29.1'' Armless Chair 42.5'' x 42.5'' x 29.1'' Ottoman 46.1'' x 42.1'' x 21.7''. Price Category: luxury

MINIMUM TOOL FREE ASSEMBLY REQUIRED - No extra tools are needed for assembly. Each assembly step is simple and intuitive. combined_text: Product: Delaney 5-Seat Modular Sofa Chaise with Storage Ottomans - Terracotta 0. Category: Sofas. Description: 5-PIECE MODULAR SOFA WITH LARGER SEATS - CHITA modular couches feature clean and classic design with comfortable and wider seats to offer you a never ending relax after a long day. Each seat has a 34'' seat width - 30 larger than most counterparts. Individual seat dimension 34''W x 21.5''D x 18.5''H. Only three seats are needed to achieve a 112'' overall width. REARRANGEABLE FOR ANY OCCASION - Available in multiple configurations, the modular pieces can be easily rearranged to fit both small and spacious living rooms, family rooms, basement playrooms, etc. To accommodate different occasions and gatherings, the modular combination allows you to pull the armless chair out as a standalone piece. A DIVE INTO COMFORT - Comfort is intimate and personal. With CHITA modular sofas, comfort is a feeling that there is nowhere else you want to be. The sofa frame is luxuriously padded with high density foam and topped by loose cushions. Soft, reversible back cushions and arm pillows are padded with a soft blend of fiber. Cozy, non-reversible seat cushions have fiber-wrapped, high-resiliency foam, which is CertiPur-US certified. Cushions can be easily fluffed to maintain a clean look. Seat firmness medium. On a scale from 1 to 5 5 being firmest , it's a 3. IDEAL FOR BUSY HOMES - Engineered for homes with lots of activities, these durable fabrics take a good beating from over use and continue to look like new. The linen-like fabric is soft to the touch and has variegated chenille yarns that create a heathered appearance. Fabrics are OEKO-TEX certified, containing no formaldehyde or harmful phthalates. Every component of these fabrics has been tested for harmful substances and the fabrics are harmless for human health. PREMIUM QUALITY - Each CHITA modular piece is made by the skilled hands of artisans who have melted functionality and design. Sturdy corner blocked wooden frame is expertly crafted from solid engineered wood and hard wood. All wood is kiln-dried for added durability. High-gauge sinuous springs and synthetic webbing suspension provide additional support for seat and back cushions. Weight capacity for each seat 350 lbs. CARE INSTRUCTIONS - For non-removable areas, blot and spot clean immediately with a clean, absorbent cloth and a water-free stain remover Cleaning Code S . Cushion covers are dry clean only. MINIMUM TOOL FREE ASSEMBLY REQUIRED - No extra tools are needed for assembly. Each assembly step is simple and intuitive.Note Do not start the assembly process until all boxes are present. Do not open all boxes at once. Start with Arms Box and follow detailed instructions. FIVE PACKAGES - The 4-piece modular sofa comes with 5 boxes and may arrive at different dates. Each box is designed and packaged to maximize shipping efficiency and fits narrow staircase and elevator. Minimum door width 18''Box 1 ArmsBox 2 Left seat backrest Box 3 Right seat backrestBox 4 Armless chair Box 5 Ottoman. Price Category: premium

combined_text: Product: Delaney Modular Armless Chair 2-Seat Armless Sofa - Armless Chair Fossil Gray. Category: Sofas. Description: 2-PIECE MODULAR ARMLESS SOFA - CHITA modular armless couch features clean and classic design with comfortable seats to offer you a never ending relax after a long day. Individual seat dimension 34''W x 21.5''D x 18.5''H. Overall sofa dimension 68''W x 33''D x 35''H. A DIVE INTO COMFORT - Comfort is intimate and personal. With CHITA modular sofas, comfort is a feeling that there is nowhere else you want to be. The sofa frame is luxuriously padded with high density foam and topped by loose cushions. Soft, reversible back cushions and arm pillows are padded with a soft blend of fiber. Cozy, non-reversible seat cushions have fiber-wrapped, high-resiliency foam, which is CertiPur-US certified. Cushions can be easily fluffed to maintain a clean look. Seat firmness medium. On a scale from 1 to 5 5 being firmest , it's a 3. IDEAL FOR BUSY HOMES - Engineered for homes with lots of activities, these durable fabrics take a good beating from over use and continue to look like new. The linen-like fabric is soft to the touch and has variegated chenille yarns that create a heathered appearance. Fabrics are OEKO-TEX certified, containing no formaldehyde or harmful phthalates. Every component of these fabrics has been tested for harmful substances and the fabrics are harmless for human health. PREMIUM QUALITY - Each CHITA modular piece is made by the skilled hands of artisans who have melted functionality and design. Sturdy corner blocked wooden frame is expertly crafted from solid engineered wood and hard wood. All wood is kiln-dried for added durability. High-gauge sinuous springs and synthetic webbing suspension provide additional support for seat and back cushions. Weight capacity for each seat 350 lbs. CARE INSTRUCTIONS - For non-removable areas, blot and spot clean immediately with a clean, absorbent cloth and a water-free stain remover Cleaning Code S . Cushion covers are dry clean only. MINIMUM TOOL FREE ASSEMBLY REQUIRED - No extra tools are needed for assembly. Each assembly step is simple and intuitive. TWO PACKAGES - The 2-piece armless sofa comes with 2 boxes and may arrive at different dates. Each box is designed and packaged to maximize shipping efficiency and fits narrow staircase and elevator. Minimum door width 18''Box 1 Armless chairBox 2 Armless chair. Price Category: mid-range

combined_text: Product: Kenna Ottoman Armless Chair - Armless Chair Cream. Category: Sofas. Description: As one of the most loungeable seating in the world, the Kenna collection creates the ultimate oasis for you and your family to pile on and and sink in. The collection features slim, sloped arms and low seat that make room for pillowy cushions for an extraordinary deep and comfortable sit. Available in multiple configurations, the modular pieces are easy to move around and can be easily rearranged to fit both small and spacious living rooms. Extra deep wide seat is perfect for curling up with your loved ones to read a book, watch a movie, or simply get relaxed. The deck is luxuriously padded by CertiPur-US foam and topped by loose cushions. Non-slip legs are smartly tucked beneath the deck for a floaty silhouette. Pillowy-soft cushions are padded with a soft blend of fiber and sterilized feathers. All cushions are loose and reversible with zip-off and machine washable covers. Cushions can be easily fluffed to maintain a clean look. Sturdy corner blocked wooden frame is expertly crafted from solid engineered wood and hard wood. All wood is kiln-dried for added durability. Highly resilient fabrics surpass durability standards with a rub count of over 100,000. Seat firmness Soft. On a scale from 1 to 5 5 being firmest , it's a 2. Fully assembled. No assembly required. Fits through doorways 32'' or wider. Please measure your elevator, doors, etc. to ensure smooth delivery. combined_text: Product: Keni Wall Hugger Power Recliner with Power Headrest - Faux Leather Chocolate. Category: Recliners. Description: Zero Wall Power Recliner Better than a wall hugger and ideal for space with limited square footage e.g. RV , this recliner can be placed directly against the wall and optimizes the space available. When you ease into the reclining position, the seat moves forward but leaves no gap between the back and seat. The back of the recliner doesn't bump against wall or whatever is placed behind it. Reliable Comfort with Power Headrest As you lounge, the power headrest can be independently adjusted to support your head and neck, allowing you to read or watch TV while reclined. The waterfall chaise takes pressure off tired legs, while the contoured seat allows you to sit comfortably for as long as you like. Convenient Charging Built-in USB Type-C charging ports allow for easy charging of your mobile phone and are accessibly located on the reclining activator button. Sturdy Construction Certified Materials Each piece is hand-made by master craftsmen using corner blocked wooden frame. The high quality metal reclining mechanism and UL certified actuator offer not only comfort and stability but recline quietly and smoothly with a push of button. Weight Capacity 350 lbs. Easy To Clean Lightly moisten a cloth with water and wipe clean easily. The durable faux leather has the look of real leather and provides butter-soft texture. Formaldehyde is not detected in our faux leather. Overall Dimension 39''D x 30.5''W x 41.3''H. Seat Dimension 21.3''D x 22.0''W x 20.3''H. Weight Capacity 350 lbs. Recommended Seater Height 5'1"-5'10". Warranty You are buckled up with our one-year warranty on mechanism and wood frame. If you have any questions, please contact our professional customer support team. We will give you a satisfactory solution.. Price Category: mid-range

combined_text: Product: Keni Wall Hugger Power Recliner with Power Headrest - Faux Leather Cognac Brown. Category: Recliners. Description: Zero Wall Power Recliner Better than a wall hugger and ideal for space with limited square footage e.g. RV , this recliner can be placed directly against the wall and optimizes the space available. When you ease into the reclining position, the seat moves forward but leaves no gap between the back and seat. The back of the recliner doesn't bump against wall or whatever is placed behind it. Reliable Comfort with Power Headrest As you lounge, the power headrest can be independently adjusted to support your head and neck, allowing you to read or watch TV while reclined. The waterfall chaise takes pressure off tired legs, while the contoured seat allows you to sit comfortably for as long as you like. Convenient Charging Built-in USB Type-C charging ports allow for easy charging of your mobile phone and are accessibly located on the reclining activator button. Sturdy Construction Certified Materials Each piece is hand-made by master craftsmen using corner blocked wooden frame. The high quality metal reclining mechanism and UL certified actuator offer not only comfort and stability but recline quietly and smoothly with a push of button. Weight Capacity 350 lbs. Easy To Clean Lightly moisten a cloth with water and wipe clean easily. The durable faux leather has the look of real leather and provides butter-soft texture.
